name: Olivia Calafat
review: One the one hand some of the pharmacists were so kind with the kids and gave them some things to draw but then a woman with braids in charge of the beauty area was extremely rude when I asked her about a misunderstanding between the price of a label in a shell and the price that I paid (as they didn’t match)

name: Adam Yore
review: Very friendly and helpful staff - went on looking for protein powder (a bit hard to find in Europe). When I couldnt find on my own she politely took me to it personally and pulled another size to fit my limited time left. A good place, kind people - definitely recommend!

name: Mark Smith
review:
Staff were very helpful in arranging for me to purchase crutches and rent wheelchair after my wife fractured her knee on our first day in Venice.
Crutches were 18€ per crutch (36€ for both) and wheelchair rental was 28€ for 7 days hire and they kindly provided an elevated knee support too

name: Berta J
review: Extremely rude service. The person  behind the counter kept walking away when i was talking and slammed the medicine on the counter. I left without buying due to the behavior even if i needed the pills.

name: Andy Cara Vaggio
review: Very well organized,  very professional staff

name: LG W
review: Worst pharmacy I’ve ever been in.  Impatient and rude.  Literally turned off lights and told everyone to get out.  Avoid if possible.  There are so many nicer pharmacies to deal with in Venice.

name: Jean Nicholson
review: They rented us a new wheelchair for E.25 a week, with a E.250 deposit.  This enabled us to see Venice despite my bad back. Ok there are 400 bridges but if you can chose a route which minimises them, it is very helpful.  Thank you!

name: Cédric G
review: Very nice and understanding crew! It saved my day!

name: Bozhena Melnyk
review: Good pharmacy in the center of Venice with polite stuff. We did a quick covid test for air travel, stood in line for 40 minutes then we were asked to send the result by mail or print? We chose to print, we had to wait another 1 hour and the test was ready. It’s possible to pay by card, the price is 22€ for one.

name: Alesja Rusaka
review:
Antigen test with sertificate for the flight.
Very good experience with quick covid test.
Quick, not hurts, one of the CHEAPEST in the area. 15€ per person incl sertificate. Really a lot of people comes there for a test, so they try to make good, quick service. Good stuff.

name: Martha Martorello
review: I just called from the US to schedule an Antigen test that I need for a cruise and was helped by the nicest woman on the phone who scheduled an appt for me.  Her English was fine, thankfully, because I have no Italian.  She gave me the address and the directions from Rinalto Bridge. I can't wait to thank her in person!!

name: Amy Navejas
review: The staff were so rude.  They did provide a service and had a long line, but they were very rude to customers.  A little courtesy could go a long way.  If we had other options we would have gone elsewhere.

name: GABRIELLA DISTEFANO
review: Very helpful with what I was looking for

name: Oscar Balint
review: Great pharmacy with amazing staff, although long queue to get Covid test for son.

name: Matthew Abbott
review: A great place!

name: claudia ionescu
review: ok

name: Shadow Tours
review: I had a prescription from the hospital and the pharmacy didn’t have stock. I had a fractured vertebrae and walking was difficult. Instead of simply telling me that the drug was in’s stock at another branch, the owner actually went to the other branch and collected it for me. Fantastic service from lovely people.

name: Ben Hunter
review:
€5 for 20x 500mg capsules of Paracetamol, surly this is profiteering?
In the UK, anywhere this would be about £0.50p
I’ll happily change this review to 5*s if I’m wrong & €5 is the going rate in all of Italy?

name: シベリアのSiberia
review:
Kind and polite service.
Reliable.

name: Alice Costa
review:
Personale scortese. Sono andata in farmacia per acquistare kinesiotape per mia nipote che si era fatto una distorsione della caviglia. Ho chiesto se mi potevano prestare un paio di forbici per tagliare il tape ma mi hanno detto di no!!!
È semplicemente vergognoso, queste signore sono farmacista?? Dov'è l'aiuto alla persona??? Dov'è l'empatia??? Atteggiamento proprio non professionale..
Sottolineo che il bar accanto ci hanno accudito con forbici e ghiaccio!!

name: Soichiro Ito
review: つたない英語で、観光客相手でもきちんと話を聞いてくれて、適切な薬を教えてくれました。

name: Giancarlo De Marco
review: Mia moglie stamane è stata servita da una dottoressa scortese, che non ha detto né buongiorno né arrivederci, che ha quasi "buttato" sul banco il prodotto omeopatico che era stato richiesto. Esperienza molto trieste.

name: Irene Pizzoccaro Magalios
review: Professionali e gentilissimi nei consigli e nelle indicazioni, forniti delle migliori marche, velocissimi nel procurare i prodotti ordinati: è la mia farmacia di riferimento in città.

name: 박민규
review:
너무 친절하십니다!
제가 설명을 잘 못했는데도 계속 소통해주시려고 노력해주시고 좋은 처방을 해주셨어요

감사합니다

name: M (TOHMary)
review: Small pharmacy - the guy is friendly but beware if you are a tourist. Blister plasters €8+ and a simple textile plaster that would cost €1.50 or less he tried to sell at €5+. We found a small supermarket that sold the same  for €2. you expect some extra cost but not extortion.

name: Paolo Ragazzi
review: Actually the magic was a (not authenticated yet) Banksy piece appeared the night before last Friday. Enjoy

name: Ashley Jefferson
review: Wonderful market in the mornings

name: Gonzalo
review: Good service.

name: Simone Vianello
review:
Ottima farmacia, sempre fornitissima 💖
Personale qualificato e titolare assolutamente competente

name: Natalia Fracchiolla
review: Siamo un gruppo di 4 ragazze e siamo entrate in farmacia cercando una soluzione per delle ustioni solari verso le 13:40 del 30 luglio. Siamo state accolte in maniera competente e professionale. La farmacista che ci ha servito si è subito preoccupata e dopo averci fatto una diagnosi attenta e precisa ci ha consigliato una crema che ci ha procurato immediato sollievo e ha reso il nostro soggiorno a Venezia meraviglioso. Signorina farmacista sei stata gentilissima, tvb <3

name: Ottavia
review: Siamo andati per fare i fori ai lobi e ci hanno subito fatto accomodare, la Dottoressa è davvero gentilissima e bravissima!

name: Филипп Розуменко
review:
Біля аптеки є термінал з продажу презервативів який працює 24/7.
Рекомендую власникам якусь відмітку з приводу цього зробити у Гугл картах😏😏😏

name: South Florida Living Vera Team
review: Great place if you need a pharmacy for any reasons. Went there at 1:30-2am because my husband had a fever. Ring the bell and the person spoke in the intercom. Then he opens a mini passage to ask what was needed and gave us medicine and charged us no more than $5.00. Highly recommend.

name: Edwin Liem
review: Need to buy emergency medicine during odd hours in Venezia, this is the Pharmacy to go. Just ring the bell on the left hand side of the door. The attendant will open a small window and ask what medication you need. He speaks good English.

name: Kanaga Kumanan
review:
We waited politely ( from U.K ) for about 5 mins to be served while the previous customer on the counter was chatting to the server, both customer & the serving person knew we were  politically waiting ( only customers waiting)… still they carried on without any courtesy, may be because we were  Asians ?
Or is  it the local culture… felt mis treated

name: Ian Johnstone
review: Got the lot, very helpful

name: Jessica Miller Sellers
review: Very kind and helpful -- also very patient as I tried to explain what I needed when I only knew the US brand name.

name: Christopher Shepherd
review: An amazing Farmacia. My wife and I needed to get Covid tested to return to the U.S. and they had plenty of availability for us, the test was quick, and we got the results back in minutes. The best $22 per test covid test experience we've ever had.

name: Joel Byman
review: Wonderful service. Spoke english. Helped us get our covid-19 tests for travel for much cheaper than alternatives.

name: Victor Li
review: Hi, we are from Canada. We need to get a covid antigen test done in September for boarding a cruise . Can we just walk in and get tested or do we need to make an appointment before we drop by?

name: Alan Salisbury
review: Exorbitant 😃 don’t buy anything from here that you can get from a supermarket deodorant, toothpaste, face wipes, etc.  UPDATE: we found the exact same products we bought here for a quarter of the price in a nearby supermarket.  We tried to ask the lady working whether this would be possible and she said no :)

name: Katherine I
review: They really helped my young son when he had an earache while on holiday. Was relieved to find knowledgeable pharmacists who could help while we were away from home

name: T Butler
review: This pharmacy is brilliant! Everyone is so helpful and kind: even if you only speak a handful of words of Italian, which is my case, they are so nice and patient, and help in any way they can. The pharmacy is really well stocked. Campo dei Frari in Venice is incredibly fortunate to have so many wonderful shops, including this lovely pharmacy. Recommend very highly.

name: Andrew
review:
Extortionate price for 10 ibuprofen capsules.
Caveat emptor as the ancestors of the locals once said.

name: Ririko Koido
review: The store clerk was very kind, listened carefully to my English, and handed me the best one. Grazie mille!

name: Michael Lemaitre
review: Excellent service, speaks English well enough to understand us with a little google translate assistance.

name: Deven Benavides
review: Open until 8. Friendly and kind to english speakers

name: ELLE
review:
Sono venuto a Venezia e mi sono fatto molto male, ma grazie all'insegnante molto gentile, ho comprato le medicine di cui avevo bisogno, grazie!

나는 베니스에 와서 다쳐서 매우 아팠지만, 매우 친절한 선생님 덕분에 필요한 약을 샀어, 고마워!

name: S SB
review: The Marvis Toothpastes are a rip off! Nearly triple the price for the Classic Mint vs Despar. Do your research before buying. Money doesn’t grow on trees.

name: Katharine Newton
review: Very helpful with an ailment. Thank you

name: Paul Dahlke
review: Horrible prices

name: Stacy Howell Robello
review: Very helpful of my needs. Spoke very good English.

name: Diego Bernardini
review: Es hat alles, ausser Freundlichkeit des Personals. Das kann man zwar verstehen, dass irgendwann die Masse des Tourismus an der Freundlichkeit nagt. Aber dann hat man vielleicht auch einfach den falschen Job in einer der schönsten Städte der Welt. Aber wenn man etwas als eine Apotheke braucht, ist das eine Adresse.

name: Gabriella Amadio
review: Super gentili e competenti. Non ti vogliono vendere il superfluo o l'inutile solo per guadagnare ma ti ascoltano e ti sanno aiutare anche nelle piccole domande quotidiane.

name: mini park
review: 급하게 렌즈 세척액 보존액이 필요해서 갔었어요. 약사님이 영어로 친절하게 설명해주셔서 빠르게 구매 가능했습니다.

name: Ralf Reinstädtler
review: Fachkundiges Personal gute Beratung und große Auswahl.

name: Gary Blum
review: They were great got stuck in Italy and they went out of the way to fill all my perceptions before I ran out and they spoke English which helped a lot!!!!

name: John Cetra
review: There is no question that this particular pharmacy may have higher prices. Just look at who their neighbors are? My son was not feeling well- developing symptoms of a cold. We went in and the  staff recommended a couple of remedies which we purchased and it helped my son’s symptoms tremendously. So I say Grazie!! For less expensive pharmacies you can keep walking farther away from Sam Marco.

name: Leo Kwon
review: Unfortunately, I didn't see this comment, so I suffered as well. I bought it expensively and asked for a refund in 3 minutes, but it was rejected. This is truly the worst pharmacy in Italy

name: Dimitri Steinel
review:
I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience here. While the staff was helpful in recommending (or actually convincing) products for our daughter, I was shocked to discover that they charged us twice the price compared to other pharmacies.
It's disheartening that such practices are allowed, and I feel taken advantage of as a customer. I would strongly advise others to be cautious when shopping at this pharmacy to avoid overpaying for essential products.

name: Daniel Moneta
review: Got there Sunday aft to find no less than three signs posted to indicate they should be open. They're not. No one answering the doorbell. With only two pharmacies open in the whole city on Sunday (so most people showing up here have an urgent need, and a bunch showed up), that's pretty unfortunate. Maybe they went for a late lunch but no way to tell.

name: Paul Dunand
review: Not only they sold us a cream that doesn't work without explanation but my change should have been 12.10 and she only gave me 12 pretending she doesn't have change. Don't go there.

name: Calum Brown
review: Charging €6 for a little box of paracetamol which cost around 20 cent in the UK. Ridiculous prices.

name: Darren Matthias
review: Really local to our hotel. They could speak English which made life easier.

name: Sofija Ekkert
review: Elegant, atmospheric, stuff speaks English, attentive. I wasn’t happy with offered meds, explained that I need sth different, a pharmacist immediately found the alternative. Too expensive though, I paid 20€ for Vit C 1g and ActiGrip (sth like teraflu or gripex).

name: Moritz
review:
A beautiful pharmacy from 1576… They know what they’re doing.

Make sure to check out the sculptures inside.

Very nice staff and a great selection of products that aren’t limited to medicines.

***************

👋🏻 Hey fellow Google Maps friend, If you also enjoyed your experience at Farmacia San Polo in Venezia, do let me know by giving this review a thumbs up 👍🏆 Thank you 🙏

name: Julia Zolotareva
review:
Bought most amazing body cream produced by this pharmacy - Crema Corpo All'Olio di Argan - light, easily absorbed, non sticky and at the same time deeply moisturizing. Wish it lasted forever!

The shop itself is very charming too!

name: Nick Dendy
review: The very helpful staff prescribed some foam for my stiff neck which really helped ease my pain and let me enjoy my trip to Venice. Grazie Mille.

name: John Mclocklin
review: Large variety of necessities helpful professionals on the staff tastefully decorated

name: shalom kleiman
review: Open on Sunday, very nice staff.

name: Jessica Kimbrell
review: Wonderful pharmacists!!

name: Thabet Azzawi
review: Very friendly

name: David Thomas
review: Beware that they may not be open. They do not have posted hours, and close at irregular times other than lunch hour. If you're making a long walk, be aware they may not be open when you get there. Another pharmacy near by was excellent to deal with.

name: Catalin Alexandrescu
review: Add hours we come here 2km and closed….

name: J VB
review: This place does not exist where the map shows. 🤷🏼‍♂️

name: Alex Conway
review: Very rude owner swore at me in Italian. Avoid this pharmacy.

name: Attilio Nisco
review:
Desidero ringraziarvi sinceramente per la disponibilità e l’assistenza ricevuta durante la mia recente vacanza nella vostra zona. Ho avuto un’improvvisa infezione al mento e grazie ai vostri consigli e alla vostra prontezza, sono riuscito a evitare complicazioni e a guarire presto.

La vostra professionalità e gentilezza hanno fatto davvero la differenza. Grazie di cuore per l’aiuto.

Un caro saluto.

name: Romina Carraro
review: Gentili e competenti

name: Syed raquibul Haque
review:
Ciao sono Michele...e vostro servizio e ottimi
Mi piace molto

name: Loredana Tondelli
review: gentili, professionali e fornitissimi. grazie

name: Arvin Dalnay
review: Staff (lady) was very nice and helpful. She was able to fill a prescription that she had to order. We were able to pick up the next day but decided to pick up on the next work day (Monday).  Grazie!

name: Official AL-X
review: Extremely overpriced with terrible service. The staff was incredibly rude, huffing and puffing before storming off when we declined to pay due to the high prices.

name: Anastasia B
review:
They do rapid COVID testing for 25€. After you pay you go to the testing location nearby, then wait for result and come back to the pharmacy. That’s where you get the printed result and Green Pass.
Special thanks to staff, they’re helpful and friendly and did their best so that we got the Green Pass as soon as possible.

name: Olga Birg
review: The person made a mistake on our covid tests for which we paid and waited for 3 hours, we nearly missed our flights and had to retake the test in the airport. Absolute incompetence!

name: Sergey S
review: FFFP2 mask costs 2 EUR, but don't accept card to buy it - only cash.

name: John Mclocklin
review: Beautiful, clean,  knowledgeable professionals has every thing you need

name: N Ugu
review: they are very helpful!!

name: Riccardo Frattini
review: Che bella scoperta! La farmacia ha cambiato gestione e si vede: accogliente, personale gentilissimo e sempre pronto a dare ottimi consigli!

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Jena Santa Anna
review: My mom got sick while we were traveling from the US. We were emailed a prescription from a virtual doctor's visit and the pharmacy was able to help us. The pharmacist was so kind and helpful as we navigated the language barrier and being fish out of water. Thank you!!

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Frederic Genk
review: Very friendly staff helped with all my questions and even when I bought something wrong I could immediately buy the right thing with also the money difference back.

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Effie Dali
review: Excellent customer service, really kind and helpful staff! They helped me with everything i needed and they speak English. I fully recommend it!!

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Armored Saint
review: Best dam 400 MG ibuprofen iv had since I was a teenager!

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Maria
review: Excellent seevice! Very kind staff, explained everything to me and helped me.

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Damian J L
review: great

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: Chiara Perseghetti
review: Good preparation and fast service

place_title: Farmacia Alla Croce di Malta - D.ssa Patrini
name: lakpa
review: excellent service. spoke english

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Gilles L
review:
The person was polite, but did an error with the billing process. I was charged 70€ on my debit card, despite the bill of 61,80€. It happened on the 02/08/2024 at 12:17 pm.

After complaining and providing my bank account details I finally got a refund 3 weeks later but the overall experience was not good.

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: J Naoki
review: We were very happy coming here. We took Covid tests so to be cleared back to the USA. We got in the same day--walk-in appointments. I do find my fellow Americans do not even try to say please and thank you and hello in Italian while in Venice and then complain about rudeness. 15 Euros per test. The bank nearby, the Volksbank, does not charge ATM fees! A wonderful discovery while visiting this pharmacy. Happy Travels!

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Aaron Gray
review:
Very rude and unfriendly staff to me as a tourist.  I tried to get CV rapid test and staff would not help me or provide information to help.

The woman at the pharmacy told me to go away, it was not possible for me, even though they were doing the tests outside.

No information or website to make an appointment, no kindness or patience from staff towards me.  I felt very disrespected by the staff here.

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Arctic winter
review:
Really rude owner
We kindly asked if the pharmacy was open because even though the water level was really high many shops were open. He answered really rude and asked what we were thinking even asking. I get that his situation was probably really bad but that’s not a reason to talkback like that.

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Julie Helene Ludmann
review: I can only recommend this pharmacy in Venise. I was looking for something for my baby and I visited 4 others before finding them. Very helpful and they spEak English and French

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Mario Mandri
review: Very nice service and professional

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Zhixuan Wang
review:
discriminazione razziale！
racial discrimination！
The pharmacists inside are very rude and they refuse selling to asian customers!!!

place_title: Farmacia alla Fama Dott. Ssa Laura Perissinotto
name: Abdullah Alenezi
review: Staff were very sweet

name: James Diekman
review:
Don’t put 24hr on google when it isn’t, even if the door is closed. There’s no sign saying to ring or knock. I knocked anyway….crickets.. nothing..

utterly frustrating trekking 30 mins through Venice with a crying toddler only to find this closed 🤦🏻‍♂️

name: Danny mills
review:
I came away without my medication..
Suddenly, I found myself without a 20mg injection of methotrexate.
This chemist promptly resolved the issue and in no time at all, I was on my way with sufficient meds to last the rest of my 3 week trip.
Speaks perfect English.

name: Iulian Ciomag
review: Got to this place early in the morning (5:10 AM). The guy speaks English but didn't felt like serving me at all. In the end I've got charged 7.50 EUR as night tax.

name: Mark Batley
review: Wonderful. Great advice, phoned a doctor for us, and walked us round to the doctor’s when my daughter was unwell. So caring and thoughtful. Thank you x

name: Мария Белева
review: At 21:30 in was closed... This working time is not accurate.

name: pizza time
review: Open on google but place is closed

name: Lorenzo Cinotti
review: Competenti, sempre gentilissimi e disponibili.

name: Norma Jane
review: Mi sento sempre presa sul serio . Sono persone preparate. GENTILEZZA assoluta. Sempre con il sorriso. Alla mano. Svelti. Presenti. E buoni consiglieri. Sono simpaticissimi.

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Brian Rivera
review: I visited Venice between Aug 13-15 with my elderly mom.  My mom started having trouble walking, and I was in desperate search for a wheelchair. After asking around, they advised me to search in a pharmacy. I went to one pharmacy, and they advised me to try Pharmacy di Mondo. I came here, and I was welcomed very friendly. I was so grateful to know they did have a wheelchair available for rent for me. It was a blessing! Thank you so much! This wheelchair made my trip so much easier for my mom. Again, thank you!

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Meher H
review:
The worst! Please dont go here.
I requested a refund on an alternative product they sold to me - the main person, a man, shook his head and proceeded to throw the money at me.
Very very very rude.

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Yvonne Batty
review: Staff was really friendly and helped me get what I needed 👌

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Denis Dorofeev
review: Stopped to buy Aqua di Sirmione. Helpful staff. English speaking

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Yelena b
review: From what I understand, this pharmacy is open 24 hours. After hours, it's for emergencies only, but there was another customer already there, so he let us in. Great customer service.

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Ákos Ligeti
review: The pharmacist was very kind and helpful!

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Rachel Scott
review: Wonderful staff walked in after being unable to find a doctors. Lovely and caring staff even though they were about to close. Could not say about word about them. Thank you!!!!

place_title: Old Pharmacy In The World - The Speziere Of Venice
name: Wojciech Antonowicz
review: Pharmacist with very good english, kind and helpful.

name: Elizabeth Sutton
review: English speaking pharmacist. Was very helpful and considerate. Friendly staff who took the time to make sure we had what we needed. It’s not great to be sick when travelling and they were very caring and considerate.

name: Wilfred Spykerman
review:
Great service. Ordered my dymista as mine unfortunately dropped and broke to pieces.

Ordered late in the evening and it arrived early morn today as promised. Glad i walked all the way here to find it.

Pharmacist has a beautiful smile too 😊

name: Liam Williams
review:
Went in for a tiramisu and it was absolutely delicious!

I also had a pistachio cookie 💚

name: Brian Clancy O'Durnin
review:
Thieves
They just charged me €11.45 for a box of 10 ibuprofen tablets. Ridiculous. Don't buy here

name: Mark Clyburn
review: A small local pharmacy with very friendly and knowledgeable service. The woman who served me spoke great english (I tried my best with broken Italian) and was super friendly and helpful. Also the price for the meds I bought were super fair. Highly recommended.

name: CB’s ma
review: Pharmacist was extremely helpful and courteous. We needed a rapid covid test and didn’t have an appointment, but she took us in anyways. To those who say that they are not customer centric, I can understand why. In the brief time we were in the pharmacy we observed such rude and arrogant behavior by some fellow tourists. Possibly they have their guard up. Think about it?! I think often times it is a quid pro quo, you get what you give. We were courteous and polite, they were accommodating and attentive. I love my Venetians!

name: V C
review: Not particularly friendly to tourists. Charged 8 euros for 30 paracetamol tablets.

name: Roger Das
review:
Hello

We purchased over $150 Euros in your store last Wednesday and we received rude service from your staff

I suggest that you train your staff to be polite to customers and not yell at them.

I wish you success in the future, but as a consumer, your business will fail due to your current staff, especially the blonde with a big mouth. I have never received such poor service on a vacation like that of your business.

We have been fortunate to visit Venice twice in two years and will not accept the behaviour.

“The customer is always right” is a motto that you should pay attention to. Also, I would recommend teaching your staff to be more empathetic

I apologize for not writing this in Italian, but I hope you take something away from this

name: Marizanne Van Dyk
review: Went here to get medicine for a cold. When I told them I am a doctor and that I am looking for a specific medicine, the pharmacist went to the other pharmacist and laughed about how I am doctor. No empathy or respect was displayed.

name: sam_venice
review: Sono passato dalla questa farmacia per chiedere aiuto per recuperare il codice AUTHCODE per il mio Green Pass, come che dopo fatto la terza dose e non ho ricevuto nessun SMS da parte di Min Salute. Purtroppo non mi hanno aiutato sia la signora giovane che quella meno giovane chi lavorava a quelli orari nella farmacia. Non volevano nemmeno sentire cosa stavo dicendo/chiedendo ! Solo che mi hanno chiesto Codice Fiscale e dopo che mi fanno una stampa dal Green Pass, mentre mi salutano mi dicono “più dì questo non sappiamo come fare” 😐 (ma mi scusi se nn sapete fare più dì questo allora cercato un altro occupazione, alla farmacia vengono parte maggiore anziani (che probabilmente non sono capaci con la nuova tecnologia) e chi è malato! Come che non sai come fare? Tu non sai come fare il tuo lavoro e ancora sei al banco della farmacia) Come che abito a vicinissimo dalla questa farmacia mi sono messo un attimo su Google a studiare semplicemente “Come si po recuperare AUTHCODE” e l’ho fatto da solo con il mio telefonino in meno di un minuto! Sorry non c’era opzione dì Zero stelle che siete meriti per forza vi lasci una stella

name: Claudia Holzinger
review: Wir waren dort, weil wir Schmerzmittel benötigt haben, aber nicht alles Wirkstoffe ok sind. Der Apotheker war sehr geduldig und freundlich um das richtige Mittel zu finden.

name: Lu Pe (louwanda58)
review: Gelangweilte Apothekerin, die nicht beraten konnte oder wollte und mir trotz offensichtlicher Erkältung beim Kauf eines Nasensprays keine Packung Papiertaschentücher gönnte

name: frank jarchow
review: Hatte zu wenig Zuckerspritzen mitgenommen und brauchte dringend ein Rezept dafür. Hier wurde mir unbürokratisch sofort geholfen. Nochmals vielen Dank !

name: Karla Cordoba
review: Te dan la medicina que necesitas aunque no hables italiano

name: Leana Aa
review: Very helpful. Service with a smile.

name: Sophia Lee
review: This gentle old man is better than any doctor in Venice. I went to hospital for my skin problem, waited for 2 hours for nothing, paid 100euro for nothing. I didn’t get better at all, but here this gentle old man gave me new medicine 12euro, and I got all better!!! Thank you very much.

name: Katy Han
review: Very kind and knowledgeable!

name: Riccardo Bortolanza
review: “La Farmacia dell’orso è davvero un punto di riferimento. Personale sempre disponibile, gentile e molto preparato: sanno consigliare con professionalità e mettono a proprio agio. L’ambiente è ordinato, pulito e ben fornito, con una vasta scelta di prodotti non solo farmaceutici ma anche per la cura della persona. Ogni volta che ho avuto bisogno ho trovato risposte chiare e un aiuto concreto. Una farmacia di fiducia che consiglio a tutti!”

name: Xiru Sun
review:
Sono rimasta delusa da questa farmacia.
La giovane commessa era impegnata a chiacchierare con l’altra persona all’interno e, solo dopo alcuni minuti, si è avvicinata per consigliarmi un prodotto in modo piuttosto sbrigativo e poco attento.
Una volta acquistato, ho scoperto che lo stesso prodotto costava la metà in altre farmacie.

name: Sandrele Reis
review: Atendente muito gentil e atencioso. Estava machucada e me deu espaço para colocar os curativos que havia comprado com eles por um preço justo. Ficamos gratos e indicamos!

name: GELZIY
review: Migliore farmacia a Venezia. Le dottoresse sono tutte carinissime e super preparate ,un osservazione particolare a Ema che è eccezionale. Grazie per il vostro servizio

name: Khira Ives
review:
Resto sbagliato. Controllate immediatamente i soldi che vi restituiscono.
Avevamo bisogno urgentemente di un medicinale, la farmacia a cui andiamo di solito era già chiusa, perciò siamo andati a questa.
Una volta preso quello che ci serviva siamo tornati subito a casa, mettendo il resto e il medicinale nella tasca interna del cappotto. Dopo quando sono andata a tirare fuori il resto con lo scontrino, mi sono accorta che non ci hanno dato il resto completo.
Inoltre la signora che ci ha serviti era alquanto scortese.

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Penny Ford
review: We specifically made an appointment for a rapid Covid test on Monday 18 April at 5 pm, but the pharmacy was not open. Even though they told us to be there at 5 pm! An unnecessary delay in an important obstacle for us.

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Matthias Leonhardt
review: top

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Anna Purna Nativo
review: Sono tutte persone molto cordiali, gentili, e professionali, ti ascoltano e ti aiutano.

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: paolo grimaldi marzotto
review: I Dottori in Farmacologia che gestiscono questa attività oltre ad essere notevolmente preparati sono anche molto cortesi e disponibili

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: vilma
review: La mia è l’esperienza di una vita. Posso solo ringraziare Il dott. Enrico la moglie Renata, i figli e tutti gli altri operatori, per la loro professionalità, serietà, disponibilità, accoglienza…mai una volta, in più di trent’anni, ho avuto l’impressione di non essere assistita!! Grandi tutti e a tutti il mio rispetto e il mio affetto!!!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Giulia Orlando
review: Persone molto preparate e umane, mi hanno seguita in un piccolo problema sanitario dandomi tutti i consigli possibili. Grazie veramente!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Maria Luisa Badin
review: La migliore! Super gentili e disponibili, cordialità e professionalità li contraddistinguono! Faccio volentieri il doppio della strada pur avendo una farmacia sotto casa!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Simona M.
review: Una farmacia di quartiere impeccabile. Personale gentilissimo e premuroso. Molto competenti e professionali, ma con quel tocco di familiarità che trovo ormai una rarità.

name: Joan Skelton Smith
review: My thanks to the female clerk who recommended the health clinic but I was a bit annoyed by the male clerk who rather than selling me the normal sterile compress which I asked for ("like they used at the hospital") sold me a box of polyester and viscose compresses which are far thinner and to my mind not adequate for eye compresses. He seemed in a rush 😢and not particularly sympathetic but at least he did have the ointment which the hospital had prescribed.

name: Herbert Lust
review: Excellent service. Very professional. They speak English

name: Francesca Bianchi
review:
Buongiorno, non lascio mai recensioni perché onestamente mi pare sempre una cosa un po' vigliacca, mi chiedo sempre chi recensisce il recensore. Spiace leggere quello che scrivono altre persone, pur non avendo un rapporto di stretta conoscenza con i gestori della Farmacia e i suoi lavoratori, ho sempre trovato, come spesso accade nei posti di lavoro, persone attente alle esigenze del pubblico e mai pienamente ripagate dalla maleducazione e da giudizi così serrati!
Capisco perché a volte si arriva stanchi la sera.
Auguro un buon lavoro ai colleghi della farmacia e a tutti coloro che si trovano ad operare nel pubblico in tempi in cui generalmente, mi pare, molto spesso si sia solo molto pronti a pretendere, ma a mettersi in gioco e  a dare  poi così poco...

name: raffa
review: Capisco chiudano alle 19.30 e abbiano voglia di tornare a casa come tutti, però alle 19.27 non mi hanno fatto entrare, avevo un'urgenza, alla fin fine non vendono cartoline ma farmaci che possono essere essenziali.  Mi sono quindi rivolta alla parafarmacia vicino ai battelli,  a dottoressa nonostante fossero le 19.30 passate mi ha assistita e consigliata.

name: nicoletta sorato
review: Io e mio marito siamo andati a ritirare dei farmaci nella farmacia del gran viale a Lido ci ha seguiti il dottor Norberto, gentilissimo ,disponibile e molto professionale ! Mi sono complimentata con lui ma è giusto mettere anche una buona recensione quando merita.

name: Valentina Pettinelli
review: Da anni siamo clienti io e mia madreanziana.Il personale e' sempre molto gentile.Con alcuni siamo in amicizia.Ultimente e'subentrato del personale arrogante,e villano.Stendiamo un velo pietoso!Se necessario cambiero'

name: Simone Vianello
review:
se cercate qualcosa, sappiate che 9 su 10 non la troverete mai!
Farmacia grande ma davvero poco fornita. Se hai bisogno di qualcosa a farmacia chiusa ancora peggio. A due ore dalla chiusura (e c’è il weekend), distributore quasi completamente vuoto. Pessimi
Unico plauso va al dottor Farinella, bravo, competente e sa sempre dare degli ottimi consigli 🙌🏻

name: Marina Migliarini
review: Personale poco adatto dietro un banco di una farmacie  irritanti proprio!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Penny Ford
review: We specifically made an appointment for a rapid Covid test on Monday 18 April at 5 pm, but the pharmacy was not open. Even though they told us to be there at 5 pm! An unnecessary delay in an important obstacle for us.

name: Matthias Leonhardt
review: top

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Anna Purna Nativo
review: Sono tutte persone molto cordiali, gentili, e professionali, ti ascoltano e ti aiutano.

review: I Dottori in Farmacologia che gestiscono questa attività oltre ad essere notevolmente preparati sono anche molto cortesi e disponibili

review: La mia è l’esperienza di una vita. Posso solo ringraziare Il dott. Enrico la moglie Renata, i figli e tutti gli altri operatori, per la loro professionalità, serietà, disponibilità, accoglienza…mai una volta, in più di trent’anni, ho avuto l’impressione di non essere assistita!! Grandi tutti e a tutti il mio rispetto e il mio affetto!!!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Giulia Orlando
review: Persone molto preparate e umane, mi hanno seguita in un piccolo problema sanitario dandomi tutti i consigli possibili. Grazie veramente!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Maria Luisa Badin
review: La migliore! Super gentili e disponibili, cordialità e professionalità li contraddistinguono! Faccio volentieri il doppio della strada pur avendo una farmacia sotto casa!

place_title: Farmacia Ai Santi Cosma E Damiano
name: Simona M.
review: Una farmacia di quartiere impeccabile. Personale gentilissimo e premuroso. Molto competenti e professionali, ma con quel tocco di familiarità che trovo ormai una rarità.

name: EricBou
review: Very helpful people: they gave us very helpful advises and allowed us to prevent health problems!

name: Surf Writer
review: È la mia farmacia preferita! Il personale è sempre gentile e disponibile. Se non hanno qualcosa lo ordinano sempre velocemente. Sono davvero bravi a spiegarmi e ad aiutarmi a capire di cosa ho bisogno! La dottoressa Laura è fantastica!

name: luca favaron
review: Raro trovare, come qui, un'equipe di tre persone composta interamente da maleducati. Non parlo di un singolo episodio: sono un residente e ho frequentato più volte l'esercizio, prima di passare alle numerose altre farmacie della zona, gestite da persone più affabili.

name: Elisabetta Trabucco
review: Personale estremamente gentile e molto disponibile. La dottoressa è la mia preferita ❤️

name: Giulia Valeri
review: Sono stata in questa farmacia e ho trovato personale competente e gentile , in particolare la dottoressa Laura.

name: Anna Lin
review: 态度差 找钱有问题

name: Monsieur Lupin
review: Sempre gentili veloci ed efficienti

name: mario tagliapietra
review: Grande disponibilità e conoscenza

name: Dani Chmeis
review:
I wanted to get an appointment for a pcr test in advance for a planned vacation in Venice.

I contacted this pharmacy by email; I would like to thank Ludovica for her reactivity, her professionalism to have accompanied us in making the appointment as well as the ease of remote payment.
Unfortunately we could not travel due to an unforeseen event, we asked if a refund was possible and we received it within 48 hours!

I recommend this pharmacy for any medical advice and support !

name: Mark Risinger
review: We had to do rapid covid tests for all nine members of our school group on the day before our return to the US - on very short notice, Ludovica gave us the necessary paperwork, processed it immediately, and administered our tests within two hours after I first called.  She totally saved our last day in Venice!  A real joy to find such a friendly, helpful, professional resource.

name: Richard Macy
review: I accidentally left my insulin in the refrigerator in the hotel previous to coming to Venice. After panicking a bit, headed over to this Farmacia. They  helped me get insulin with no fuss. They literally saved my life.

name: John Chase
review: Very professional and efficient - Came to our hotel to give us a COVID Test - The test was done when requested and the results were available in less than 12 hours - Very well done - Three weeks after we got home, we realized we needed a copy of the test results for an insurance claim - We emailed the pharmacy and they quickly sent us a copy - Very responsive.

name: Tenasfa S
review: Good prices compared to other farmacies in Venice, the staff is very kind and helpful. Definitely my go to farmacy as long as I live in Venice

name: Christopher Marwood
review: Helped us organise antigen tests for journey home - super helpful and kind, highly recommended

name: Juno
review: Very amicable and enthusiastic. Both in English and Italian.

name: Alejandro Díaz Álvarez
review:
No vayas a partir de las 21h. Es 24h pero te cobran tasa nocturna. Sinvergüenzas
18 euros un aciclovir en crema de 2g.

place_title: Farmacia due ombrelli dr Francesco ranaboldo
name: Riccardo Brotto
Bogdan Moisuc
review: Great service!

name: Erik Hagen Nymoen
review: Slowest employees I’ve ever witnessed

name: thierry planchon
review: very nice people

name: Giovanni di Capua
review: Dipende da chi vieni servito. La prima volta che sono entrato, sono stato servito da una ragazza giovane che mi ha consigliato un prodotto che mi ha causato una brutta irritazione nonostante io abbia seguito le indicazioni alla lettera... Ho dovuto rivolgermi ad un'altra farmacia per risolvere il problema (ci sono volute circa due settimane). L'ultima volta invece mi ha servito una signora molto gentile e disponibile che mi ha informato bene sui medicinali che stavo acquistando, quindi bene.

name: Daniela Zennaro
review:
Ottima FARMACIA che continua ad avere negli anni il favorevole riscontro degli utenti. Ben gestita e diretta da personale attento e professionale, é da sempre un punto di  riferimento per i Veneziani della zona, ma anche per i numerosi turisti che transitano lungo la trafficata Via Garibaldi
Gestita egregiamente per lunghi anni dal padre, ormai da decenni la figlia continua l’opera di valida professionalità e competenza. .

name: Giorgio Ravagnan
review: Ottimo giudizio. Grande competenza professionale. Molto disponibili, gentili e attenti alle problematiche presentate ed alle possibili soluzioni mediche.

name: Cristiano Patrese
review: Antica farmacia veneziana ottimamente fornita anche di numerosi prodotti non strettamente farmaceutici. Servizio molto celere, estremamente attento e competente da parte di farmacisti molto cordiali e disponibili.

name: Luciana Bruno
review: Professionalità, cortesia, efficienza, disponibilità caratterizzano da sempre questa farmacia, in cui ricevi attenzione e consigli giusti.

name: Nicole Goff
review: We stopped by on the off chance they would have some super glue as my shoe was stepped on a d the sole ripped halfway off. They didn't have any but the lady behind the counter was very nice and even gave us directions to a place they did have some. The shop itself was clean and well organized and had a nice selection of medicine, beauty products, and misc items.

name: Daniella Martin
review: Very helpful, kind and courteous staff!  We were visiting Murano for a few days and my son got a very bad soar throat. We went in hoping to get help as we weren’t sure if it was strep.  They directed us to go see a doctor who’s clinic was 5 minutes walking distance away.  The doctor turned out to be a wonderful person who gave us a prescription that we filled at the pharmacy. All went very smoothly and we got the help we needed.

name: Max Baum
review: Went in looking for contact lens solution and they delivered for a reasonable price. Staff was very helpful and easy to communicate with. The store seemed very well stocked. I would definitely go back if I needed pharmacy services again.

name: Ann Seanor (AnnLisa)
review: Husband and I are tested positive for Covid, choosing to isolate at the Hyatt Centric.  I needed additional medication to see me through this isolation and Frederika was wonderfully helpful in my purchasing medications.  Thank you so much for your assistance

name: stefan speyer
review:
A little bit like Michelangelo Antonioni - NEOREALISMO

Very interesting location at Murano to take photographs. Go to the adjacent bridge and try to get the "curve" of the buildings on your photographs. Two old ladies were waiting for the opening of the Farmacia. What an atmosphere !

name: Viktoriia Strekalovskaia
review: 10,90 € for 12 ibuprofen tablets 🤔

name: Ευα «Hi»
review: Κάθε χρόνο τον Ιούλιο ερχόμαστε Βενετία και Μουράνο και ερχόμαστε σε αυτό το φαρμακείο για να πάρουμε παπούτσια fitflop σε πολύ καλές τιμές.οι  υπάλληλοι είναι πολύ εξυπηρετικές .φέτος μας πληροφόρησαν ότι δεν θα ξαναφέρουν fitflop δυστυχώς!κρίμα γιατί είναι πολύ ανατομικά παπούτσια.

name: giulia pirrello
review: Prezzi non esposti e offrono solo i prodotti più costosi.

name: SURABHI AGRAWAL
review: Super helpful and compassionate. I was recently in Venice when I fell on the street and injured my knee. I walked in the pharmacy for help. Guess what.. they dressed the wound and didn’t even charge me for it. An absolute wonderful gesture. Thank you so much for the help :)

name: Janice Chu
review:
Super helpful if you need to do a rapid covid test for travelling. You pay here first and then walk 5 min to do the actual test. The building is very big and you present your "reservation" to the lady sitting there. The lady at the pharmacy  was super helpful and pointed it out on Google Maps. For 2 people it was 44 Euros. Very trustworthy :)
Thank you for your kindness.

name: charles funk
review: Everyone was very helpful and friendly

name: Maria
review: Thieves. Asked for a PCR test, they charged me me 22 euro for a usual rapid test, even though I had Italian codice fiscale. I will notify the authorities.

name: Gabriela Crowe
review: Professional and fast

name: Fra Via
review:
Sono appena stata a ritirare l'esito del mio test Covid e ho chiesto alla donna dietro al bancone se andava bene per volare all'estero visto che lo avevo fatto solo al naso. Mi ha risposto molto scortesemente "non capisco la domanda " Allanton la vote,  molto, molto rude.
Statele lontano!

name: Miriam Carta
review:
No ieri non ero su skype, ero troppo stanco e alle 21:30 ero già a letto. Per me è molto faticosa situazione... indossare la mascherina da viaggio , mettersi i guanti, lavarsi le mani, e al lavoro togliersi la mascherina da viaggio, spruzzare il disinfettante,lavarsi bene le mani indossare la mascherina da lavoro, infilarsi i guanti da lavoro e lavorare e poi ripetere le operazioni per tornare. si perde un sacco di tempo. Poi se perdi l'autobus devi aspettare mezz'ora, perchè adesso le corse sono poche. In questi giorni c'è un vento pazzesco e le temperature si sono abbassate, per cui aspettare anche 20 minuti che arrivi l'autobus rischi di prendersi una influenza e di questi tempi non è il massimo.

Spero vada meglio la situazione per te

Ciao

name: Vania Todeschini
review: Sono sempre stati molto gentili, a parte il farmacista giovane , molto nervoso e maleducato, mi dispiace lasciare questa recensione per he ero cliente da anni, ma, per una cosa futile hanno innescato una polemica assolutamente inutile

name: Joy
review: Unfortunately, my husband experienced a medical issue while on holiday in Venice. Unsure about what to do, we called in at the local pharmacy to ask their advice. One of the pharmacists assisted us (in excellent English) and by the end of the day we were able to collect some tablets that the pharmacy had ordered for him.  We are so grateful. Thanks for making a stressful day much better.

name: Xara Philpott
review: I'm an British tourist. I was really worried about some insect bites. The Pharmacist I spoke with was brilliant. Knew exactly what to give me. Her English was perfect (much better than my Italian)

name: Andrea Fuentes
review: Walked all the way from San Toma as it shows open for 24 hrs to fund out its closed. Update your timing.

name: M Z
review: Beware of extremely high prices. Nasal spray costs 12€. The most expensive product seems to be sold on purpose. Service is very unfriendly.

name: Sam Samuelyan
review:
when you write 24 hour open and then close, you cause serious situations to arise you irresponsible person.
As a reply to yours, the secondary entrance sign is in Italian. If you know how to reply in English kindly have an english sign as well. And thank you for updating your google hours AFTER my comment was posted.

name: David Bubb
review: Helpful, good stock and even helped with a particular diabetic medication that is difficult to obtain (couldn’t get from 4 other pharmacies) as it needs to be ordered from the hospital. They go the extra mile.

name: Yuriy B
review: One of the few pharmacies that was open on Republic Day when we needed a pharmacy badly. The two staff members were super friendly and helpful. A+

name: Heather Johnson
review: Knowledgeable, professional, and kind. From now on my go-to pharmacy.

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Sandra Spector
review: Ok, efficient, but not super friendly or helpful

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Franziska Scherner
review:
Super Team.
Knowledgable, supportive and enormously caring
(Providing basic cosmetic- and flu care after our luggage did not arrive with us!)

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Ed Goodwin
review: We were in a pinch…needed meds were in a lost bag, one day left in Venice with prospects dimming that bag would catch up to us. Contacted the nice people at Farmacia Della Vecchia and explained our dilemma (in English), the staff went out of their way to help solve our problem and provided us with emergency medications necessary for us to carry on with our vacation.  Nothing but maximum stars for the stars at this pharmacy. 🌟++!

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Todd Crandell
review: It’s very interesting going into pharmacies in other countries. They were professional and helpful. Thank you guys for speaking English

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Kunnika Phirun
review: I got eye-drop for €9.50. Lesson learned: ask how much first before buying anything.

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Jerry
review: purchased MARVIS toothpaste and it was kinda bit expensive.

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Alfredo Mini
review:
Do tre stelle perché il farmacista che mi ha servito è stato gentile, sono entrato per acquistare delle protezioni per vesciche da applicare sul tallone.
Mi ha fatto accomodare in un piccolo stanzino e ho potuto metterle subito in quanto avvertivo molto dolore.
Però non capisco perché il signore al banco non mi abbia chiesto il codice fiscale in quanto queste protezioni antivesciche sono "dispositivo medico" per la detrazione.
Poi ho letto nello scontrino un codice fiscale che non è il mio..... di chi sarà????

place_title: Farmacia Della Vecchia e del Cedro Imperiale
name: Anna Yazykova
review: Очень понравился сервис, была травма ноги с гноем и мужчина посоветовал мазь которую нужно приложить и за ночь она вычистила гной. Хотя перед этим гной был под коркой больше недели. Спасибо за квалифицированную помощь.

name: Bárbara Fenzo F
review: Excellent pharmacy, always offering a warm and caring service. The team truly looks after you with kindness and patience. I especially want to highlight Paola and Roberto, who are wonderful, attentive, and make you feel well cared for. Highly recommended!

name: P. Weber
review:
If you‘re not a person living in Venice they just ignore you - even when you‘re the first person in the row!
Don’t you feel ashamed of how you treat people? And the Italian customers who skip other waiting people in the row should feel ashamed, too.

name: Carole Mullin
review: Pharmacist was very helpful finding us over the counter meds suitable to the illness - despite my poor Italian.

name: B. S.
review: Extremely rude staff and very unwilling to assist. Better to go somewhere else

name: Olivia Macfadden
review: Very helpful!

name: YMA
review: No English support

name: João Paulo Branco
review: Ok

name: Anna
review: Ai turisti né buongiorno né grazie arrivederci, solo musi lunghi. Questo comportamento è stato segnalato anche da altri utenti ma evidentemente non ha esordito alcun cambiamento nonostante le rassicurazioni di presa in carico delle segnalazioni. Faccio anche notare che i turisti a volte ritornano e infatti quando ho avuto di nuovo bisogno di un farmaco sono andata in un'altra farmacia.

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: B. Todi
review: Wonderful lady pharmacist! I had an allergic reaction that became infected... on my face during Carnevale. The pharmacist spoke English was so helpful with medications and with lotions---and sympathetic to my situation, a tourist on holiday who could't go out without a mask. I've spent many weeks in Venice over the past few years and have come to rely on the health professionals in pharmacies.

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Davos Crostoni
review: We were directed to this pharmacy by our hotel, as the pharmacist speaks excellent English. Four weeks into our European adventure my wife had acquired an eye infection and I had a throat infection. The pharmacist provided excellent advice and the perfect medications to speedily resolve our ills. Highly recommended for English speakers!!

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Sana Elwaar
review: As she said when we asked if she knows another one open, « no I am closed » in a really awful way. closed minded to bother understand the question may, ask for another language than English and try to answer like a decent human being. Tip, if we are as closed minded as that we better don’t work in health care…

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Дмитрий Лавров
review: Awful pharmacy. Pharmaceutist is unprofessional. She try to give us no metronidazole as was written in prescription but clothrimazole. Absolutely another medicine

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Nick Greening
review: Great service and advice. Strongly recommend.

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Bo Lovenhjelm
review: Trevlig personal och har vad man förväntar sig, dock är nästan allt bakom disk och personal pratar i bästa fall halvbra engelska så det kan ta en stund att köpa det du vill ha

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Jürgen Kadel
review: Sehr kompetent. Hatte Magenprobleme und wollte was wie Iberogast. Bei zwei Apotheken davor wurde ich wie ein Marsmensch angeschaut. Hier wusste man sofort, was das ist, es hier in Italien nicht gibt und mir wurde was vergleichbares gegeben. Machte alles einen sehr professionellen und kompetenten Eindruck. Und es wurde Englisch gesprochen.

place_title: Farmacia Italo Inglese Galli Dott.ssa D.
name: Blerta B
review: Ci ha pratticamente aperto la porta per mandarci fuori.  Senza parole.

name: Camila Ardila
review: Bought a sunblock. They charged to my card more than the actual price of the product. Only realized this at home when checking my account. They didn't provide a receipt.

name: S Z
review: Medications here are super expensive due to the location. Only buy if you need something urgently

name: Raffael Schulz
review: Bought Ibuprofin (400mg). They sold me the most expensive one, I have ever bought. Almost 10€ for 12 pills. Ridiculous. Seems well stocked though.

name: YMA
review: Perfect support for non Italian people.

name: Adam Hardi
review: Efficient, patient and helpful pharmacist

name: sonia scaggiante
review: Sempre gentili e disponibili

name: vs
review: personale estremamente gentile! una dottoressa molto disponibile :) non recensisco spesso, ma ho avuto una buona esperienza, la gentilezza non è una qualità scontata

name: Chen
review: Un po' di serietà professionale, per favore. Una ragazza dietro al banco, probabilmente non pensando che capissi l'italiano, non si è degnata neanche di aspettare che ce ne fossimo andati per affermare che era un peccato non averci fatto un video per postarlo online. Sono venuta in questa farmacia con dei conoscenti che non sanno parlare l'italiano per fare da tramite, e mi sarei ritrovata in un video su internet a mia insaputa? Per quanto vi possa far ridere un cliente, ridete pure in privato, ma non è accettabile nemmeno pensare di girargli un video, anche perché ho solo sbagliato di chiedere farmaco, non mi sono messa a fare capriole sul vostro pavimento, e anche se l'avessi fatto, voi che tenete ben a mente l'etica del lavoro, avreste continuato a servire il cliente successivo o a riordinare gli scaffali.

name: natalie mesa
review: I visited this pharmacy a few days ago. I need help finding a set of perfumes that were across the cashier. They are about 3 or 4 bottles, pastel colors placed on a table across from where you pay. They smelled so good but I did not write the name. I can’t find it at any pharmacy. If someone can help me find the name of these perfumes I would greatly appreciate it.

name: Imran Shaikh
review: Very helpful in need, I was in need of wheelchair and pharmacy has arranged it one day before arrival via my hotel.They have kept wheelchair arranged for us, we have used it for 2 days and returned back the wheelchair.

name: Patrick Walshe
review: Excellent service. I was there in September and ordered tablets for me to collect the next morning. Very helpful and i'm very grateful to you.

name: Tee Tong
review: Excellent service from a very knowledgeable staff member who helped us with the perfumes.

name: João Paulo Branco
review: Ok

name: GELZIY
review: Se potessi dare 0 lo farei. Sono stata nella parte della farmacia , non la parte del merchant of venice. La farmacista lì dentro è la persona  più maleducata che abbia mai conosciuto.Poco chiara e per niente professionale. Senza dirmi che un profumo che ordinava ( non avendolo al momento)l’avrei dovuto pagare obbligatoriamente senza poterlo annusare, al mio “ no guardi, non mi aveva messo al corrente , come faccio a sapere se mi piace “ mi rimprovera severamente dicendo che ora l’annullamento per lei sarebbe stato un grandissimo guaio( alquanto innervosita ) e mi liquida con disprezzo. Se non sa che una delle prime regole è mettere al corrente il cliente delle dinamiche è un problema suo , non mio. MAI PIÙ.

name: Denis Carnelos
review:
Cette magnifique pharmacie fait partie des lieux incontournables du Venise méconnu et atypique.
Elle a gardé tout le charme de ces officines d’antan.
De très belles boiseries et une collection de pots décorés exceptionnelle.
Si vous lui demandez, la pharmacienne vous ouvrira la pièce renfermant une quantité impressionnante de pots, albarellis et autres merveilles.
J’allais omettre les plafonds décorés.
De plus vous pourrez tester quelques parfums forts agréables.
À visiter pour se faire plaisir aux yeux comme aux récepteurs olfactifs.

name: magdolna paszti toth
review: Luogo STORICO con farmacisti ECCELLENTI e con PROFUMI MERAVIGLIOSI!!! Lo consiglio a tutti dal profondo del mio cuore ❤️

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: Javier Avellan
review: The people in this pharmacy are amazing! We came for a rapid COVID test and the gentleman was so incredibly helpful and kind!

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: Jennifer M.
review: what a bad service !!!  no organization.  my son had to do a covid test, we are told to stand in line, 40 minutes later we are told, no it's full for today.  you have to queue to get a ticket, then do the test, then do the same queue again to get the results.  allow 2 hours of your time for a simple antigen test.  and even if we do not tell you when you arrive to turn around without doing the test.

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: Ilian Ben Amara
review: very poor service, after severale minutes of waiting for an antigen test for covid-19 we are told that it is "full for today". I therefore do not recommend.

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: Ludwig Baumann
review: Very bad Service...

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: 温胜锋
review: Bad service

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: roberto ranieri
review: Servizio molto accurato, con una sensibilità per le esigenze del cliente difficile a trovarsi, spesso con l'effetto collaterale di allungare un po' la coda, di gran lunga comunque preferibile rispetto all'approccio sbrigativo di altri esercizi.

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: fabio busato
review: Bravissimi tutti i medici farmacisti, molto scrupolosi, ben preparati.

place_title: A.M.E.S. Farmacia Comunale N°1 - S. Elena
name: Tiziano Berti (T)
review: Personale disponibile e ottima offerta di prodotti anche di parafarmacia.

name: George
review: Pharmacist spoke perfect English, very helpful!

name: Alain GUIRAUD
review: Nice pharmacy with an old venetian style.

name: Cora Szloboda
review:
Super nette Mitarbeiterin.
Die Anmeldung zum Covid-19 Test war leicht und schnell (mit Reisepass), am nächsten Tag konnten wir einen Termin wählen im Testzentrum 100m weiter am Campo San Leonardo in einer Kirche. Das ging ebenfalls problemlos und das Ergebnis bekamen wir dann gedruckt in der Apotheke in die Hand.
Ich kann diese Apotheke nur empfehlen für Touristen, welche testen müssen. 1000x besser als diese Testzentren - dort ist nur Chaos.

name: Maria Pelissier
review: Très accueillant servi rapidement

name: Yves Cv
review: Bon accueil du pharmacien qui parle anglais,  très aimable et pro.

name: b a
review: You will find what you need but its very overpriced!

name: Miriam Marianini
review: Personal amabilísimo, tuvimos un problema con el dueño del bar de al lado y gracias a ellos todo fue más fácil . Seguro que con lo grandes personas que demostraron ser , farmacéuticos serán iguales o mejores

name: Cris Dlct
review: Opens early

name: FILIPPO FERRARO
review: Molto molto molto professionali e gentili

name: Riccardo Simioni
review: La migliore farmacia di Venezia

name: Valentina Mazzonetto
review: Super gentili soprattutto il farmacista col baffo😂

name: Stefano Soffiato
review: Ci vado da molti anni e li trovo sempre gentilissimi.

name: Lisa Bacciolo
review: Sempre disponibilissimi e professionali ❤️ 🥸

name: Camilla Milanese
review: per trovare gentilezza e risposte cordiali, rivolgersi alla farmacia di fianco.

name: Jarno Zaffelli
review: Empatia zero, se state male non andate qui ma a quella di fianco

name: Luigi Pajetta
review: Cortesia e competenza.

name: Alberto Ilari
review: L'indirizzo di Google Maps è sbagliato, la farmacia di trova alla Giudecca!

name: Raymond Rugenstein
review: The pharmacy tech was amazing; my mom needed help finding the Italian equivalent of Orajel and a wrist brace. They promptly got the gel and referred us to an appropriate brace for her issue, which we found at another pharmacy on Venice. We were impressed by their hospitality to tourists, including their very good English.

name: jonathan and karen
review: Due to cold with my ear ringing and having hard time dealing with the pressure from airplane I came to purchase an ear drop. The owner was very friendly, speaks a very little English but able to communicate with hand gestures as well. It’s hard to find a pharmacy in Murano so this is a quick go-to place. Hours are 8-12:45, 16:00-19:00.

name: Annamaria Sent
review:
Sempre disponibili, preparati, professionali ma anche umani.
La farmacia De Zuanni è  una pietra miliare nella storia della nostra isola.

name: Giulia Fazio
review: Ottima assistenza da parte di tutto lo staff..preparazione e gentilezza... totalità dei prodotti che..non in negozio vengono ordinati⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

name: Alvise Poggi
review: Bellissima farmacia, ben fornita. Personale preparato e gentile.

name: Paolo Rioda
review: Molto professionale

name: Brianna Huse
review:
Amazing food, service and atmosphere. This is a family owned and ran business. You are missing out if you pass by. We came here tonight and had the best dinner. We are gluten free and they have a great selection of gluten free items.
( everything we had was gluten free)… We will be back!

name: Ricky Ng
review:
We order appetizer but they missed the order, and a side dish they billed us but not served on table. They did not give us bread until the main course served. They are trying hard to rush us out of the restaurant, try to collect plates before the dish is finished, give us the bill without asking if we need coffee or dessert. The poor service does not deserve to 12%service charge.

The food is great, that’s why I give 2 stars instead of 1. However it’s a poor experience overall.

name: Stephen Joseph
review:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely Excellent – Came Back for a Second Time!
We loved Trattoria Al Gazzettino so much the first time that we had to come back again — and it was just as amazing! The food is outstanding, full of authentic Venetian flavour and beautifully prepared. Every dish we tried was delicious and fresh.

The staff are incredibly warm, welcoming, and attentive, which really makes the whole experience special. Rasel, who was brilliant and served us with great professionalism. It’s rare to find a restaurant where you feel so genuinely looked after.

If you’re visiting Venice, this is a must-visit spot. Fantastic food, great atmosphere, and service that makes you feel right at home.

name: Alisa Haku
review:
Very disappointing experience.
I was charged for several things I didn’t order, including a bottle of water that the waiter opened and poured without my consent. I never asked for it, nor did I drink it entirely, yet it was added to my bill.
On top of that, there was a 15% service charge that was not mentioned anywhere — the highest I’ve encountered in Europe.
I was also seated in a side area, not the main dining room, which felt unwelcoming and second-rate.
Overall, the service felt misleading and unfair. I do not recommend this restaurant at all.

name: Ben Corby
review:
This restaurant is in a great location with some great views, and amazing food. We also received a selection of complimentary food comprising of salad, bread, and a small portion of cold spaghetti. Even though we did not have a reservation they still were able to seat us, and we even got a view of the canal.

However, we felt rushed the entire dinner. From the minute we sat down, the staff kept pushing us to order and finish. For example, my partner was still eating her main when a review driven complimentary dessert got put on our table (which was one profiterole positioned next to a business card with a QR code to encourage customers to leave a review). She felt rushed and uncomfortable to finish and before even putting her cutlery down, they took her plate away. After we finished this complimentary dessert, we were not even asked if we wanted the dessert menu (which we did) and were just handed the bill before even asking for it. We felt like they were only giving us free food for the sake of getting good reviews, the staff just didn’t seem to care, they were arguing with each other, even dragging tables across the restaurant and almost hitting customers in the process. It felt tense and it didn’t feel very welcoming. Even when we were leaving and saying “thank you” and “goodbye”, they didn’t even look at us when they said “you’re welcome”.

The food was definitely good but the attitude of the staff and the rushed atmosphere definitely ruined this experience for us. This is not a cheap restaurant but my partner and I both just finished university and to celebrate we decided on this restaurant, which was a great shame. It had such good potential to make our trip to Venice and our celebration great.

name: Nicolle Smit
review: The pesto pasta Was amazing! 6/5. I asked them to let me make my own coffee and they did I really enjoyed it! Highly recommend this place! Has great attention!

name: Bruna Rebelo
review: The food was excellent — full of flavor and beautifully prepared. The service was a bit slow, but the staff were friendly and polite. The place itself is cozy and has a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Overall, a very nice experience!

name: chung Yi chen
review: Better than expected 👌. There are 2 restaurant location opposite each other. initially came to the main store at 530 that was closed till 6pm. But we were ushered to the other store that assured us it was the same restaurant. We were suspicious at first. But after the food came our suspicions were gone. Food was delicious and service was fantastic. Highly recommend.

name: Miguel Ribeiro
review:
PASTA AL MARE

Second time in Venice and we are happy to come back to Trattoria Alla Fontana with its amazing pasta al mare, we're obsessed really.

There were some constructions mearby this time so the setting was not the best, but its worth it for the food.

We also had a nice tiramisu.

Things were not super expensive, give it a shot.

name: Steve Mascheri
review:
Great little restaurant on the canal.  Area was under construction but didn't take away from the ambiance.

Service was prompt and helpful and the daily special (pasta with fish and pistachio) was the highlight of the meal.  Reasonably priced for being in the canal.  Go for the house wine!

name: Amy Hay-Dean
review: We wanted to find a local non-touristy restaurant. The staff was so nice and the food was great! I never had the dish before and went with what the server recommended… I wasn’t able to speak Italian but she was so nice and even suggested an amazing desert

name: Екатерина Поповичева
review:
I regret that I must share a very disappointing experience..

-The toilet did not flush, which is a fundamental hygiene issue.
-The glasses were visibly dirty
-The pasta dish I was served in all my years dining in Italy, was the worst I have ever tasted; I was unable to eat it.
-The cost of the meal simply does not reflect the standard provided. I expected far better value for the price

name: Minh Nguyen
review:
We had dinner here on our first night in Venice, it was across from our hotel qnd seemed like a nice place. The side is blocked by the water bus stop so the sight is not as nice as could be, although still generally romantic.

The service was attentive and quick, they unfortunately do not serve tap water and we were made to order bottled water instead, but it wasn’t too much of a hassle.

The meal itself was good enough, the seafood pasta is particularly good. The cuttlefish polenta was different, it was still good but not too engaging. The least satisfactory dish however, was the pasta of the day dish, which this time was sea bass with a pistachio based sauce. It fell quite a bit short and was bland to the taste.

The pasta dishes range from 20-25 euros, while the larger main courses are 25-35. Entrees will be around 15-20 mostly. Overall a satisfactory meal, although I wouldn’t rank it too spectacular.

name: Ashley Danner
review: This spot is so amazing and so local. The food is fabulous, and the view right on the canal is so aesthetic. It’s also really near a water taxi pick up spot for when you roll in or out of town tired lol. The owner is so nice, we loved it.

name: Taylor Elson
review:
Quiet, cozy trattoria by the canal, owner was lovely and food was amazing.

House wine was surprisingly good, and the catch of the day was very tasty.

name: Hanji Xu
review: The most authentic restaurant of our Italian travels. Fabulous dishes that get at the heart of Venice. Exceptional service.

name: Gregory Ortiz
review:
This is a great place for traditional Venetian fare. It’s frequented by the Gondolieri as seen in the photos. We all had seafood which was top notch, perfectly cooked and so good. I had fish Lasagna. It was many tin layers os lasagna with creamy fish between the layer. 10/10 would get it again.

A pro tip for Venice, if a Gondoliere is waiting in line, it’s a great place!

name: Febriana Wulan Sari
review: I can’t believe I forgot to write a review for this restaurant. It’s amazing. I really loved the foods. All of them were amazingly delicious. I would recommend all the above: the seafood spaghetti, gnocchi, sea bass fillet (I can’t remember what the other one was). Price was reasonable. Trust me! I would definitely come back if I visit Venice again.

name: Steven K
review: After a long morning of touring the city, I decided to finally sit down and eat. I came here after looking at reviews of the restaurants in my vicinity. It did not disappoint. I ordered fish lasagna and a salad. I never had fish lasagna before as I grew up on the Bolognese style, so I was not sure what to expect. It was delicious! The seafood filling between the pasta layers was nicely done. The salad was fresh. I ordered tiramisu for dessert and a cappuccino (even though it may have been a little late in the day for a cappuccino by Italian standards.) The tiramisu was delicious too. I only took a pic of the dessert, after I took a bite already but attached pic here. Service was friendly and attentive. The gondola guides/drivers eat here so I figured it should be authentic! Two were here when I arrived.

name: Fung Eric
review:
During my recent visit to this charming Italian restaurant, I had the pleasure of trying their prawn spaghetti with tomato sauce. The dish was nothing short of delightful! The prawns were perfectly cooked, and the tomato sauce was rich and flavorful, complementing the pasta beautifully.

I highly recommend this restaurant for anyone craving delicious Italian cuisine. It's a true gem!

name: Minh Nguyen
review:
We grabbed dinner here after reading reviews for restaurants in the area and were not disappointed. Their beef carpaccio was the highlight of the meal. The taste was much better than any I’ve had outside of Italy.

The schrimp Gnocchi Scampi was also quite good and goes particularly well with the bread that’s given alonside the meal. The calamari was a misorder but was still quite good, though we would have liked to try the mixed fish that we had ordered.

The clam pasta was quite flavoursome as well, the pasta was al dente as is always in Italy. Lastly the tiramisu was fresh and soft to the taste.

The staff were attentive and quick to service. Would recommend this restaurant highly to anyone staying in the area, definitely well deserved reviews.

name: Hans S
review:
we made a reservation around the opening hours so we managed to sit straight away but the seats filled up fast.
we really enjoyed the starter of mixed fish, they're really fresh especially the sardines. as for the pasta, we chose spaghetti "busera" with prawn and spicy tomato sauce. it's nice but personal preference is to have the sauce to be spicier. as for the tiramisu, it leans toward sweeter side but we like the cream.
great service from the staff!

name: Diệu Ngọc Ngô
review:
The best Italian restaurant I've tried throughout my Venice trip!

I forgot to book a table so I waited for around 10-15 minutes. That was a Thursday evening, on Friday it was busier so I couldn't get a table. So if you want to be here you should make a reservation in advance.

We had lasagna, salad, shrimp tagliatelle and tiramisu as dessert later on. Every dish is a solid 10 out of 10. Fresh tomatoes and shrimp, creamy cheesy lasagna, and the tiramisu was the perfect ending. We were so full.

My friend forgot her bag but the waiter was really fast to call us back!

Writing this review makes me miss Venice even more!

name: Lynn N.
review:
Food was good and the price is very affordable as well. The shrimp one was flavourful, tomatoey, fresh. The cuttlefish pasta was amazing as well, although I would appreciate slightly more flavour with the sauce, the cuttlefish itself was so so fresh, cooked to perfection and generous portion as well.

The only thing is that the bread is a bit stale and tough at the same time haha, out of the 2 breads they have us one was really really chewy, while the other was hard like a rock. Service is also slightly rushed and forgetful, had to asked 3 times to get the olive oil and salt.

Other than that definitely recommend this place because it is cheap, good, and quick!

name: David Dalton
review: The stand out of the meal was the owner/managers service… we dropped in at lunch to book for dinner and received great advice on a booking time considering tour bookings etc.  sat down to a fantastic seafood and squid ink pasta… one of the best meals we have had on our tour of Italy.  Can’t recommend enough considering how many tourist spots are in Venice

name: Julia Davis
review: We’ve been in Italy for over 2 weeks and this is the best food we’ve eaten the entire trip.  We visited 2 times during our 3 day stay in Venice and tried 4 of their specialty dishes, all seafood dishes.  Everything was cooked to perfection and the seafood was extremely fresh.  The prices are very reasonable, especially for the quality and quantity of food they give you.  We would have eaten here all 3 days but they are closed on Sundays.  The place was filled with locals both times we visited and seemed like many were repeat customers, by the way the staff welcomed them.  Just eat here, you won’t be disappointed.

name: Angie Yuan
review: We found this restaurant online, with many seafood options. The portion is big and every dish is amazing. We ended up with more food than we need, but it’s all worth it. Service is quick and nice, highly recommended!

name: Ben Morris
review: Best spaghetti with seafood I've ever had. The staff couldn't do enough for us. Very accommodating. Did us a calamari starter to share, prepared a plain spaghetti dish for my 6 year old girl, with some oil and Parmesan, which she loved. The portions are amazing and the quality of the food is excellent. Been in Italy just over a week. Eat in Peschiera, Verona and now here, this was our best meal out.

name: Jose Antonio Lopez
review: We came here after many years from our first visit to Venice, it used to have more local dishes with home made taste. The menu has changed and sad to know that it has been adapted to tourist demands (staff words). The lasagna, seafood pasta and ravioli were very good. The ham and cheese table and the gnocchi with Gorgonzola were average, no special flavor, also the tiramisu. The staff was amazingly friendly as always. The place was full and barely could speak among us because of the noise. Kid friendly speaking, the staff will be super nice with the kids, but there is no high chair and no changer available… Please, do not ruin the carbonara and make it real without milk and ham!!!

name: Sukhi Mann
review: They have all the venetian food you'll want. And it delicious! We had Carpaccio (10/10), Squid ink pasta (10/10), Seafood Pasta (10/10) and Tiramisu (another 10/10). I'm a bit sad we hadn't discovered that place earlier. The portion size is very generous and prices fair. As a bonus: the white house wine was delicious! If you're near by, you should definitely come here. And if you're further away, you should still definitely come here. Yes, It's that good.

name: Sean Gordon
review: Found this spot upon arrival in Venice, super cute and cozy and didn’t feel too touristy. Great pastas and a tasty Aperol Spritz got our vacation started on the right foot, def recommend!

name: Henry Gonzalez
review: This restaurant is close to the original Jewish Ghetto location in Venice, but it is worth the trip and visit.  The staff was very welcoming and happy to see us.
