The reality is that they serve you small portions (I asked for pasta with mussels and they gave me pasta al pomodoro lol). The seafood was laughable. Literally As big as the palm of my hand.
Paid 18€ for something that is at most 10€. It's a no from me.

name: Alin Tintea
review: Worst italian food...prison like. Bad pasta, bad liver - i guess they served us the dog food. Frozen french fries. Supermarked frozen pizza. Half an hour for service. The sodas were poured from big plastic bottles ( problably opened days before). Crowded, the waiter always shouting. For an hystorical restaurant...very dissapointing. My kids asked me to live this review - you left a very bad taste. Although we were hungry as can be, your food still tasted bad

name: Zhang Aileen
review:
Awful experience, we ordered 3 cappuccino and one pasta, the handwriting bill says 12 euro for pasta and 12 euro for 3 cappuccino and 6 euro for unknown fee (Service fee? Coverage? Idk) then we realized that cappuccino is 3.5euro instead of 4 euro, i reminded their staff and they did corrected the price, but i got yelled ("ok!??")

I paid the money eventho i still dont know what that 6 euro for

Wouldnt recommend tourist go any restaurant that has less tourists.

Pasta we ordered was not bad, but i dont recommend the cappuccino

name: Paulo Barbaresi
review: The Trattoria is close to a busy area which solves the problem of having lunch for tourists. If you know Italian cuisine you realized the quality of the food is medium but they offer a menu which for approx 20 eur you lunch with first, second, and desert.

name: Aurore Viola
review: We entered this restaurant because a blonde waitress was on the street and entreated us to come in, we thought it was welcoming. We sat down, had a drink. We waited for her to come and give us the menus but after 20 minutes we had to call her. There were not so many customers. She showed the menu and my friend chose, I was not ready so she took it for a no and didn't wait for me. She came back and nearly wrenched the menus from us, not even looking at us or listening to our protests. Then another one arrived with the order of my friend. I guess I might have had something later. We were dismayed and my friend decided we should leave though I was ill at ease because the dish had been served. The problem is that she didn't take the time to speak, we're foreigners, she must be used to this in Venice but she didn't respect us at all. And I add that I'm French and my English is good enough, so this isn't even a  problem of language. Or maybe she doesn't speak English at all in such a touristic place???? Her behaviour is a shame for her job. Fortunately, we went to Osteria ae spezie, they were very nice and it was tasty. Don't go there!!!

name: K
review: I guess I had a different experience here. The service and ambience is great. The food was not. Not that it was horrible! I ate it all because I was starving. Maybe I got the wrong thing…. But i definitely would not come back to try again.

name: Imelda C.
review:
We are tourists and we arrived at this restaurant by accident when we were searching for a place to eat as we went on a road trip. The restaurant seems like a local one and mostly of the people were wearing elegant clothes.
The food was good, nothing else to say. We ordered clamps and they were small, so if you decide to order them be ready to struggle to eat them.

name: Water Bottle
review: Do not go if you are a tourist. They treat you terrible and give you a different price for what you get than the local customers. I understand enough Italian to know that they scammed us. Luckily we realized we were being scammed before we ordered so we only ordered one thing. A small plate of pasta a water came out to be 20 euros whereas I saw 2 locals sitting next to me get 3 plates of food each plus wine plus coffee and payed a total of 30 euros. They give the locals the “menu” deal and allows tourists to order it but charges you for their separate prices. In other words they would charge a local 15 euros and could charge a tourist up to 100 euros for the same thing. Disappointing because I lived in Spain for a year and similar restaurants do not scam tourist. Unfortunately these Italians are backwards minded and treat tourists awfully and makes them not want to return.

name: Alvise Fontana Z
review: Fish fish fish old style trattoria with one big room and squares tables....they don't make them any more ! It is not fancy  you probably do not notice it from the outside but the menu is very good. Local Venetian style dishes. The quality of the raw material is good likewise the service. Yes go for it. 5 star food 3 star place...make it 4

name: G LENCER
review:
They cheated us with the price. a shame. Don't go or at least ask twice about the price.
We order the daily menu.  They served it us, but when we asked for the bill,  they said that they forgot that there was no menu on Saturdays and we had to pay everything separated. We paid three times more that they said us at the beginning.  And what could we do? They take advantage that you are from outside. .... incredible

name: Shane Davis
review: Open until 11 unless you're American then your turned away at 930 on a Saturday with 10-15 tables currently seated and even after explaining you just want dessert. I hope some day they visit America and realize they will always receive the same service as everone else.

name: James Maitland-Smith
review: Superb service with a smile - the seafood is some of the best in the area and well worth the drive from Venice.

name: Zak Kohler
review: Incredible. Full of locals. Everyone was really friendly and the pizza was great. Go here rather than the Ristorante.

name: Shiv Shetty
review: I totally love their pizza and the pasta, and dined here twice. The atmosphere is decent. They charge 2,5 euro per person (including kids) as coperto (fixed cover charge) so for me it was 7,5 euro of additional surprise in the total bill. Can't help, it's similar in most restaurant here. I had funghi pizza and araebita pasta. Btw, funghi is mushroom in Italian:)

name: Marcelo Fraia
review:
The atmosphere was good.And the lasagna was too cheesy,there was not enough meat . But my experience was a lot better than the other reviews.I also agree  that the service is good
In the other hand there is not kids menu . Plus I didn't see any vegan food but on the door it said "pizza and pasta able to have no gluten". Overall it was a good experience and I would like to eat here again.

name: V7890 K
review: Great tasty food and quick service. Pasta bolonese was very tasty and house wine superb.

name: Michael Saveljev
review: Very unpleasant experience in this restaurant. Waiter is so rude, doesn’t really know the details of what he offers, can’t remember the order correctly, then blames us for it, moreover follows us outside shouting “blessings”. We paid in full, don’t see a reason for this behaviour. No apologies were offered. I didn’t find this to be regular in Venice, as we dined in 4-5 different restaurants (all with reviews less than 4, found them very nice) and I left reviews.

name: Devin Wadkins
review: Our AirB&B was directly across from this restaurant, so it was very convenient for us. The only 2 staff we ever saw was a Man and his Fiance. They were both really nice and spoke good English. The food itself was great. We had a variety of things at our times there. We had pizza, pasta, seafood, all of it was great. The prices were also very reasonable for what you got. The sea bass for example, was less than 10€ and fed 2 people. Overall, this restaurant was great, the staff were amazing, and for me, it was one of the most memorable places in Venice.

name: Wes
review: Worst experience I’ve ever had in Italy. The waiter was mentally unstable. He was extremely condescending and kept telling us “this isn’t the Olive Garden.” Asked for a basket of bread and he responded “this isn’t America, what do you think? How about you pay for some apprizers..” Ended up walking out and the waiter followed us into the street screaming at us. My parents are in their 70s and extremely kind. Do not go to this place.

name: Raul Chavez
review:
Been in Venice for two days and have eaten here twice. The food is amazing. The customer service is great.

Highly recommend the shrimp scampi. Wine was amazing and our waiter brought us a lemon cello. Amazing time and amazing food.

Prices are way better than in the Saint Mark square. Way better service and food by far

Maximus our server was awesome

name: Javi Dub
review:
Nice place ,, nice music .. very friendly waiter … food arrived fast and it was tasty !!!!😋

I had a  decent gluten free pizza and the rest of the group were happy with their choices

Surprise with the bill .. beers 11 euros .. and 5 euros extra for the no gluten pizza

name: Olena Lukashenko
review: I chose this place to celebrate my whole birthday, and it couldn’t have been more perfect. A cozy restaurant with a lovely atmosphere and an incredibly beautiful balcony overlooking the canal — it added so much magic to the day. The food was delicious, and the tiramisu was absolutely divine. The birthday candle was such a sweet surprise and made the celebration even more special 🤍

name: Brittany Date
review: We made a reservation because I had seen this place online with a beautiful canal side seating. We opted for not this seat but still thoroughly were amazed by the atmosphere, and the welcoming staff. We had our best dining experience in all of Italy in this restaurant. We had ravioli, the special of sea bream and the best tiramisu of our lives! I cannot understate the staff though - they were so kind and hospitable. We were greeted with a glass of Prosecco, on the house, and our meal was finished with a free biscuit and free limoncello as well. We dine out a lot in Australia but never receive this sort of treatment. We would recommend this place in a heartbeat

name: Shawn Naidu
review: Celebrating the end of our honeymoon, my wife and I chose Ristorante ai Barbacani for our final meal away. We (she) couldn't have picked a better venue. We were able to secure, in our humble opinion, one of the best tables in all of Venice. Nestled on a small private patio above the Rio del Mondo Novo, the setting was stunning yet incredibly intimate and the food was absolutely delicious from starters to dessert. And if that wasn't enough, somehow, the best part of our evening might have been our server Simone. He was informative, attentive, extremely helpful, down-right charming and even made some of the best cocktails we had all trip! It was an incredible ending to an amazing journey. We cannot recommend this place enough.

name: Alicja Harkot
review: I’ve taken the asparagus risotto with shrimps - such a good choice! Tasty, just the right softness and smoothness, served hot and with extra Grana 🫠 What have made us most in love with the place was the staff - the absolute nicest and most professional waitresses one could imagine! Will be recommending and coming back! Thank you for such a nice dinner experience!

name: Kira Sky
review: Getting married in 2 days and this was the best starter experience. Anne was WONDERFUL and professional. Once in a lifetime experience i will tell everyone for the rest of my life. Beautiful views and beautiful people. Food was great and service was quick and great. 10/10 always.

name: Weston LeCrone
review: lovely little spot right on one of the canals. Seafood risotto was amazing, server was sweet & attentive. they even included a complimentary glass of prosecco!

name: rifatra rathod
review: One of the best Italian restaurants I have tried, it was my first time in Venice and I checked out a video that they have a beautiful table for special occasions facing the canal. Food is amazing, staff speaks both Italian and English and provides good suggestions, it’s a must try when in Venice.

name: Dionne Ibarra
review: I had the best risotto and tiramisu! The ambiance was romantic and the food was amazing. They do an amazing job making you feel special with a welcome glass of Prosecco and appetizer.

name: Ben Wong
review:
Location of the restaurant is near Saint Marco Square. Usually it is crowded during peak period.
The place is nicely decorated, clean and cosy.
Food is good, but the portion on the set meal is not for big eater.
Staff is great and very helpful.

name: Danielle Eves
review: The BEST white wine I’ve had in all of Venice!! It was fresh and perfectly balanced between sweet at bitter. I also had the most tasty pesto pasta with burrata cheese and *chefs kiss* it was wonderful!!

name: Chris Kellogg
review: We had a very good experience here at the Pizzaeria, where we stopped for drinks. It had nice decorations and was clean, with the paintings and beautiful chandelier. It was a pleasuring time chatting with the staff Shakil, Alexandra (or Allisandra, unsure.), and Marco. We would definitely come back here, the drinks and atmosphere was incredible.

name: Cheryl N
review: Should have trusted the poor reviews. They took advantage of a live Euro match to lure customers in. 2 of us were not dining, and out of pure respect to the restaurant we checked if it was okay to just order drinks; we also made it clear we were there to watch the match. The waiter confirmed that it was not a problem. Once we were seated and the drinks were ordered, they forced us to order some food from the menu - so we ordered antipasto to share. They tried to recommend something that was not on the menu and when we asked how much it was the price was ridiculous. When the game ended, while we were one of the first to ask for the bill, the waiters requested we return to our seats and said they would bring it to us. This was when we realised their deliberate intent to serve us the absolute last. It is only right to return this unkind gesture by warning everyone of the experience. Don’t let this restaurant ruin your holiday.

name: jonny latta
review: Ripped off asked for house red wine and got a bill for 25 euro for a half bottle. I then asked and they said they don't do house wine. Not a good experience for our first night

name: Zack S.
review: I had a feeling that I should check reputation online as my guts were giving me signals. For 2 person dinner ended up paying 244.80 Euros. Asked for a red wine, they brought small bottle, ended up drinking 2 of them and apparently they were 78 euros each. Next door restaurant top shelves wine costs 40 euro, had it for lunch. Good restaurant here in Venice averages 100 euros with gratuity. Be careful of this places, they do prey on visitors. What a horrible experience. Avoid at all costs and hope it will be a lesson for people who want to visit this place, don’t do it

name: Anton
review:
Be cautious before eating here. The pricing and menu presentation felt confusing and not very transparent. For example, the Aperol Spritz listed at €4.50 turned out to be a small size, and the regular one was €7.50 — something we only learned after ordering.

We left feeling disappointed and taken advantage of. If you’re visiting, make sure to double-check prices in advance or consider dining elsewhere.

name: Valentina Vinestone
review:
Scammers!
Payed 200 euros for less than avarage dinner for 2 adults and 4yo, 60 euros for grilled sea bass that marked 8.50 in menu euros in the menu. They even specified that I need it for 1 person. A day before I got it for 16 euros and was thinking 8.5 is a good price but it was lunch time vs dinner when usually everything is more expensive. (I’m attaching the menu picture) Originally asked for chicken but server told me sea bass is great. I have type 1 diabetes and celiac, so I’m limited in my chooses.
When we got a bill it was 60 euros for the fish and 38 euros for the small  cheap bottle of Pinot noire(2023) enough for 2 not full glasses. We payed 15 euros a day before. I was told that it’s specified in ITALIAN on menu that the price is in per100gr. Server didn’t told a thing and left his shift before he finished.  And they bring full fish with not edible head, tail and bones inside. Yet they price it per 100gr…. I don’t speak Italian and I tried to tell the server that they should explain to me that the price is per gr, not per plate because I obviously don’t speak Italian since I was speaking English all the time with the server and I don’t work in food industry. And with pride, server told me he works in food industry! And I replied THATS WHY ITS YOUR RESPONSIBILITY TO EXPLAIN. He didn’t respond. I’m filing fraud with my credit card company and highly recommend to do the same or just simply if you get yourself in the same situation or don’t go there at all!!!

name: Delaine Cools
review:
Trattoria Pizzeria Antico Gafaro, located in Venice, Italy, is grounded, cosy and seems to almost always be busy, attracting couples, families for their good service and food.

In tue Italian trattoria style, it offers homely Italian and Mediterranean cuisine, including pizza, seafood, and vegetarian options. The restaurant gets the nod for affordable prices, friendly staff, and cozy atmosphere.

Their variety of dishes is refreshing with their pizzas being highly popular. I was impressed with the seafood offerings though with the baked fish, clam pasta and calamari coming out tops. Their lasagne is also very good as are the desserts.

Their wine menu is also pretty extensive and they offer dining specials with a combined starter, mains and dessert to suit most budgets. Overall, we found Antico Gafaro to be pretty minimalistic on design and but a good, clean, welcoming spot for casual dining, especially if you're looking for a reasonably priced, hearty meal in Venice.

name: Raphael Gono
review: One of my favorite dishes served to perfection. One of my favorite meals during my trip to Italy; staff accommodated me quickly with easy communication, followed by a well timed serving of the food in a beautiful sunset atmosphere in their comfortable seating. The aglio e olio was served warm with perfect emulsification, just the right balance of garlic and spice; delivers a great kick of heat without overwhelming flavor of spiciness.

name: Renae Ashcroft
review: Ate here a couple of times and the food was super fresh, hot and fast. Great location at a great price.

name: Kalina Gyonkova
review: If you're looking for a great dining experience in Venice, this restaurant is a must-visit. The pasta dishes are outstanding, with rich, authentic flavors and perfectly cooked noodles. Whether you choose a classic like spaghetti with seafood or something more inventive, each dish is crafted with care and high-quality ingredients. The atmosphere is equally impressive—warm, inviting, and cozy, making it the perfect spot for a relaxed meal. The staff is attentive and friendly, adding to the overall experience. Whether you're enjoying a romantic dinner or a gathering with friends, this place offers a memorable setting for both. The wine selection complements the menu beautifully, enhancing the flavors of each dish. While the prices are a bit on the higher side, the quality of food and the lovely ambiance make it worth every penny. If you want to indulge in excellent pasta and a charming atmosphere in Venice, this restaurant won't disappoint!

name: Abby Chapman
review: Service a little slow but cannot fault the food and was surprisingly good prices! Our bill came to 55 euro and we got 4x drinks 2x entre and 2x mains 🙌

name: jimMY. C
review: The most reasonable price and friendly place to eat in Venice. Nice atmosphere, watch people passing by. Try the salmon pasta, so delicious. The Spritz and draft beer are available for hot summer. The two young ladies serve with smiles 😃

name: Daniele Barolo
review: Fantastic restaurant! Typical Venetian cuisine of excellent quality. My girlfriend and I love going to this restaurant in the heart of the island. You can enjoy delicious fresh fish first courses (my girlfriend can only eat wholemeal pasta, but they had that too), homemade pizza and desserts. The prices are good with very advantageous menu offers. The staff is wonderfully welcoming, it makes you feel really at home: my girlfriend was no longer so hungry and they took care to make her a reduced second, just so she wouldn't miss anything! Totally recommended

name: Chloe May
review: Service was very slow even when it wasn’t busy. Asked for cheese on my pasta waited asked again and never got it. I had the spicy penne was nice but very oily. I have made better bruschetta at home it was soft toasted bread with a couple of tomato’s no flavour at all took 10 minutes to get balsamic vinegar. VERY SLOW SERVICE. Was at restaurant for 2 hours for a 2 course meal due to waiting all night for our food. Needs a lot of improvement. Saw a couple sit down and they went to the restaurant opposite due to the slow service, wish I did the same

name: Ben Barber
review:
Really nice place, friendly staff who spoke English. The food was good.

Although the waiter with the thick glasses almost looked like a bond villain.

name: Ulysse
review: Nous sommes venus manger ce midi. Les serveurs poussent désagréablement à l'achat. Le service était très lent. ~40 a 50 minutes pour que nos plats arrivent et ensuite les serveurs nous ont pressés pour que nous finissions vite. La bonne blague. Tout ça pour une nourriture médiocre : très petites portions par rapport à d'autres restaurants et un peu fade, les fruits de mer sont probablement congelés. Le prix du service est automatiquement pris en compte dans la note (ce qui explique peut-être certaines choses). Le restaurant nous a demandé de régler la note en liquide si possible. Bref, à éviter sauf si vous n'avez vraiment pas le choix.

name: Danielle Paradis
review: It was ok. The food was decent and there was a nice view of the canal. The waiters were indifferent and showing each other things on their cell phones while elevator Spotify free music played on a short loop. The Caprese salad was uninspired.

name: Catarina Lomelino
review: Beautiful restaurant with canal views. Amazing food and staff were so friendly. Highly recommend for a romantic dinner. Definitely the best restaurant we tried in Venice and prices were reasonable

name: Sean pd
review: Fast service, nice food and well priced

name: SeungJong Yuk
review:
여기 친절하고 음식 맛있어요. 해산물 리조또랑 까르보나라 시켰는데 만족해요..
This is a wonderful restaurant,  nice kindness. Nice food, nice managers, nice view!.

name: Francesca distaso
review: Ismail ci accoglie con garbo ed eleganza offrendoci il tavolo più bello. Ci serve oxan detto tony , con grande professionalità. Sogna di portare qui la sua famiglia, di comprare una casa e sono certa che ci riuscirà. Il cibo è ottimo , il posto unico , l’accoglienza piacevole. Gli chef di varie nazionalità, alla cassa una ragazza cinese . Il mondo che vorrei , tutti senza distinzione dí razza e religione per un mondo migliore. Ci torneremo, venite anche voi ! Ps: gli spaghetti con le cozze … sublimi !

name: Silvia Fracchia
review: Cibo ottimo, servizio accurato.

name: Enzo
review: Gran bel ristorante veneziano abbastanza centrale ma con un bellissimo e romanticissimo affaccio sul canale e ponticello. Il cibo è ben presentato, gustoso e abbondante, il pesce è di buona qualità e se si segue il consiglio del personale si sa bene cosa prendere e questo è molto importante in un ristorante con molti piatti a base di pesce. Servizio veloce anche se quando sono andato non vi erano molti clienti ma soprattutto il locale é molto caratteristico soprattutto se si riesce a sedere vicino o proprio sul balconcino.  Insomma un buon ristorante veneziano e non è scontato trovare un buon ristorante a Venezia visto che ci sono molti posti accattivanti dall’esterno ma poi con poca sostanza.

name: Leah Marlene
review: It is closed now

name: Julian Winkler
review: Das einzige was schlechter war als der Service oder das Essen, war die schlechte Musik. Irgendwelche alten Remixes. Der Wespe hat es wenigstens geschmeckt (siehe Foto)

name: Rob Hewitt
review: Pizza was so-so, but edible. Honestly, I'm not a picky eater, but there are lots of pizza options here.  That's why we chose the restaurant. Server conversation was in English so it was easy to order. However, he acted like he didn't care we were there. He was training an Indian server and that guy had better tableside service.

name: John Daniel Ducusin
review: This place was should be prohibited from further existence. Woe is me though, we were first-time travelers to Europe. Although the location is quite charming, previous generations of Venetians are rolling in their graves, disapproving of the sorry excuses of pizzas served at this establishment. The fact that buttered noodles were the best part about this restaurant says a lot. I could’ve stayed home and did that back in the states. In fairness, the attentiveness of the service wasn’t bad at all, just maybe overstepping at times. We all appreciate hospitality but at some point, you gotta let your table enjoy their privacy. You’re a waiter, not an interviewer.

name: Jana Kubíčková
review: This place is still open just because of good location. There is no other reason. We ordered pizzas and parmigiana. It took like 3 minutes to get pizza and starter. My friend was waiting really long time for parmigiana so we couldn't eat together. When we got food, there was no cutlery so pizza got cold in meantime. Service is not good and food is not tasty at all. At least pizza tastes like every ingredient was frozen..disabled toilets upstairs with no clue how to get there.

name: Filip Oborník
review: Be aware of the scammers - they write ONLY in italian that they charge service fee 3 euros for each person, not per table

name: Paul Francis
review: My husband and I arrived at the tail end of lunch. Most places were quite full so we were pleased to find a seat in the shade in this restaurant. My husband ordered beer and I ordered wine; both were delicious and refreshing. We had been looking forward to an authentic pizza since we arrived so that is what we ordered. I was so disappointed. It was way overdone though this was not obvious when it was placed in front of me. I tried to cut it with a standard knife and could not. I asked for a steak knife feeling somewhat embarrassed. Unfortunately that didn’t help very much. Great portions of the pizza were inedible because the crust was like cardboard. I ate what was possible and then turned it over so that the defect was obvious. The staff simply grabbed the plate and walked away. I could have complained, I could have sent it back. That would simply reaffirm the negative sentiment that the staff seem to have for clientele from North America. I think it’s a shame that 1) the cook said that plate was acceptable to serve, 2) that the waiter delivered it and 3) that nobody asked about my clear dissatisfaction with the pizza. I will never come again and I will certainly not recommend this restaurant to anyone.

name: Sophie
review:
We chose the place when we were wandering around looking for food.
They offered free bread before Our food arrived but it was so hard we could not finish it.
The pizza we ordered arrived pretty fast, tastewise it definitely seemed to be not freshly made. The dough was so hard that i had trouble cutting it with a Steak knife. There was a huge puddle of grease in the middle that i had to use a napkin to soak it up.
They also cleared one of the plates while the second person was obviously still eating.
The staff was not friendly and made me feel very unwelcome when they asked us to pay the bill in the moment both of us were done eating. We were also the only people asked to pay as soon as they were done eating although our age and attire fit the rest of the guests.
Would absolutely not recommend eating or drinking there.

name: Anna Pohlers
review:
Places like these demonstrate the importance of checking online ratings before settling on a restaurant.
My pizza was absolutely drenched in oil, meaning I had to dab my meal with a napkin before I could start. I can only assume that this did not sit well with the staff, since they were in a hurry to get us to leave afterwards, clearing off my friends plate even though I was still eating, and shoving the bill in our face as soon as I was done as well.
I have never experienced staff as outright rude as this before and hope the place will close before more people fall into this trap.

name: Matthieu André
review:
Worst restaurant I've ever been to. Food is clearly low quality premade stuff from the supermarket, badly reheated.
Ingredients on pizzas aren't cooked, meat in secondi piatti is boiled or overcooked.
Please don't make the same mistake as we did and go anywhere else.

name: Arevik Ford
review: Far from your typical tourist menu, this corner spot overlooking a piazza serves up delicious food and great service. Good variety on the menu and even entrees are well portioned. Would come back here again!

name: Williamson Transport, LLC
review: we're sitting inside and saw some bread drop on the floor,  next to the blue glasses.  They picked them up and put them back into a bread basket.  YUK!  Guess it's better not to know what happens to your food sometimes.

name: Quentin Brandwood
review:
Fantastic food in the centre of Burano. We had the fried sardines (with a side of "French fries" which were fried thin cut potato, I was a bit skeptical when they were suggested but yes order these) and lasagne both were exceptionally good.
The menu is in multiple languages and the waiter that we had spoke good English. There is a small cover charge (1,8 euro each) which is on the menu. This was in a nice out door setting in the middle of Burano. Easy to find and well worth the visit.
Highly recommend eating here.

name: Karel Petrášek
review: Nice looking place at the square, so we decided to celebrate our engagement there. At first, we read through the menu and decided to get drinks only, maybe dessert. Although there was nobody inside, and at the time maybe 5 tables occupied, nobody noticed. So we picked our seats and sat down. In about a minute or so waiter came and asked if we’d like to eat. As soon as we told him we are there probably for drinks only, he immediately asked us to move to a different area of the restaurant, as “our” seats were for lunch customers only. (No sign or obvious hint to assume such thing). As politely as he asked us to move, we stood up and left and took our business to much nicer establishment. Not surprised the place was almost empty.

name: Carmen Macota
review:
The food is good here, we had fried fish plateau, spaghetti with squid ink, spaghetti bolognaise and spaghetti with sea food and their famous biscuits.
The food came pretty fast and the waiter was nice.

name: Steven Cheng
review:
Great food, great drinks and Great service!

Very inviting of the outside seating area and wonderful seafood selections !

We stopped by to having lunch, very friendly staffs speaking enough English for you to order your meals!

We hope we can visit this little island and this restaurant again!

name: Fiamma Seda
review:
Let me start with the warmth and happiness we received as soon as we approached the restaurant, Fabio (the owner), his family and employees super respectful and 100% attention to details. Their food is extremely fresh, from their cocktails, to their fish tapas all the way to they heart melting FIG CAKE (i wanted to steal the recipe!!!) no joke the BEST experience by far.

They let us sit were we wanted, we love a specific cocktail and they made it for us, introduced us to an unfiltered local beer, brought us some tapas for my mom and myself to share & finally a fig cake (you’ll want to take home)

Please have in mind these islands depend 100% on tourism and the pandemic hit them hard so please go support and tip these lovely people.

Thank you Fabio, Emely and the team.

name: Adelina D
review: The restaurant is exactly in the main square. The service is impeccable, the waiter was very polite, and the order came quickly. The food was very good, big portions. The sepia ink pasta are delicious, I recommend.

name: Pubudu Dilhara
review:
Unforgettable Taste and Charming Service in the Heart of Venice!
​Ristorante Sempione is an absolute gem right in the heart of Venice, perfectly situated along a picturesque canal. The entire experience was simply wonderful, starting with the incredible food. We ordered three different dishes, and every single one was super good—the taste is truly unforgettable!
​The service matched the quality of the food. Our server was such a polite and friendly gentleman who provided super nice service. While I regrettably forgot his name, you'll know exactly who he is when you visit: his smiling portrait photo is attached to a wall art inside the restaurant. He made our evening special!
​If you're visiting Venice and looking for an unforgettable meal, you simply must come here. A pro tip for couples: try to request a table on the terrace/balcony area. It adds an unforgettable romantic touch to the whole dining experience! Five stars!

name: Дилара Ахмадиева
review: We liked absolutely everything. It was my husband's birthday and we had a luck to seat on a balcony with a beautiful view on the canal. Despite the staff doesn't reserve tables on balconies, we waited for some 15 minutes until we got our table. The food was good, I ordered pasta with shrimps and truffle, it was really tasty. My husband got tagliata di manzo, the meat was soft and good. The view is absolutely fantastic. The staff is very friendly! I highly recommend this place. Thank you so much❤️We will come again

name: Joke B.
review: The food was absolutely delicious! We had some amazing fish and delicious pasta. We sat with a lovely view of the little canal, which was simply perfect — especially with a glass of fine wine. We were warmly welcomed and well taken care of by Tony, who even took some beautiful photos and videos for us! A big thank you for this wonderful experience.

name: darina stoykova
review: This was hands down the best food that we’ve had in Venice! Ristorante Sempione has a beautiful and cozy location, the pasta was absolutely perfect and the staff were incredibly nice, attentive and welcoming! Would recommend for anyone to try this place!

name: Yeongbae K
review:
I arrived round 7:25 pm and was seated in the back near the canal.

I ordered the carbonara and sautéed spinach.  The carbonara was a most unappetizing one; the meat part was neither guanciale nor pancetta. It looked and tasted like something coming out of a can.  The spinach was decent.

I do not recommend this trattoria.

name: Stillapatmike
review: I must say the food here was very nice and the desert was great. Space in this restaurant is tight. We had a table for two that was taken from a table of four so the waiter had to come round me to get to the other table by the window. Everytime he came past he collided with me. He hit my arm so hard that I nearly lost the fork from my grip. I complained and they moved us but only after stepping on my foot. After we payed and on my way out the waiter collided with me again. Hmmmm.

name: Revent FotoVideo
review: I'll start by saying that it's a shame that the pasta we ordered was good and we would have liked to have ordered something else for sure, but the waiter's behavior made us not want to come back ever again. We made a reservation a month and a half in advance and requested a table by the window because that's the reason we came to Venice to enjoy the scenery. When we arrived, I was told that it wasn't possible because they didn't trust our reservation because we made a reservation for Sunday and we canceled and came back with another reservation for Saturday because our travel plans had changed. If we were not serious, we wouldn't have canceled anything and wouldn't have come, but that wasn't the case. Then we asked, even though you didn't reserve what we asked for, we would have to wait to receive what we reserved and the answer was that in 2 minutes everything would be full and it wasn't possible. In the next 20 minutes, someone came who  asked if they had a table available at the window and they offered it. So a joke. I don't recommend going here if you want to have a nice day.

name: Tiffany James
review:
My daughter and I traveled from New York and stopped by Ristorante Sempione in Venice for a late lunch — and it was so amazing that we went back again for dinner the same day! The food was incredible, but what truly made our experience unforgettable was our waiter, Alessandro.

Not only was the service excellent, but Alessandro’s wine and food recommendations were absolutely phenomenal. He has such a warm, genuine personality — truly a people person who makes you feel right at home. His attention to detail and passion for what he does really elevated our entire dining experience.

If you’re in Venice, this is a must-visit restaurant. Ask for Alessandro — you won’t be disappointed!

name: Arevik Ford
review: Far from your typical tourist menu, this corner spot overlooking a piazza serves up delicious food and great service. Good variety on the menu and even entrees are well portioned. Would come back here again!

name: Williamson Transport, LLC
review: we're sitting inside and saw some bread drop on the floor,  next to the blue glasses.  They picked them up and put them back into a bread basket.  YUK!  Guess it's better not to know what happens to your food sometimes.

review:

The menu is in multiple languages and the waiter that we had spoke good English. There is a small cover charge (1,8 euro each) which is on the menu. This was in a nice out door setting in the middle of Burano. Easy to find and well worth the visit.

name: Adelina D
review: The restaurant is exactly in the main square. The service is impeccable, the waiter was very polite, and the order came quickly. The food was very good, big portions. The sepia ink pasta are delicious, I recommend.

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Sarah-Louise Collins
review: Bit dissapointing. Lovely location. Fish was very good but Pizza was not great. Good carafe of house wine. On top of pizza looked and tasted like tinned mushrooms, pizza base looked store brought... not good when in Italy.

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Benny
review: Randomly picked this place for a quick bite during our Murano and Burano tour from Venice.  Staff were very friendly.  Prices were very reasonable.  Most importantly, there was AC!!

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Enxi Lee
review: A Burano tour group restaurant. Food is mass produced for groups and served with large platters. I have to say the food is generally slightly above average. But I guess to get the best dishes you need to order off the main menu. A tip here would be to check what your tour leader is eating.

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: bulioncik
review: In a word: Amazing!|The restaurant is very easy to find, situated in a perfect place with wonderful view. At first look it seems a simple not a eye catching place, but the food is soooo delicious! The serving is fast, the prices are very good. We had spagetti with seafood and tagliatelli with fish. Super tasty! Thank you chief;)|Totally recommend to have the meal there.

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Jeffrey Lawson
review: This was a restaurant. Mark the American, the best tour guide in Venice brought us here. Try the fish soup, it's the best.

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Mohamed Emara
review:
We only been to the restaurant as part of a group of 50.
We were there for a 2 hour lunch, enough said ?
It’s a seafood menu, had like 5 courses it was great

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: Jane Smith
review: Wonderful service, beautiful good, great location. Beat prawns I have ever had in my life. Highly recommend!

place_title: Trattoria Locanda Al Raspo De Ua
name: kerriec580
review: The staff were extremely friendly and provided us with a unique Italian food experience. The food was plentiful and delicious. We dined on seafood lasagne, potato tuna mix, calamari, prawns and a filet of fish. Dessert was an Italian cream and berry cake. Washed down with an authentic red wine.

name: Rachel Beier
review:
5/5 stars! 🍝👏
Im still dreaming about the daily special 3-course meal I had at this authentic Italian restaurant! The family-owned gem is a total game-changer. The mom's cooking is incredible - every bite was love and care. The dad's bartending skills are top-notch, and the daughter's service was warm and attentive. & the regular customers (Gregorio) are gregarious to have around. The atmosphere is cozy and intimate, with a perfect blend of local vibes. If you're a foodie, you HAVE to try this spot. Can't wait to come back!

name: Leong Kai Fong
review: Great service, super value for money for the €13 lunch set meal, definitely recommend this place!

name: Glennis Flooring
review: The breakfast was great especially the coffee. I would 100% come back here on my next visit to Italy. My kids loved it especially their orange juice.

name: Kate Zolock
review: Every food item was delicious! The staff are helpful And kind. Have English speaking employees!

name: Anda Tanase
review: Everything about this place was amazing: the food, the house wine ( amazing white frizante), and the service (Dario) was so helpful and kind to us. We’ll come back for sure! Thank you 🙏

name: Vojtěch Moulis
review: Great food, greater service. Waiter was great and super kind. Thanks a lot !

name: Pavel Ivanov
review: Real Italian food, simple, tasty and big! 13 euro menu includes 3 dishes, water and coffee. Really good size and very tasty, good value. Very friendly staff

name: Juan Saab
review:
The best place for lunch that we found in Mestre. They offer a lunch menu with first, second and coffee. It's owned by a very welcoming family. Great food and amazing service at a good price.

If you are staying in Mestre, you must give it a try.

name: Jillian Crisp
review: This restaurant is great for pizza! It smelt so good when it arrived that some of it was gone before I could take a picture. The topping we had was tomato, smoked cheese, buffalo mozerella ruccola anchovies. It was called Mediterranean. The smoked cheese and tomato tasted really lovely. We also had sea bass with ratatouille which was a healthy option that settled our stomachs after we had lots of creamy food in Rome. I am sad we are leaving Venice today so cannot come back for another meal.

name: Vanessa L.
review: Excellent food. The staff is super friendly and knowledgeable. We were recommended by a local and it was a wonderful experience (forgot to take more pictures because the food was too good). A must when visiting Venice

name: D Vetrano
review: Great pizza. Wonderful staff and owner. Perfect location. Wine was local and excellent. Best pizza we had in Venice. We will be back

name: Richard Hammitt
review: Excellent food. Not your normal pizza. Specialty craft beers and wonderful wine selection. A wonderful lunch.

name: Iryna Konovalova
review: Visited in April 2024. This restaurant became our favourite for 4 days while we were staying in Venice. There is a big list of pizzas in the menu but in fact I loved not only their pizzas but all the other dishes which I tasted from the menu. The thing which I did love here was the staff. They are friendly, helpful and try to meet all the needs /wishes of their guests. A few times we asked to add/exclude some ingredients and every time they did it. Lunches and dinners in the restaurant made our visit really warm. Thank you 🤗

name: Emily Cartwright
review:
Pizza was particularly good!
Service was really good, couldn't have been more friendly

name: Jared Canova
review: Amazing food, and even better service. Staff made us feel like family, even with our young children.   Lasagne was some of the best I've ever had. Our waiter doubled as an Italian culture guide, comedian, and shopping consultant. Great experience all around.

name: Sofiia Skrypai
review: If you want a real Italian food and service, I recommend this perfect place !!!

name: German Conte
review:
La milanesa de pollo con papas es espectacular y gigante ,  muy amable la moza ,buenprecio
El tiramizu también muy bueno y grande es para compartir tranquilamente
recordable 100 %

name: Tugrul SADIKLAR
review: Çok büyük beklentiyle gitmeyin. Personel ilgili, ingilizce bilen bir personele denk geldiğimiz için anlaşabildik. Yanımızda bebeğimizi görünce biz talep etmeden hemen mama sandalyesi getirmeyi teklif ettiler. Turist menüleri var, fiyatta süpriz yaşamazsınız. Lezzet olarak çok üst değil ama temiz ve ortalama lezzette bir yer.Sanırım 1.5 ya da  2 euro servis ücreti alıyorlar kişi başı.

name: Chenxiao Hu
review:
Trato correcto y amable.

Tienen servicios de almacenaje de maletas a través de Radical Storage, muy seguro el espacio pues es un almacén separado cerrado con llave.

name: Анатолій Танащук
review: Pizza non va bene. Grande prezzo.  Non lo consiglio

name: Alessandro S.
review: Servizio scadente, prezzi alti, location pessima per non dire altro, ma soprattutto è lo staff che non è molto disponibile .Una stella è anche troppo!

name: Gosia Sperczyńska
review:
We’ve ordered 4 pizza, but it’s not what italian pizza was supposed to taste like. The waiting was okay, but…
After eating 3 slices of pizza we’be found a thick, black hair in the pizza. The hunger went away automatically…
We’ve heard „sorry, it happens”
First of all
It shouldn’t have happened at all, not in a restaurant, nor any other places
The good thing was they removed one pizza from the receipt, which was fair, but the talk about our table continued through our whole stay there… not nice. Also we were seated at the dirty table…
Another situation was, when a pair of new cutlery fell down on the ground, well the waiter just picked it up and gave it to another guest… yuck

name: Jenn Gunter
review: This was by far my favorite dining experience in possibly all of Italy, but for sure Venice. After wandering around all day, it was so nice to have such pleasant service. Our waiter was absolutely wonderful! He went above and beyond, and was so great with our young son. We loved it so much, we made sure to stop in here on each day we were in Venice. We will make sure to stop back each time we visit.

name: Byean
review:
The staff are welcoming but the food is really bad. Noticed some dirt on my drinks too. Coffee is fair. Nice of them to charge us a single table charge of 1.5 EUR as we ordered only 1 main and 2 drinks for 2 pax. Our table was a little dirty before we sit down too

Food: 1/5
Price: 3/5
Experience: 1/5
Service: 4/5

name: Rohit
review:
We really enjoyed the pizza and the place is also located at a good location. We were there at night and the setup is good too.
The staff was nice and very friendly. We ordered pizza cavallo and french fries. The pizza was good and with very crispy base.
The prices are okay as well.
Would recommend visiting this place after 9/10pm and taking a place outside to enjoy the view and dinner.

name: Jonathan Christian
review: Wife and I were walking around and randomly decided to sit and eat lunch at this restaurant since it was right there as we turned the corner into the square. I had lasagne and my wife had tagliat bolognese. My lasagne was tasty enough to get 4 stars, but my wife's bolognese was bland, getting 2 stars. Price was reasonable at 8 euros for the lasagne. The staff service was fine and the wait time was acceptable.

name: Andrew Smith
review: Great location for some lunch in the shade. The square is an idyllic respite from the busy Venice streets. Pizza and caprese salad were both nice, but the Calamari was particularly good; light and crumbly. The staff were pleasant and attentive.

name: P J
review:
Right after I sat at the table I began to read the google maps comments and after a while I was sure they are going to give us bad drinks, dirty glasses and then try to gull us on a bill by adding fees and not letting us pay by card unless we spend at least 20eur. I was waiting for any sign, already writing a bad review in my mind and they gave me... nothing. Besides super tasty and refreshing Hugo Spritz in very nice, clean glasses and additional free snacks.
We paid 4eur for each drink (which by the way is a very good price in Venice!) so 16eur in total. So for me there was:
NO coperto, NO additional 10% fee, NO snacks charge, NO minimal amount for card-pay.

I have to give it 5 stars.

name: Raquel Beer
review: The place is worth it for its location: it's in the middle of a quiet square, perfect for a lunch on a sunny day. The service was ok, even though we saw a waiter screaming at people who sit at one table and decided to leave without ordering anything. The worst part though was the food: I ordered a carbonara, which was made with ham (not bacon, not guanciale), and the eggs were actually cooked, a sin for any Italian. I would only go there for a drink and appetizer, and then head somewhere less touristy for food.

name: Francois Cournil
review:
We had a wonderful lunch. As a starter, the mixed cold cuts (affettato misto) and a tuna tartare, which was deliciously fresh and perfectly seasoned. As a main, we had spaghetti alla carbonara, equally tasty and the oven baked fish of the day (a gallinella) An absolute delight.
Spritz aperol and a glass of fruity white (Lugana).
Great service.
Recommended!

name: Христо Борисов
review: Cicchetti is not on the menu and it's 28euro for a plate with topping (which were horrible for most of us) the shrimp wasn't well cleaned and we had to ask for bread for them. Really small portions and the spaghetti Bolognese were bad.

name: Olha Haivanenko
review:
One of the best places in all of Venice!
This restaurant truly stole my heart ♥️
The service, the atmosphere, and the food — absolutely unforgettable. A perfect experience from start to finish. Highly recommended!

name: Shilpa Gauba Puri
review: Nice outside place in Morano next to colored houses, but the food is below average. Vegetarian option is really bad. Avoid If possible.

name: K13
review:
Found this cute little restaurant still open when all the others were closing, the lady that served us was very knowledgable with the foods and recommended some special dishes that weren’t on the menu which sounded lovely (crab etc) we’d already chosen what we’d wanted from the menu and the food was 10/10 couldn’t fault it in the slightest. Three adults for €90.
100% would have no trouble coming back here and recommend this restaurant to anyone that visits Burano.

name: Florian Elend
review: We ordered beer for 7€ and ended up paying 15€, because the beer we got was apparently not on the menu and we got told it was now 15€ a bottle and not 7€ anymore. Total rip off and a waste of time. Service was terrible and took ages as well.

name: Mel K
review: Thoroughly enjoyed a very hearty meal of spaghetti with mixed vegetables, house made gnocchi with tomato & mozzarella and insalata mista served with complimentary bread, grissini, olive oil & balsamic vinegar 🍝 Bellisima! Service was splendid and the setting overlooking quaint square with colourful houses was superb. Highly recommended and well worth the ferry ride from Murano!

name: Victor Plunkett
review: Drinks and food much better than 3.5 stars average.  Service was friendly and prompt. Apprentice and appetizer was fresh and delicious

name: Alicja Tomczak
review:
Homey place with good food and drinks.

During a day it seems to be a go to place for local workers to eat lunch. Portions are good to feel full for next hours, food is simple and delicious.

name: Gail Neasham
review: Excellent service and food. Value for money.

name: Fliks
review: Great food, nice food and lovely atmosphere

name: Robert Csarnai
review: I spent here 1,5 months and it was perfect thank you

name: daniela biasion
review: Ae Moransane.

name: Fabiana Bernardo
review:
Ci siamo trovati in questo posto di passaggio poiché alloggiavamo lì vicino.
Illusi Dalle foto dei piatti presenti sul sito, io ed il mio compagno, abbiamo deciso di pranzare lì il giorno di ferragosto. Se potessimo dare 0 sarebbe comunque in complimento. Uno di quei posti che non vorresti mai trovare né in Italia né da nessuna parte.
Cibo di scarsissima qualità e con personale non all'altezza. Locale sporco, formiche ovunque. Titolare non presentabile. Mi dispiace tanto dover scrivere questo, ma purtroppo è la verità. Pasta precotta e piena di olio... a dir poco sgradevole. Ci siamo alzati e siamo andati via. Da evitare assolutamente.

name: Cinque Quattro
review: Ottimo pranzo. Dall'antipasto al dolce tutto eccezionale. Lo dimostrano le foto dei piatti... In risposta alla recensione negativa (una stella) in cui l'autore descriveva il locale come "una bettola adatta a camionisti dalle ascelle boschive... " vorrei smentire quanto da lui scritto ed attribuire invece piena soddisfazione di tutti noi (cinque persone) per il pranzo odierno. Non solo il cibo é stato servito nei giusti tempi, ma il pesce era genuino, i piatti gradevoli alla vista, buone le porzioni. Ambiente  pulito e  personale disponibile e gentile. Sicuramente, se avrò modo di ritornare in queste zone, questa sarà una tappa d'obbligo.

name: Moreno Covallero
review: Antipasti super, primi ancora meglio, frittura meglio del primo.. Il tiramisù al pistacchio.. Top.. Unico difetto, la cuoca non ci ha svelato il segreto per mantenere compatto il mascarpone 😉😉😉. Ma ritorneremo, e.. C'è la faremo! Scherzi a, parte, consigliatissimo. Personale gentilissimo, attento al dettaglio, non invasivo, ma competente. Un buon posto, merita una sosta. PS a quello che aveva messo una recensione che questo è un posto per cameristica dico:è vero, ma sappiamo mangiare bene.. 😉😉😉

name: Umberto M
review:
Da Terzo is a little restaurant or better a real Italian trattoria.
It’s a little business owned and operated from the same family for more than three decades.
You don’t come here for the cordiality neither for the decor or for a special luxury service.
You come here  because the food is daily prepared like in a family, and you can taste some of the real dishes or the Venetian tradition in a very clean and simple environment being sure to receive the same quality and the same service.

While everything around them is changed in the last years, this trattoria still resist and deliver consistently, day after day, a good, solid flawless service, always without a smile.
Five stars for the consistency.

name: Micky L
review: Good family trattoria. Good food.

name: Oleg Nitz
review: They don't seem to be interested in non-local visitors

name: Mariano Sallito
review: It does not exist any more. The place is closed.

name: gianluigi polo
review: TX

name: Alessia Sala
review:
Avevo effettuato una chiamata prima di recarmi sul posto, chiedendo un attimo che piatti del giorno avessero, mi è stato risposto che il signore era già operativo e in poche parole non aveva tempo. Mi presento comunque sul posto, ero di passaggio, accoglienza quasi zero, ci sediamo, ci portano il menù, c'era la possibilità di un menù fisso con un primo, un secondo, un contorno di verdure a 20 euro, bibite escluse. Noo avendo un bimbo ci siamo presi un primo di gnocchi al ragù, discreto, gli gnocchi erano molto morbidi, un secondo di fegatini alla veneziana, buoni, e spaghetti in bianco per il bimbo, piatto che ci hanno fatto comunque pagare 10 euro, che ho trovato esagerato visto che lì hanno solo cotti nell' acqua e basta. Una porzione di patatine fritte, che comunque non erano cotte bene perché tutte morbide invece di essere croccanti.
Una bottiglia di acqua 4 euro, totale 39 euro.
Non credo che tornerò più.
(Parcheggio non disponibile)

name: Silvia Silvestrini
review:
Locale senza pretese, ma ottima cucina “casalinga”. Buonissimi gli gnocchi col sugo di goulash... talmente buono che ho preso il goulash di secondo. Buono il pasticcio al radicchio e ottima la trippa. Porzioni “mangiabili” ne misere ne esagerate.
Siamo capitati di martedì a pranzo in concomitanza con un pranzo aziendale che affannava non poco la, comunque gentilissima, signora che ci ha seguito...
Provato solo un dolce (pasta fillo con mele e mandorle, buonissimo) complimenti al cuoco... da tornare per provare il baccalà!!!

name: Veronica F.
review:
Trattoria tipica veneta, e giustamente ho scelto il fegato alla veneta con polenta, ho anche avuto un assaggio di trippa come antipasto, squisiti.
Il dessert che vedete, un dolce al cucchiaio a base di ricotta e pistacchio, che dire? Delizioso.
Ottimo rapporto qualità / prezzo.

name: Sydney Cox
review:
From the moment we walked in the lovely workers of this family run restaurant were so inviting and friendly. They suggested items of the day and we opted for their seafood antipasto which left both me and my boyfriend speechless. I have never had such an incredible mix of flavours in my mouth. We both got the Gorgonzola and mushroom pasta after and were once again blown away by how tasty it was. Unfortunately we were too stuffed to try their tiramisu but I can only imagine it would’ve been delicious.
Please give this cute restaurant a chance as you won’t be disappointed!

name: J K
review: Delicious food. Great friendly service, traditional dining. Really great and local experience! I've loved every minute since I entered!

name: Kelly
review: Delicious food with very reasonable price. Very close to the bus station.

name: Axl Diaz
review: I ordered a lasagna and it appears they just have it frozen and defrost on a microwave or something. My food was very cold in the middle, like when you microwave something and its still frozen in the middle. They just took it away and microwave it again. Not a very good experience at least for me. First and last time visiting this restaurant.

name: Panjak Zorica
review: Very pleasent staff, great food and great prices

name: Magali Troilo
review: The food was tasty and the service was really warm!!! The price is really good too.

name: Wang Weixiang
review: Lovely family-owned restaurant at very reasonable prices! They have a €13 set meal with one main and one meat dish. Very good location within short walking distance to the train/bus station at Venice Mestre. Owner and chefs were really friendly too!

name: Marco De Alberti
review: An old style trattoria not fashionable but really concrete. The quality of the food Is good. Top dish "fegato alla veneziana" pork liver with stuffed onion. The service Is fast and kind. Prices more than reasonable.

name: Michael Patterson
review: Seven of us had a very nice dinner on our last night in Venice. Very good service and exceptional food. Nice selection of wines and a great atmosphere. Highly recommend if you are within driving distance.

name: Kari Dowiak
review:
Phenomenal.

I’ve been fortunate enough to eat at some of the best steakhouses in the world… this is up there.

Anyone in the other reviews complaining about the value for money or slow service has no concept of high quality meat or they are a tourist that expects people to adapt to their culture. Not the other way around. This place is a gem.

Highly recommend the Picanha with chimichurri (medium rare).

Can’t wait to come back.

name: Missy Villa
review: Last meal we had in Italy. So, so good. Great wine and ambiance.

name: Cynthia Johnson
review: Very good food! My steak was cooked as requested and the side was very flavorful. My wine chosen by the waiter was perfect for what I requested.

name: cristina spinu
review:
I’ve been recently travelling to north Italy and my cousin took me to this amazing restaurant very close to Marco Polo Airport  we had some home made wine which was  amazing and delicious food .
I had a steak with some Italian dressing which was in perfect combination with the delicious steak, if by any chance you will be going to Venice just have a stop the Trattoria Da Olindo you’ll not regret it at all 👌

name: LAURA NURELDIN
review: Amazing food, good wine, the place is cozy and pleasant, the people are welcoming. Definitely going back when I'm in Venice again!

name: Alessandro Pagani
review: Great place with good food......I guess it's a bit over priced

name: Shmuel Lustman
review: Excellent! Anna and Roberto are a great hosts with lovely food ans tasty steaks with a high level of service.

name: Arun Kurian
review: Worst service in Burano. The person who took our order was very rude and unprofessional. Highly unrecommended

name: Facundo Taranto
review: The best food that I had in Italy and great service.

name: Raffaella Bovo
review: Siamo stati in questa trattoria il 12 agosto e si è mangiato molto bene e il servizio è stato ottimo camerieri gentilissimi e molto attenti a far sentire a proprio agio la clientela mi sono trovata benissimo appena possibile ci tornerò

name: Ángel Revuelta
review: Comida riquísima es un enclave precioso! El servicio fue fantástico y Fabio nos recomendó con mucho criterio

name: Elena P
review:
Siamo visitatori abituali di Venezia/Burano e dintorni e questa è la prima volta che ci sentiamo fregati!

10% di servizio e 3,60 € di servizio a persona.

13€ spesi per niente.

Ristorante a Burano da evitare.

name: Ozkan Akcin
review:
On a très bien mangé
C’était très bon
Nous sommes vraiment ravis
Nous avons mangé à 3
Je vous le conseille vivement

name: Alfredo Ramos Martín
review:
La comida estaba buena, todo estaba bien cocinado y los platos salieron a tiempo.

Mención especial a la ubicación privilegiada que tiene la terraza, ya que si sale un día soleado es perfecta para disfrutar del buen tiempo mientras comes.

Enhorabuena a todo el equipo humano que lo hace posible y un millón de gracias por ponerlo al servicio 🙏🏽😊

name: Isabel Velazco
review: Having lunch at this restaurant was one of the loveliest experiences during my trip to Italy thanks to the great food, ambience, and friendly staff! Encontrarme con dominicanos mientras estaba tan lejos de mi país fue emocionante y inolvidable! Le recomendaría este restaurante a todos quienes visiten esta parte de Italia ❤️

name: Kathy Coulter
review:
Delicious food like what my aunty Lina would make! Prosecco, Pillowy gnocchi con Bolognese, huge grilled shrimp, and a salad. I wanted dessert, but was too stuffed.
I was obviously a tourist because I cannot speak Italian, and I was alone- there were giant tables of people.
They have an English menu and a young woman-who also didn’t speak much English -took over from the older waitress who look afraid to help me. Two elderly people were preparing artichoke hearts in the bar/entrance area. There are clocks everywhere.
It was great! Sounds like it’s been around for many, many years.

name: Sue Sherer
review: My husband and I walked in at 7:55 p.m. and after being ignored at the bar we walked to the entrance to the dining room. We stood there for about 5 minutes while two employees were having a private conversation. I said excuse me to a waitress walking past us and asked if we could be seated for dinner. She did not speak English so she went and got another waitress that did speak English. I asked again for a table for two for dinner and was told NO we are full. There is only 5 tables with people seated at them and the restaurant had approximately 15 more Empty Tables. It was very clear they just did not want to take care of us because we were English-speaking. We were probably dressed, so we didn't understand what the issue was. Does place came highly recommended from our cab driver, but I would not recommend them at all. He must be friends with the owner to recommend a place with such poor service. My recommendation is don't waste your time. The employees there are very rude.

name: Damian Fernandes
review: I have read previous reviews and it is Sad that People who eat to Survive post reviews. In Italy people Survive to eat and this little establishment in the middle of nowhere was wonderful. Spaghetti Alle Vongole was perfect. The fish I had was grilled  Orata . The service was friendly and efficient even thou the establishment was FULL for Lunch with Locals. I am happy to have risked the visit after the inaccurate reviews. Also I sell Food For a living with 33yrs of experience so I hope this review sets the record straight. Great little Sea Food Restaurant must visit when on route to or from Venice Airport.

name: Betül yangöz
review: It is a good place.

name: Marco M
review: I’ve visited this restaurant twice over the span of a few years, and unfortunately, both experiences left me disappointed for the same reason. While the food is of good quality, I noticed a significant disparity in how customers are treated. On both occasions, I observed that people speaking the local dialect were given larger portions compared to those who didn’t, including myself. Additionally, these customers were served first, even when they arrived later or had more complex orders. I noticed this on multiple occasions, and it gives the impression of biased service, which doesn’t value all patrons equally. It’s a shame because the restaurant has potential, but this kind of behavior has put me off from returning.

name: PAOLO NALIN
review:
This was supposed to be my “back home family tradition” place to go. Unfortunately it is not.
We did order too many dishes to mention all of them. Recipes are somehow subjective and i am not a food critic, so I am not going to say much about dishes that I did not appreciate… but some dishes were objectively hard to eat.
Just for the records, i have memories of the place since 40 years ago.

name: Nasser KRARIA
review:
Excellent traditional Italian cuisine
The perfect lunch😎😎😎🍦🍦🍦

name: Veronica Jagher
review: Very fresh fish, directly from fisherman! If you value the good food and traditional osteria-like restaurants, this is a must have in Mestre-Venezia area. Always ask for the fresh fish of the day!

name: Peter Burke
review: Popped in for a late lunch, Sunday around 15:00. Friendly staff. We both had a plate of pasta and little calamari. Sadly, they don't open Mon and Tues, so we won't get to try some of the other dishes.

name: Burcu Kandemir
review: I stayed at a hotel near Mestre. I went because it was close, but as someone who visits Italy every two months, we had seafood pasta, the most expensive standard meal in Italy. Two of us had half a bottle of white wine and a slice of fried cheese each, and we paid 70 euros. There were two minced shrimp in the pasta, and I didn't like it at all. It was very expensive and didn't leave a good impression. I wouldn't recommend it to anyone.

name: Divya
review: The food was great. The fish of the day, the fish 'orata' baked in the oven, was juicy and very well made. While ordering I was very skeptical about the "spaghetti con seppie in nero", but it was delicious. The drinks were also nice. The service was polite and nice. Not all the waiters spoke English, but they understood it enough to understand our order. I definitely recommend this place! The food is tasty, fresh and served with a smile, what else do you need for a lovely dinner night.

name: Wojciech Beyger
review: Tagliata with good quality meat. Bit cold inside. Good lamb and frittura of Frutti di mare. Dessert normal Italian quality. Tiramisu and kava cake. Good. No comments. Service quick and good.

name: Jacqueline Clark
review: Booked this restaurant while in Canada based on previous reviews. We loved the entire experience. Our waiter, Diego was superb! He recommended the tuna and the “black” spaghetti and another pasta with artichokes.  The tuna was the best we have ever had! All dishes were great and the recommended wines were a perfect match. We would definitely go there again!

name: Aaa Mklv
review:
Very good place to eat  !! Delicious !! Serving food all day long ! Highly recommend to try !
Service is amazing !

name: Dana Bobolicu
review: Amazing place. Dog friendly and even served us free dog biscuits. Very friendly and lovely. Food is to die for and cooked to perfection.

name: Tamanna
review: Absolutely wonderful food and service from David and his staff. It's always tough being a solo traveller when finding somewhere to eat where they treat you with respect and kindness. Osteria Lisca is exactly that place. The pasta was delicious - highly recommend.

name: Harsha Raj
review: Its a nice and quiet place. We were staying at Nuova Locanda Belvedere and this was very convenient. Its is also walkable to train station.

name: Yogita Uchil
review: Good place for quick bite and drink. Nothing fancy or flashy.

name: Kaiser Paulus
review: expensive, rude staff

name: Angelo Vianello
review: Si può mangiare con il menù del giorno che é buono e conveniente. Ho dato 3 stelle al servizio non per colpa delle signore che sono gentilissime e brave ma perché il personale è scarsino per la mole di lavoro durante l'orario di punta. Per questo motivo ne risente il servizio nel suo insieme. Comunque torno volentieri.

name: stanimari78
review:
Immaginatevi a mangiare a casa della nonna...ecco...questo :)
Ambiente sereno, gestito da persone serene e gentili.
Sono stati una bella scoperta.
Grazie!

name: Angiolino Barbieri
review: Ci siamo fermati oggi di ritorno da una manifestazione al porto, in quattro persone uno spuntino veloce con speck e due piatti di patate, un litro di vino, caffè e grappino.....venti €, in qualche posto li spendi da solo, esistono ancora posti dove non ci lasci uno stipendio, grazie

name: Lorenzo
review:
Locale datato ma molto funzionale.
Pausa pranzo con colleghi di lavoro. Servizio molto veloce e cibo di mio gradimento (ho usufruito del menù di lavoro a prezzo fisso).

name: Noemi Rakiki
review: Uno schifo totale è il classico posto da lavoratori ma manco  .. due persone 38 euro due menù dove manco c’è l antipasto e il dolce inesistente e senza caffè una bottiglia d’acqua .Ti servono modalità mensa urlando per alzata di meno , e le pietanze non erano sufficienti a coprire i coperti . Le recensioni non rispecchiano per nulla la verità del locale

name: Francois Cournil
review:
One year on, the food is still delicious. I had an amazing fillet steak with grilled vegetables.
There is more here than their great pizzas!

Probably the best pizza around here! We had the pizza Roby, absolutely delicious with a perfectly cooked base and stuffed squid, equally excellent.
We drank Aperol Spritz and raboso (a cooled sparkling local red)
Perfect service. Recommended!

name: Róbert Reich
review: Good trattoria. The food is delicious the prices are acceptable. If you come to Ca' Savio you must try it.

name: Nikola Adamczyk
review: Great place. Food is okay, we've tried 6 different dishes, everything was good. Portions are big.

name: Hang Bui
review:
We had very good time and this restaurant.
Food was really good and the service was perfect.
Definitely come back next time

name: Marcin Schudy
review: Fantastic place with very friendly atmosphere. The food was delicious! Additionally there’s a huge playground for kids.

name: Tim
review:
Friendly staff. Tasty food. Reasonable pricing. Wonderful athmosphere.
If I ever come back around I will make sure to visit the restaurant again.

Also a big thumbs up from me to the staff for disinfecting each table after it gets left.

name: Martin
review: Very enjoyable! they make really great Pizza with lots of toppings and al at a good price 😀

name: Rachel Morgan
review: Lovely family restaurant with children's play area including small football pitch. The food was great - all meals very tasty! We almost didn't get in as they take reservations so book to avoid disappointment!

name: Jelin John
review:
Worst experience ever.
They speak no English.
Highly unfriendly as an foreign/ Asia guy.

Highly prized for worst food.
Three prowns for 12 Euros.
There is no manners as well for serving, just put the order on the table and leave.
We had highly disappointed experience.

BTW they are run by Asians.

name: Chantelle Vollenweider
review:
I want to address something someone below commented - the restaurant was indeed run by Asian looking people who spoke Italian. It is possible that they were born in Italy or that they live in Italy for a long time. I think that this should have no weight on the quality of the restaurant.

My family and I had dinner at this restaurant last week and we really enjoyed it. The food was delicious, the staff were friendly and the locals seemed to love the place too.

We all ordered something different and each dish was great! Right down to dessert.

The staff did not speak English but as an English speaking person I do NOT expect everyone to speak the language, especially not when travelling to another country where the native/ mother tongue is NOT English.

If you are open-minded and looking for delicious food with friendly staff and a vibey atmosphere, this is the place to try. Their pricing is reasonable and the experience is authentic.

If you need staff to speak EN try Venice.

name: Pedro Monteiro
review: Top staff great food and very good price for it

name: Aurora Fonda
review: Excellent! Everything!

name: Antonio Pedroso
review: Espaço simples, pratos com um sabor diferenciado aqui na Itália, onde a Pizza prevalece e a pimenta é o principal ingrediente. Aqui os ingredientes são bem equilibrados e saborosos. Além do preço ser bem acessível, tem o atendimento hospitaleiro do Chinês Marco. Sem falar do vinho ser de uma qualidade diferenciada. Muito bom, recomendamos.

name: W Li
review:
Very delicious Italian food. Good quality and best price. Recommended!!
非常美味的意大利美食!对于无法改变的中国胃而言这里是最佳选择，相比大多数意大利餐厅这里好吃又便宜。为了避免试错，我的威尼斯之行连续两晚都选这里。
另外，店主是老实的中国人，非常和气！

name: Sabrina Zanninello
review:
Ci andiamo spesso, sono veloci e cordiali. Il posto è piccolino ma in estate si può anche mangiare fuori. Buonissima qualità/prezzo. A chi non piace il pesce ci sono le scelte di carne e anche un menù per vegetariani. Nel weekend è consigliabile prenotare.

Consigliato da Qual Buon Veneto!

name: Mauro
review:
Come spesso succede l’apparenza inganna...Chi direbbe che a Marghera , all'interno di quello che sembrerebbe un bar gestito da personale cinese, si celi un  locale di piatti tipici tradizionali di pesce veneziano che nulla hanno da invidiare a ben più noti ristoranti dello stesso centro storico? Solamente che qui oltre alla buona qualità, i prezzi stupiscono per l’onestà! Insomma complimenti a Marco e Francesca dagli occhi a mandorla, anche per la varietà del menù,l'abbondanza delle porzioni, la velocità del servizio senza tanti fronzoli, la gentilezza  e i sapori che solamente chi ha lavorato per anni in cucine venete è in grado di fornire.
Sconsigliato ai “radical chic” della gastronomia...!

name: Harsha Raj
review: Its a nice and quiet place. We were staying at Nuova Locanda Belvedere and this was very convenient. Its is also walkable to train station.

name: Yogita Uchil
review: Good place for quick bite and drink. Nothing fancy or flashy.

name: Kaiser Paulus
review: expensive, rude staff

name: Angelo Vianello
review: Si può mangiare con il menù del giorno che é buono e conveniente. Ho dato 3 stelle al servizio non per colpa delle signore che sono gentilissime e brave ma perché il personale è scarsino per la mole di lavoro durante l'orario di punta. Sconsigliato ai “radical chic” della gastronomia...!

name: Beny Škoda
review: We found this restaurant by chance and decided to try it. It was indeed a great decision because I've never tried better spaghetti carbonara. The gnocchi with crab were also great and the tiramisu as well. The staff couldn't speak English really well, so they sent out this young waitress. She was very kind and helpful, always smiling. We had a great time.

name: M Man
review:
The restaurant looks very simple but their food is super good with fresh ingredients and good value! Highly recommend the ink pasta, the owner told me that they use the fresh ink everyday and it was super tasty!

The female owner was extremely nice and warm person, brighten up my day after a long hours of waiting at the immigration office !

name: Anamenia
review: Everything was very fresh, I also asked for a carbonara without meat and they kindly made it for me. We also got the ink pasta and it was the best one I've tasted.

name: Maxim Martynov
review:
We called 2h in advance and booked. When arrivied, we were met with ignorance and table was not ready.
We had to wait for longer than 10 min. Then a waiter finally came to us... Ordered drinks and food. Food came first... Without 2 sets of knife/fork. Asked for it, got them (without apologies). Later drinks arrived (after reminding). But ... 1 glass for soda drink was forgotten of course... Had to remind.

Food: 1st person ordered fish for €9. Received 1/2 of the fish. Remained hungry. Side dish was a salad.

2nd person ordered fried squids. One of those contained some particles which caused a thought about the visit to dentist.

3rd person was a kid, did not complain but did not complete his meal. It's very unusual for this person...

Restaurant takes €2.5 pp as "coperto". For what do we normally pay for this in Italy, ladies and gentlemen?
Normally you get a ... Service! Yes! And some bread, right? All tables around got bread but our table was excempted. I tried to claim this before the payment but with a wide smile I was told that all was "normal". I did not want any conflict and paid.

Warning:
AVOID THIS PLACE!!! THERE ARE MUCH MUCH BETTER ONES AROUND.

name: Es Kang
review:
This restaurant is 'Chinese express restaurant'
And The prtion of food is different with other tables and even my table.

name: Suud
review: Simple dishes with good ingredients, fish, and most important: very tasty! We ate here two days in a row because we liked it a lot. The place may not look 'restauranty' but good enough for a cozy dinner. The host of the restaurant always looked so happy, which was very catching and made us happy too :)

name: ouzhe xia
review: Nice place to have dinner。

name: Narimane Branci
review:
Oh boy where do I start !!!! First food we had after we landed in Italy and let me that this place set the bar EXTREMELY HIGH !!!!!!!!!!

Service was great, the people were nice and very quick.

The food was AMAZING, no lies I had tears while eating the pasta 🥲 portions were VERY generous and the price was cheap.

10 out of 10 would recommend - Thank you soooooo much

name: Ida Boeva
review: Staff was very friendly! They have daily set menus, but you don't have to order the three courses. Coffee after the meal is also included in the price. Great service.

name: LOFOTEN
review:
EXCELLENT VALUE FOR MONEY ! Just 12 euros for a large primo of pasta, than secondo WITH contorno, free sparkling water, and delicious coffee at the bar;
Pleasant service in this 100% working class restaurant. Highly recommended.

name: Jeffery Johnson
review: First time in Italy and we just got into town. We were looking for a place to eat dinner and we really enjoyed this one. The pasta was delicious and Prosecco was delicious.

name: Ayça Zeynep Çınar
review: A hidden gem! Best pasta with seafood I have ever eaten in Italy! The prices are quite affordable and the staff is the kindest. ☺️

name: marissa lee
review: Wonderful family restaurant that treats you like family. Very reasonable prices, delicious food, friendly staff. Willing to make just about anything you ask for even if it's not on the menu!

name: Alex Stone
