We did not overstay our welcome nor the stores official time but very unpleasant to grab a few essential items needed for the morning. I would only use this store as a last resort for items otherwise bring your money elsewhere.

name: Christine Lemieux
review: Great super market with affordable prices!! A little bit out of tourist way but you will find great prices on all items.

name: Brian McCollum
review: Very affordable wine options in a quaint little market

name: Robert / Ranjiv Lal
review: This is a great little store in Venice if you are passing by to get whatever you want for your daily shopping or if you are visiting then for your drinks and snacks while you look around Venice. Definitely recommended for anyone who wants to get their own food, snack and drinks. Thank you and have a great day 👍

name: GK
review: Want to shop for essential groceries where the locals shop? this is it. Dorsoduro discount market. Easy, quick, no BS, inexpensive. You won't find luxury grocery items here.

name: Terence Lee
review: Standard size small supermarket in venetian standards. But this shop packs the full variety upwards in crowded shelves. One of the best prices for grocery in Venice and really friendly and accommodating staff. I easily exchanged an earlier purchase for an alternative product. Staff always smiling and courteous.

name: Tim Amen
review: Well stocked store with basics. Nothing fancy but the prices reflect that. Thank you for giving us a nearby option for fairly priced meats, cheeses, and more.

name: Jackson Lewis
review:
Not much in the way of food, lacking in fruit and veg.
HOWEVER... The wine is ridiculously cheap and decent quality! Highly recommended for those on a budget!

name: Paul T63
review:
Lovely little shop that sold everything we wanted!
Great selection of wines and spirits too.

name: Aubrey Williams
review: Lovely little traditional grocer's, with a great selection of products for tasty meals and everyday needs. Prices fair, staff jovial and friendly. Excellent

name: Robin Coeckelbergh
review: Super nice people, the sandwich is amazing.

name: metal lion
review: Went to get last minute wine and supplies ten mins before closing and the vibe said don’t shop here - he told us we close in two mins instead of hi/welcome. So, we went elsewhere with our euros…

name: Alissa Shelton
review: We love this alimentari and go a few times a week. An amazing deli counter—delicious mortadella, roast beef, speck, great Gorgonzola of multiple types, wonderful olives. A nice selection of chocolates, sodas, and convenient necessary fresh produce. Thanks for being a great shop! We are so lucky to have you a few steps from home!

name: Samantha Bekker
review: Lovely deli shop, well stocked with beautiful produce, wine and essential items. The meats and cheeses are amazing. Loads of really nice things to choose from. Great for a picnic or if, like us, you are renting an apartment, you can easily make a delicious meal from the products in this shop. Prices are very reasonable. The ready made eggplant parmigiana was delicious and so convenient when we needed a quick dinner.

name: Berlin Gal
review: Love their extensive selection of premium pasta, cold cuts and local delicatessen. One of the small must-see grocery shops. Perfect if you live in the neighbourhood for tasty local food.

name: Ramin Ostad
review: Amazing selection of cheeses and Parma hams. Super patient and kind!! Perfect place to pack your picnic for the day!

name: Ben Hutchinson
review:
Rudest staff I've ever met. Seriously unfriendly place, probably more hostile to tourists. Bought 20 euro worth of things and not even a hello or thank you and carrier bag dumped ontop of the groceries and a blank stare. A customer bumped into me as she was leaving the queue and the guys that worked there looked at me like I was responsible for causing some sort of issue. What a great representation of Venice.

In short: tourists, you should spend your money elsewhere as these guys could care less about your patronage.

name: Marta D
review:
Opens :
Monday-Saturday 08.30 - 22.15
Sunday 09.00 - 22.15

It's one of the stores that opens until 22.15, near that area.

The supermarket offers lots of products/groceries, such as fresh food/vegetables/fruits, frozen food, snacks, drinks, cold drinks, wine, toiletries, etc.

name: Ozge Ustundag
review: A convenient local supermarket near the hotel — perfect for grabbing water, snacks, or a quick drink. Good selection of Italian products like Rummo pasta and Bellini. Not fancy, but reliable and open late, which helped a lot.

name: Hugo Guillen
review: Good for your basic needs, you’re not going find a huge store though. Very limited amount of cold drinks if that’s what you’re looking for but in a touristy city like Venice, it’s as good as you’re going to get without paying absurd prices elsewhere for simple supplies. Staff about as friendliest as everywhere else lol.

name: Jon Hyne
review: Good range of grocery items at this small supermarket. Checkout staff were friendly. Saw a wet dog in there that looked sad, hope the owner bought him a nice doggie dinner.

name: Rahul Chopra
review: Nice super market in center of Venice.

name: Romel Tenazas
review:
To :DELTA SVILUPPO SRL CANNAREGIO
Calle Del Magazen n5587/5588
30121 VENEZIA,
For the crew:thank you so much for always helping with a smile. even though you are all busy with your works. and the store is very clean. for me you are all number one .. best crew. thank you god bless to all👍👍👍👍

name: Νικόλαος Παγουλάτος
review: One of the ladies in the salami-cheese department very rude and unfriendly especially with tourists!The ladies in the cashier were friendly and helpful!!

name: Manwell Dos
review: Here you can find all the products you need for daily basic and food for an affordable price.

name: Jing Zheng
review: Reasonably priced supermarket, I bought a big bottle of 1.5 litre sparkling water for €0.30. The entrance looks like a glass gallery, just follow the supermarket signage and you’ll get there. Kudos to them for providing a free public toilet for tourists!

name: Karthik
review:
This supermarket in Murano is where you can get all items in very cheap rates. I was searching lot for such supermarket in Venice mainland but didn't get one which was this cheap. It was a great relief.

For those who are in 2-3+ days of venice trip, this is the place where you can come and get stock of drinks, snacks to munch on.2l Coke which would cost easily around 4-5€ or more in Venice mainland is 1.5€ here.

name: Lisa Sit
review:
A very local grocery store. It was a little confusing to find as it's located at the top of the building, so if you're coming through the back way it seems like you're going in the wrong direction but as long as you follow the signs you'll get there. Not catered to tourists.

Prices were cheaper here compared to the other grocery store on the island, and I found they had more local shelf products to choose from (very little to zero American products). Produce was not great.

name: Ofek Shaked
review: Regular supermarket got a lot of variety and easy to get around.

name: Villi Gym
review: The customer service at the checkouts is not tourist friendly. The cashier threw the receipts on the belt and turned his back as soon as he received the money. Neither greeted nor thanked, no manners at all.

name: Pascal Berger
review: Good selection of products but they charged us 2E for each bottle of water. 6 of the same kind were 4E, be careful and always check your bill.

name: 윤서현
review: Worst clerk ever. Didn’t accept the card(it was fine though) and irritably threw my changes on the counter. I was with my parents and so sorry for them. Absolutely upset with their disrespectful behaviour and highly suspicious as a racist

name: Alexander Erhard
review: Does not let me pay water bottle with card because I did not have any cash left. Outside is 37degree. Rude.

name: Dino Numić
review:
Decent small market. Has the basic things you would expect it to have. Packaged bread, milk, cereals, chocolates, bear, wine, fruit juices, some small selection of fruits and vegetables, etc.

The recycled bag for groceries broke immediately but one of the cashier ladies was very kind and gave us another one.

name: Skywalker Feng
review: Decent small "supermarket" with convenient location. It has a nice selection of daily groceries, and the staff speaks English.

name: Julian Philpot
review:
If you have all the time in the world to wait while the cashier natters with other customers, or opens up a till for her friend who's in the queue behind you and then proceeds to push past you, this is a great place to come.
If you just want to go in, find what you want, pay and leave, avoid like the plague. This is a local shop for local people. As guests in the city we try to respect the residents, but after two visits to this store, never again.

name: Gregory T. Wilkins
review: Coop is everywhere and a great value for a quick bite to eat and drink without paying tourist prices. Beer can be found for less than one Euro and a decent sandwich for $3.50.

name: Ash H.
review: Went there recently. The staff was more interested in talking to themselves, than helping customers. One of the female staff members kept turning her back to us, and ignoring our questions. She Said they had no eggs (ouvo) and then turned back around to talk to another coworker while standing in the middle of the narrow isle in front of us, blocking the only way out. Rude rude rude. Would recommend walking the extra 4-5 minutes down to the coop supermarket not far away.

name: Clara C.
review: Coop has always been our favorite store with its choice of items. However, The lady cashier at the store was very rude. Won't be coming back.

name: N K
review: Just got two umbrellas from there. Cheapest products I've seen in my life. Also the cashier woman had the worst attitude ever. No manners at all.

name: Amy Chen
review: Good supermarket- had most of the items we were looking for. Good fresh fruit with good prices. However, found some items (orange juice) to be overpriced!

name: David EB
review: Our favourite stop for knickknacks and large bottles of water (0.36 euro for 1L!), and so many fresh fruits and food to eat.

name: Theo P
review: Great little supermarket! Self-Serve checkout! Is it to find lots of items. Great pre-made pre-packaged salad for one. Lots of deli items breads etc

name: Salvatore Bec
review: Such a great personnel, the girl Marlene is the best. We became friends.

name: Sean Elias
review: Reasonable prices and location is good

name: Gabriele Illica
review: Supermercato molto piccolo e parecchio datato ma ha tutto quello che serve,un po' scarsa,la scelta dei vini cassiera brava e simpatica.

name: Marco “Billy” Ballarin
review:
Sarebbe un caposaldo per gli acquisti di alimenti per la famiglia ma ultimamente ha un comportamento tutt'altro che "protettivo" nei confronti del potere di acquisto della famiglia.
Ad esempio, il latte senza lattosio è passato da 99 centesimi al litro nel 2021 ad 1,60€ a Novembre 2022!
Vergogna!

name: KOCHIRO
review: ベリーニを揃えている貴重なお店です。

name: Fabio
review: Cortesia e disponibilità del personale,gentilezza della signora cassiera/direttrice ,difficilmente trovata in altri negozi

name: Steven Cheng
review:
Very nice little market, small but got everything thing you need. From fresh vegetables, fruits, dry goods, frozen food, beer and wine, bathrooms supplies, households supplies!

Very small store front , you need to o slow down, otherwise you may miss!

name: jerry Z
review: The staff is beyond rude. This lady was probably the rudest person working in a store I have ever met. I asked for the manager (little man around 35-40 years old with tattoos) he defended her. Unbelievable!!! Stay away from this location. Also very dirty and unorganized.

name: Konsta Anttila
review: Friendly staff and surprisingly good selection for how small the store is.

name: Penny Gonci
review: Rudest cashier I have ever had to endure. When she realized I was an American she literally threw my food didn't offer me a bag and yelled go! Unbelievable stay clear if you are visiting and most of us are

name: Deggsie “Deggs” Degs
review: Very good store for the size of it. I found all of the staff really cheerful and very helpful even when you get the bread thing wrong. The bread thing is weird but once you’ve done it once it’s fine. I think the automated checkout things are hard work when the cashier has to approve anything with alcohol. I am using this store daily and finding the food fresh and very tasty. I’m finding their ready made deli counter food better than some resturants and served with more smiles.

name: FOTIOS FOTAKIDIS
review: Everything you need, especially refreshments!

name: Theresa Hoban
review: We used this market to get our basics but stick up when you find water and milk because other days they run out of different groceries. Some days they have bread and other days they are sold out. It’s an easy walk from the Rialto bridge if you are staying at a local BnB.

name: Larry Westcott
review:
We stayed write around the corner from this CO-OP and we actually went to the other CO-OP jut because of the reviews.  One day we decided to stop in since it was so close and I have to say ...
The staff is very friendly.  Have been in there about three times and the gentleman cashier says hello to me and Merry Christmas and asks about things.  We even sang We Are the World together...LOL.
He has a sense of humor and very helpful...
As for people having a problem because they have to weigh or measure the breads or the fruits and vegetables...Just learn how it is done here...It is not a big issue.
As for the self checkouts they are available in English and Italian and I have not had an issue.  It does take cash.
The store is small but it is close and in a central area..great for quick stuff...this is not a huge grocery store or a Walmart.
Great to grab water for 25P for 1.5 liters when every restaurant was offering for 2.50...
The walkways are tight but space is limited in Venice so just accept it and smile as you work around each other.
Remember smiles are free...

name: priscilla On Holidays
review: Little grocery with handcraft product as coffee (9€ 250gr), oil and vinegar, cheese & ham, nice to bring back something for friends &family

name: Berlin Gal
review: A modern delicatessen shop selling local and international specialties. A v good selection of fresh cheeses, butter, and wine, too.

name: Alan Hamerman
review: Places like this, authentic and true to the spirit of Venice today and yesterday, still exist. A pleasure, everything you could want and ask for, from wine to coffee, olive oil to pasta. Easy to find, warm and attentive care, take a moment to cherish it.

name: Anita Giddings
review: This shop put together a beautiful gift basket and delivered it promptly. Absolutely wonderful service.

name: Jennifer M. Costa
review: This is a wonderful corner grocery store with all the basic essentials needed for your household needs. Staff was super friendly and great explaining all the different grocery delicacies

name: Pablo Ruiz
review: Has a good selection of items, friendly staff and a really clean place

name: Pierre-Alexandre Canny
review: Very nice small supermarket and staff!

name: Alessa Retat
review: One Apple for nearly 4 Euro. That's too much...

name: Natalia Banasik-Jemielniak
review: A nice small but sufficient supermarket when you can buy any groceries, including fresh fruit and veggies

name: Hugo Krajnc
review: Minimarket describes it really well. You’ll find everything you need to survive while in Lido, but don’t expect fancy products, wide range of options, or a spacious, clean, well lit too brand market. It is sufficient for a beach-like town you soend a couple of days at while on holidays

name: Magnus Ohman
review: Decent selection of Italian food produce. Hardly a luxury gourmand place, but has most of the things you may need if you're staying in Lido. Close to the boat terminal.

name: Jeff Crawford
review: This is a great little minimarket for groceries and toiletries.

name: Сергей Блашкин
review: It says that it closes at 21:00 but in fact they closed at 20:30. Not friendly personnel.

name: Michael G
review: The prices of the store and on here dont. Match. It closes earlier

name: Happy Kikofr2015
review: Good location, close to the pier... It is in a quiet , residential area. The store can be easily missed as there is no sign of the supermarket at the begining of the street ( turn right after seeing Bar 9 ) .

name: Jordan Lui
review: Standard grocery store. No chilled beer unfortunately but good prices. Plan ahead when you visit the island and buy your snacks here!

name: Catherine Amadeus
review:
I was so excited to come here when I was in Venice. Everything is gluten free, obviously, and the owner very clearly cares about what products he carries. He even gave us a list of gluten free restaurants he recommends based on his own experiences. Compared to other major cities in Italy, there were not a lot of good gluten free options in Venice that I found, so having this was great.
I read some negative reviews saying that the place is not a supermarket as it's small. I think it's obvious that it would be small because it's only things that would otherwise contain gluten in a regular supermarket. I wish more people would open shops like this with many different brands of gluten free items to try. I am tired of the same dry and tasteless options carried at major grocery stores.

name: Nele Carelsbergh
review: Nice guy who sells all glutenfree and sometimes lactosefree products. Had a nice chat with him. Cannoli’s were great!

name: Thang
review: The wonderful thing about this place is that it has gluten free items besides Schar (I love Schar).  Bought a few snacks and stuff to bring home with me from Venice.  If you need restaurant recommendations, just ask the owner.

name: Nona Haller
review: Great shop with delicious gf cannolis! The owner is so kind he even gave us a list of all the safe gluten free restaurants in Venice! A wonderful hidden gem.

name: Hamish & Saskia England
review: Would recommend going here first as a gluten free person visiting Venice. Lots of snacks and ready to microwave meals (of which there isn’t much anywhere else in Venice) Owner was super helpful and kind and will give you advice on the best gluten free restaurants. Great wee shop!

name: Charlotte Sutherland
review: A fantastic selection of gluten free food. The owner was incredibly helpful and friendly. This shop is a celiacs dream.

name: Kat Baker
review:
This place was the absolute highlight of our Venice weekend. Travelling with a coeliac friend who was delighted with all the options, from fresh canollis to ravioli that doesn't fall apart.

Big thanks to the owner, his recommendations were spot on and his enthusiasm was amazing.

name: Alissa Shelton
review: Delicious GF options! Shopkeeper always kind and friendly! And they have a list of restaurants in Venice that are GF safe. ❤️ Thank you!

name: Liam Hall
review:
It has a variety of items like a typical convenience store and the prices are more than reasonable.
The store most definitely exists.

€1 for water. €1.70 for 660ml of beer.

Owners seem to be Chinese but I’m familiar with that from my home country so it’s a positive for me.

name: Anamika Govani
review: We arrived 15 mins before closing and the propiretor yelled at us. Very rude, don't recommend!

name: B M
review: Arrived a bit late at my hotel with most restaurants in the neighbourhood closing their doors at 21:30 (even though one can see plenty customers inside), this is a lifesaving small supermarket offering all you need for a late aperitivo, with good quality goods.

name: boyavatar2000
review: Google has the wrong address for this shop! It's actually at 879 Rio Terrà Foscarini.

name: craig mcintosh
review: The store does not exist.

name: Jasmina Hodzic
review: Doesn’t exist on this address, don’t go

name: Rei To
review: Doesnt exist

name: Jakub Oszust
review: Doesnt exist

name: Mg 0
review: Good selection of fresh fruits and vegetables, meats and chocolates. There are also some gluten-free items, including a red lentil pasta. The prices are a bit higher at this supermarket than at others in Venice, but the place convenient and available.

name: Heather O'Neill
review: More spacious than most supermarkets in Venice, with good selection too!

name: Oleg Naumov
review: Very good shop where you can buy any kind of food and alcohol.

name: leslie rice
review: Hard to find and small, staff helpful but if closer market to you not worth the walk

name: Kareem AlMansy
review: Would be great to have halal products for Muslim tourists.

name: Rob Musci
review: Excellent Coop that is spacious, has a nice selection of products, and has a really nice staff.

name: Rebecca Grammatico
review: Bring your own bags for groceries. Easy in and out.

name: mark kilfoyle
review: simple supermarket - good prices - difficult to leave!

name: Flo Yeow
review:
It's not really a mini market, but more a supermarket. If you search for supermarket near me, and this pops up, make sure you drop them a visit. They're not located at a visibly obvious location, but it's definitely walkable.

Place is huge, they have a wide set of offering including fresh produce, and they also have hot food. Impressive, at reasonable prices. For Venice, this is absolutely a great find.

name: Jani Nummela
review: Called a "minimarket", this store is a full supermarket with a large selection of everything from fresh cheeses, fruit, meats and bread to wine, licour and soft drinks. Cleaning supplies, hygiene products, a limited clothes selection.

name: The Romneyc
review:
Love the liquor section.
The staff were friendly.

name: Ste Bri
review: Great supermarket. Has everything one could need including fresh cheese and cuttlery, a large variety of vegan and organic food. Love to go there when in Venice.

name: Vanessa Ma
review: Come here for major groceries if you stay on Giudecca

name: Tim Ribchester
review: Definitely the larger and more comprehensive of the two Giudecca supermarkets by far. Very good quality produce including fresh meat and cheese counters, and ok wine selection, though very few mid-priced wines among the budget and premium options.

name: Daniela Zarate
review: It's a bit pricier than the ones in main Venice or Mestre but it's the best one in Giudecca. Very close to the vaporetto station and has enough things. Avoid going on Monday morning because that's when they restock and some shelves are empty

name: Norma Glennie
review: VERY RUDE CASHIER here!  I understand maybe not liking foreigners but come on!  Didn't realize that you had to weigh your produce and when we got to cashier she was very snippy that we couldn't purchase the fruit until we weighed it.  Asked her where the scales were and she nodded her head and gave us a very rude look!  Needless to say, produce went back on the shelf and we walked out without any fruit!!!

name: Desi
review: Couldn't find a fridge with cold water. And they don't  sell cigarettes. Other than  that the supermarket is full of good items and fresh vegetables.

name: Reut Golinsky
review:
Good local supermarket, conveniently located near the hotel with lived in and just on the way from the tram.
It is not big but has everything you might need. Vegetables and fruits are fresh, there is good choice of diary products.

name: Nicola Persic
review: There is a lot of good food but most things are pretty expensive and the building looks abandoned from a distance. It's close to the tram stop and it looks like it's the only grocery store in the immediate surroundings.

name: Elena Mozgovaya
review: We bought very tasty cheese and jamon and olives for delicious dinner. Good prices

name: Mighty Asima
review: Cadoro  super market  is  a  nice place  for  shopping  situated  laterally  viale  San  Marco  street  and  thier  prices affordable

name: Mahfuja mim
review: It’s nearby my home. And i also love there to do shopping 😊.i feel  it’s like my home😅🤭........

name: ishaq khan
review: Good market but a little bit expensive i would say

name: Cool comet
review: You can buy anything with wholesale rate..

name: Vernon Brady
review: We found this well stocked with things we needed.  It was close to where we stayed and our go to while in Venice.  The large water bottles was inexpensive.

name: Emma Grigoryan
review: The staff is very good.

name: Rick Kim
review: Excellent store with reasonable prices for the quality of the products offered.

name: Michael Murphy
review: Friendly young owners. Nice selection of quality products for a small store.

name: Oeil De Serpent
review:
Small but with all you can need.
More expensive than others supermarket.

name: othmane rhaffar
review: Good supermarket

name: Richard Moško
review: Cute small shop with good selection of goods

name: Marie Tabanda
review: A cute little grocery in the neighborhood.

name: John Rehagen
review: Got beer late and had a great night. 4-5 euro each. Many complain it is not cheap but of course it isn’t cheap, it’s the only place open. Glad they are open though!

name: Bill “BillY”
review: 4.5 euros for one tube of Pringles chips is a pure rip-off on tourists. You should avoid this store and head for other mini market stores nearby

name: Scott Williams
review: Expensive but better than nothing for late night supplies

name: Chuck Prato
review: Open late for that Post-Flucht bottle of wine!

name: Luke
review: Selling cheap wine wayyyy to expensive. Cheapest one is 15€ but probably costs like 2€.

name: Chole Chang
review:
參考價格😵（如發票收據）
桃子汁飲料3.5歐/瓶
健達出奇蛋2.5歐/個

建議大家往後走一點有一間大型超市！
圖二超市一大瓶才2.19歐

name: Lanxue Yang
review: 考虑到营业时间这么晚，算价格合理。意大利面有各种搞笑的形状，很好玩

name: Will
review: 3€ por una botella de agua. Ojo con el clavo que te meten.

review:

review: The wonderful thing about this place is that it has gluten free items besides Schar (I love Schar).  Bought a few snacks and stuff to bring home with me from Venice.  If you need restaurant recommendations, just ask the owner.

name: Nona Haller
review: Great shop with delicious gf cannolis! The owner is so kind he even gave us a list of all the safe gluten free restaurants in Venice! A wonderful hidden gem.

name: Hamish & Saskia England
review: Would recommend going here first as a gluten free person visiting Venice. Lots of snacks and ready to microwave meals (of which there isn’t much anywhere else in Venice) Owner was super helpful and kind and will give you advice on the best gluten free restaurants. Great wee shop!

name: Charlotte Sutherland
review: A fantastic selection of gluten free food. The owner was incredibly helpful and friendly. This shop is a celiacs dream.

name: Kat Baker
review:
This place was the absolute highlight of our Venice weekend. Travelling with a coeliac friend who was delighted with all the options, from fresh canollis to ravioli that doesn't fall apart.

Big thanks to the owner, his recommendations were spot on and his enthusiasm was amazing.

name: Alissa Shelton
review: Delicious GF options! Shopkeeper always kind and friendly! And they have a list of restaurants in Venice that are GF safe. ❤️ Thank you!

name: Marco Secchi
review: One of the nicest in my view, generally I am not a Coop fan . I tend not to like layout  and spaces but this is nice. Friendly and helpful staff and good produce . They have local as well. I even decided to join Coop!!

name: Afshin Koupaei
review: Fine place for essentials when you are in venice. If you need a wider range of supplies you would need to go to the main market, Conad. But you will find a wide range of meat, pasta, cheese, snacks, different types of bread, some fruit and vegetables and many more here. It is not really a mini market, it will serve your needs mostly and you would not need to go to the main market if you are a guest in Lido. More specifically, I do prefer the quality of supplies at coop and they seem to be more italian comparing with Conad.

name: Agile Schtorm
review: The plce is nice, but their pre-cooked food was sub-par. Still a great place to grab drinks and snacks on the way to the beach.

name: Marco Monti
review: Good supermarket

name: Jun's Math
review: You can easily find what you want

name: Alberto A
review: Standard minimarket

name: Yuri Garbisa
review: Piccolo supermercato vicino ai Murazzi, dispone di un ampio parcheggio pubblico per poter parcheggiare, la sua locazione é in un area molto tranquilla. Ha avuto eiverse riforme negli anni ma rimane uno dei principali supermercati specialmente nell'area dov'é localizzato. Soprattutto d'estate viene usato molto dai locali per far acquisti ed andar a godersi la giornata prendendo sole ai Murazzi. Ottima selezione, sempre ordinato e pulito, personale educato che aiuta sempre in caso di bisogno. Raccomandato

name: Marco
review: Discreto supermarket alimentare con vasta scelta di prodotti e marche

name: Sophie Grace
review: Surprisingly decent prices. I expected it to be much more expensive.

name: D. B.
review: Molto buono e economico.

name: John Rehagen
review: Got beer late and had a great night. 4-5 euro each. Many complain it is not cheap but of course it isn’t cheap, it’s the only place open. Glad they are open though!

name: Bill “BillY”
review: 4.5 euros for one tube of Pringles chips is a pure rip-off on tourists. You should avoid this store and head for other mini market stores nearby

name: Scott Williams
review: Expensive but better than nothing for late night supplies

name: Chuck Prato
review: Open late for that Post-Flucht bottle of wine!

name: Luke
review: Selling cheap wine wayyyy to expensive. Cheapest one is 15€ but probably costs like 2€.

name: Chole Chang
review:
參考價格😵（如發票收據）
桃子汁飲料3.5歐/瓶
健達出奇蛋2.5歐/個

建議大家往後走一點有一間大型超市！
圖二超市一大瓶才2.19歐

name: Lanxue Yang
review: 考虑到营业时间这么晚，算价格合理。意大利面有各种搞笑的形状，很好玩

name: Will
review: 3€ por una botella de agua. Ojo con el clavo que te meten.

name: Desi
review: Couldn't find a fridge with cold water. And they don't  sell cigarettes. Other than  that the supermarket is full of good items and fresh vegetables.

name: Reut Golinsky
review:
Good local supermarket, conveniently located near the hotel with lived in and just on the way from the tram.
It is not big but has everything you might need. Vegetables and fruits are fresh, there is good choice of diary products.

name: Nicola Persic
review: There is a lot of good food but most things are pretty expensive and the building looks abandoned from a distance. It's close to the tram stop and it looks like it's the only grocery store in the immediate surroundings.

name: Elena Mozgovaya
review: We bought very tasty cheese and jamon and olives for delicious dinner. Good prices

name: Mighty Asima
review: Cadoro  super market  is  a  nice place  for  shopping  situated  laterally  viale  San  Marco  street  and  thier  prices affordable

name: Mahfuja mim
review: It’s nearby my home. And i also love there to do shopping 😊.i feel  it’s like my home😅🤭........

name: ishaq khan
review: Good market but a little bit expensive i would say

name: Cool comet
review: You can buy anything with wholesale rate..

name: Piotr Baleinovitch
review: Really pleasant and friendly Supermarket. Delicious sliced San Daniele prosciutto 👌!

name: Caroline Epp
review: This says it's in San Polo Venice but it seems to not exist.

name: El Smith
review: Doesn't seem to exist here on the map in Venice?

name: Vittore Pecchini
review: small supermarket. the best in this part of lido

name: Andrea Gusso
review: Small, but you find everything you need.

name: Lucas
review: An sich kleiner guter Laden aber SONNTAG GESCHLOSSEN!

name: Roland Hamburg
review: Der Supermarkt mit breit gefächertem Sortiment. Zahlreiche Parkplätze direkt vor der Tür. Ist etwas abseits von der Ortsmitte belegen, daher nicht so stark frequentiert. Relativ schmale Gänge, aber auf circa 200 m² ist soweit alles zu finden was man als Tourist benötigt. Auch eine Fleischer frische Theke ist vorhanden.

name: Christian Omiccioli
review: Ottimo supermercato c'è di tutto e con ottimi prezzi, specialmente la frutta e la verdura. Bello il reparto gastronomia compro sempre qui il roast beef perché è il migliore ed è competitivo anche sulla qualità.  Posto ordinato e personale professionale e gentilissimo.  Faccio la spesa qui più che volentieri.

name: Zachary Pavkov
review: We decided to stop here and buy ingredients for our sandwiches to mix things up. Randomly chose this place and...wow! The ingredients were fresh (sliced right there) and the market had all the extras we wanted and never knew we needed. Great business, Marta and Mariateresa!

name: Melanie Michlmayer
review: very helpful advise and excellent care. very delicious, and the owner is the sweetest✨

name: Yohan Marion
review:
A little intimidating when you don’t speak Italian and have a line of locals behind you waiting to order 😄.
But, OH MY GOD.
Everything I ordered from this store was absolutely delicious. Best tomatoes I’ve ever had, cheese, meat everything was great!

name: David Lee Morris
review: Wonderful little store. Great local products. Lovely people.

name: Jim Andreas
review: Awesome place to assemble a lunch!!!

name: Henrietta Macri ́
review: Appena ho visto la signora (proprietaria) ho pensato: questo posto non può vendere alimenti cattivi. E infatti, abbiamo preso ad asporto polpette, verdure, melanzane ripiene e un po' di vino e tutto era DELIZIOSO! Come la proprietaria! Very raccomandabile!

name: Simone Vianello
review:
ottimi affettati e ottimi panini.
Qui fanno anche il pollo ogni giorno ed è buonissimo 🤪

name: Giuseppe Russo
review: Una bottega così...la ricordavo nel mio paese da piccolo!!! Banco salumi e formaggi da spettacolo con prodotti tutti di altissima qualità, e poi la gentilezza delle proprietarie veramente incredibile!!!! Ci torneremo di sicuro alla prossima visita davvero consigliatissimo!!!! Non vi pentirete!!! Un grande grazie alle titolari Marta e Teresa il top

name: Dana Avery
review: Good little Italian grocery store small but enough to get what you need.

name: Al Seagull
review: Surprisingly good mini market! Large selection of products, fresh pastries, decent wines and beers, and for Venice the prices are actually quite low. Definitely recommend!

name: Elena *
review: Nice market to find something to eat/to drink during you visit Venice. We bought there cold Bellini in small bottles for refreshing

name: Yasir SYA
review: Lady at counter at night was generous. Closes at 9pm sharp. Water available at 0.6 euro for 1.5 litres

name: Jamie
review: Prices are not good. Shop elsewhere. Small bottle water 1.50.

name: Ben Lu
review: You’ve got to be pretty desperate to be stopping in here to buy anything.

name: MaDi Reimers
review: Rude staff.

name: Edoardo
review: Prezzi a mio parere esagerati. Sabato 5 Novembre 2022 stavo per acquistare una confezione composta da n. 6 bottiglie di acqua da un litro e la ragazza alla cassa mi ha detto che il prezzo complessivo era di 10 euro. Ho rinunciato all'acquisto perché non ritenevo giustificabile una richiesta simile.

name: Philipp Philipp
review: unhöfliche Dame an der Kasse: Wurden angeschrien und beleidigt als wir nebst dem Einkauf erledigen auch eine Flasche in den Abfalleimer im Supermarkt entsorgen wollten. Schimpfwörter fielen, ich war sprachlos. Unakzeptables Verhalten der Mitarbeiterin am 04.Juli 2024

name: Théotime DUPUY
review:
Shop to avoid !
This store is not clean and not safe.
No more comment is necessary, the photo says it all.

name: A L
review: This was a decent supermarket in the middle of Venice. Some of the alternatives are really bad and by the time we got here, we were grateful for the supplies we got.

name: Jakub Fiuk
review: Good range of products for the size of the shop. Late closing time allowed us to get all we need to prepare breakfast next morning. I don't know why others would expect a store to be cheap in the center of Venice.

name: Richard Walton
review: Good range of products at a reasonable price. Everything from bottled water to octopus is available. The store was clean and well stocked. You need to keep your receipt as you have to scan it before you can leave the store.

name: Usama Hasan
review: Nice store, reasonable prices for the centre of Venice!

name: mikehammer
review: In posizione strategica per la zona di Rialto. Purtroppo non ha molta scelta e spesso mancano articoli. Il personale (non italiano) a volte non capisce quello che chiedi. Sarebbe apprezzato avere un po' di più scelta.

name: Antonia Amprino
review: Para salir del paso sirve. Tiene algunas frutas y verduras, aunque los precios son un poco elevados.

name: Lidiane Cristina Da Silva Lidi
review: Excelentes preços, vale a pena

name: Shara Guarnaccia
review: We were so excited about the fruit variety! Signs said not to touch the fruit and the staff picked the fruit for us. Very disappointing that all the fruit we were given was rotten or overripe

name: Bruce M
review: Attentive and helpful staff, amazing number of items for a small shop.

name: Der Kölner
review: Winziges Geschäft mit allem was man zum Überleben braucht. Praktische Öffnungszeiten und freundliche Bedienung. Preise etwas niedriger als bei der Minibar...😉

name: Abrar Hossain
review: Frutta fresca e buona succosa e dolce prezzi perfetti poiché siamo a venezia commessa molto socievole pronta attiva e gentile sicuramente sarò un cliente abituale

name: Laura Gabriela Diaz Hernandez
review: Tuvo leche, cereal, fruta, verdura, yogurt... excelente.

name: Paul S
review: Très bonnes fraises, mes premières de l'année

name: Anita Luceri
review: Frutta non fresca e prezzi veramente esagerati

name: Vernon Brady
review: We found this well stocked with things we needed.  It was close to where we stayed and our go to while in Venice.  The large water bottles was inexpensive.

name: Emma Grigoryan
review: The staff is very good.

name: Rick Kim
review: Excellent store with reasonable prices for the quality of the products offered.

name: Michael Murphy
review: Friendly young owners. Nice selection of quality products for a small store.

name: Oeil De Serpent
review:
Small but with all you can need.
More expensive than others supermarket.

name: othmane rhaffar
review: Good supermarket

name: Richard Moško
review: Cute small shop with good selection of goods

name: Marie Tabanda
review: A cute little grocery in the neighborhood.

name: Christina Walker
review:
Great little coop with everything you could need last minute.
Only a 4 minute walk from our hotel which was great too!

name: Jim B
review: Close to the Hotel and has cold beer

name: Oigbas
review:
Agosto 2024
Da sempre buone offerte senza andare a fare le spese a Mestre! Personale gentile e professionale!

name: Olena Shcherbakova
review: Красивый остров, отличные пляжи

name: Chiara Bognolo
review:
Personale gentile e disponibile!
Cosa rara di questi tempi.

name: emmegi consulenze
review: Piccolino e con prezzi non scontatissimi

name: Jason Price
review: Lovely market but beware pickpockets everywhere.

name: Marc Buhrow
review:
Uno dei miei posti preferiti a Venezia.
Ogni volta che vengo faccio una foto. Nei anni ho raccolto centinaia di foto in momenti diversi. Bellissimo

name: Helmut Hoffmann
review: Sagenhafte Auswahl aus frischen Fischen und Meeresfrüchten, die ständig von lästigen Möven belauert werden.

name: M Drugay
review: Great selection of vegetarian, vegan and plain healthy items.

name: Federico Marchesin
review:
Grate selection of bio product typical from Venice. I found typical Christmas products such as musetto che peta and cappone.
Highly qualified and very friendly staff, always ready with a joke!

name: ΠΑΝΑΓΙΩΤΗΣ ΣΑΝΤΟΡΙΝΑΙΟΣ
review: So kind members of staff! Very helpful and very good products 🤗

name: Thomas Kunkel
review: Short detour from San Marco square. Great selection of snacks, fruit and drinks!

name: Paulina Sanders
review: Excellent products, great customer service,highly recomended!!

name: Ivan Sinicco
review: Nice to have such a place where is dificulta to find organic products

name: Sean Aherne
review: Typical chemist/ pharmacy. Friendly and knowledgeable

name: Shawn Reed
review: Big variety with some essential oils

name: L' Eburneo
review:
Immerso nel centro di S.Elena (Ve), il panificio Non Solo Pane offre tutto il necessario per la spesa di tutti i giorni:
Surgelati, bibite, prodotti per la casa, prodotti per l'igiene personale, gelati e diversi generi alimentari da supermercato e logicamente dell'ottimo Pane !!!
Il titolare Vincenzo é molto cordiale e disponibile senza dimenticare l'innata simpatia da "Napoletano verace" 😬🤣🤣 !!
Non dimenticatevi che alla domenica, quando il Venezia Calcio gioca in casa, la locazione Campo Stringari é vicinissima allo stadio P.L. Penzo e vengono preparati ottimi panini economici !!!
Da non perdere, consigliatissimo !!

name: Michele Dal Trozzo
review:
A pochi passi dal Marina si Sant.Elena, aperto anche la domenica mattina. Comodissimo per recuperare quello che serve (oltre al pane fresco anche le brioches di pasticceria 😍)
C’è un po’ di tutto, non un supermercato, ma un negozio di altri tempi, per fortuna qui non passati.
Gestore molto cordiale

name: Marco Morese
review: Pane ottimo! Mi rifornisco da Silvano da anni e non sono MSI rimasto deluso

name: Nicola Migotto
review:
È il mio punto di riferimento per gli affettati a una soppressa fantastica e senza nulla togliere a tutti gli altri affettati
Il pane divino e non manca niente compri di tutto
Il titolare è una persona splendida

name: adriano sensale
review: La bellezza di un luogo senza tempo; il profumo del pane, il dolce aroma dei croassants e dei bomboloni, la cortesia e l'allegria del titolare e della sua compagna. Un mondo anni 70 dove è bello entrare e ritovare degli amici ed ogni sorta di ben di dio per sostenersi. Una perla di S. Elena.

name: Albi
review: Caro, prezzi non esposti

name: Lucie DAVOST
review: Tout petit mais pour un pique nique c’est très bien: jambon, pain..

name: Armin Hüttenegger
review: Gutes Sortiment, nicht weit vom Yachthafen S. ELENA

name: Helen Mc1971
review: Great little supermarket has mainly household products for cleaning but some food and drink as well and mosquito spray which is handy.

name: Timothy Jacobi
review:
Great little place. It may be a little more expensive for standard items like bottled water, but it offers a diverse product line. Many of their products are hard to come by in Italy and especially in Venice; think 7up, Doritos, etc.

The only issue is that it‘s a little pricier than the Coop nearby (or the Prix around a few corners), so I would not go here for normal groceries.

name: Mr Someone
review:
Don't go there if you're hungry!
There's plenty of cleaning stuff and whatever, but no fresh food and just a few very expensive, prepacked baked goods.. cannot recommend!

name: Alexandra Panaitescu
review: In acest supermarket m-am simtit discriminata, desi sunt o persoana blonda cu tenul deschis la culoare! Aveam un rucsac mic in spate si vanzatoarea m-a obligat sa-l las la casa, desi in avel moment in magazin mai erau cel putin 10 persoane cu rucsaci in spate! M-am simtit oribil nu o sa mai revin niciodata! As vrea sa anunt autoritatile ca alte persoane sa nu mai pateasca asa ceva! Magazinul nu era dotat cu dulapuri de bagaje!

name: GERTI Zeneli
review: Si trova tutto di prodotti di pulizie e anche a dei ottimi prezzi 👍

name: Donatella Trevisan
review: Vasta scelta di prodotti per la casa e per l'igiene personale disponibile

name: roberto boscolo
review: Ottimo prezzo

name: Suzanne Collier
review: Grateful prices and very kind

name: Cevdet YILDIZ
review: Venezia beer aldığım market.

name: Julia Lee
review: Prob one of the best croissants I’ve had ever. It was warm and slightly sweet from the brioche dough. I’m def going to go again tomorrow before we leave Venice bc it was that good. I highly recommend it!

name: Alexandra Woolsey-Puffer
review: My favorite food shop in the neighborhood - great breads and pastries, good selection of wines and local spirits, plus choice meats and cheeses to make it easy to put together a snack to eat back at home or at the canal

name: Berlin Gal
review: This delicatessen shop became instantly my go-to-place for the most delicious artisan made cookies (!! highly addictive), small batch olive oil, craft beer, wines and so many other tasty products that are carefully curated from small and very often local makers. I also enjoy chatting with Luisa and Alessandro, the owners, about locally made and sourced foods. A hidden gem in Cannaregio!

name: Yasmin
review: Fresh and crunchy pastries. The employee working there is super sweet and was helpful in explaining each item with the origins and ingredients. We ended up buying pizza, salty and sweet pastries and got free tasting pieces.

name: Grace
review: Cute little Italian “grocery store” with freshly baked bread she sells by weight, coffees you can order, wine bottles, and other foods. The owner/staff was super friendly and made my morning so lovely. I tried one of the freshly baked breads and a cookie with a coffee and I wish this was near my place (I was only there on vacation) so I could go all the time.

name: Farrah Mojabi
review: Great bakery we found in Venice!! Friendly staff and wonderful baked goods. We went there several times and even picked up some necessaries that she  Carrie’s such as milk, eggs and bottled water!!

name: Paul Adelman
review: Delicious bakery and coffee in Cannaregio neighborhood of Venice! And very friendly!

name: Ray Hubley
review:
My wife and I stopped by earlier this week before heading home to New York and wanted to share how taken we were with your shop, the people working there and the great selection of local and artisanal products.
Tonight, we will drink the Maramao Pinot Grigio we brought home with us and make a wish to return — not just to the store, but also your beautiful city. (Hopefully, the olive oil will last for a few weeks!)

Thanks also for steering us to VENETIKA — where we had two unforgettable dinners.

Warmest regards,
Ray & Deborah / New York City

review: Surprisingly decent prices. I expected it to be much more expensive.

review: Molto buono e economico.

review: Great place for picking up a picnic lunch when on a visit to Venice.

Questo zona e molto Tranqilla

name: Marco B.
review: Günstig? Flasche Wasser 2,50 €.

name: Nesar uddin Joha
review: Staff ottimo, amicevole.

name: Javier Cartiel
review: Productos a muy buen precio y un trato excelente.

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Maria João Sá Marques
review: Best tiramisu I ever had in my life!! The owners are incredibly nice and did everything  to make us happy, including an extra triple topping of cocoa in the tiramisus we bought almost everyday, for a week.  The ice creams, the cannolis and the paninis are delicious and homemade. Basically every product they sell is absolutely great! I wish you all the best and hopefully, see you next year :-)

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Nikki Murphy
review: Perfect place to stop to take a break from the heat for some delicious ice cream. The service was kind and quick.

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Kateřina Vlčková
review: What a goood gelato this was! If you're there, try the cookies flavor. One of the best flavors I've ever had. I'll be thinking of this place for a long time.

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Yunus Emre Eyi
review: Absolutely loved this place. Good quality with a fair price. The staff was cute and thoughtful. Worths every money you spend here.

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Stephanie Greene
review: Best Cannoli I have had travelling Italy. Going back for gelato today

place_title: Prodotti tipici Eredi di Scarpa Franco s.a.s
name: Jenny Mi
review: Very cute little shop! We had some Arrancini as a snack during the day, and it was very good. There was also ice cream and desserts. The man was very very friendly.

name: Ευάγγελος Κυργιαλάνης
review: Very friendly, good ice cream prices for Venice, big scoops for cones

review: THE best ice cream we've had, you'll be crazy to miss this place. Grazie!
