review:
È il mio punto di riferimento per gli affettati a una soppressa fantastica e senza nulla togliere a tutti gli altri affettati
Il pane divino e non manca niente compri di tutto
Il titolare è una persona splendida

name: adriano sensale
review: La bellezza di un luogo senza tempo; il profumo del pane, il dolce aroma dei croassants e dei bomboloni, la cortesia e l'allegria del titolare e della sua compagna. Un mondo anni 70 dove è bello entrare e ritovare degli amici ed ogni sorta di ben di dio per sostenersi. Una perla di S. Elena.

name: Albi
review: Caro, prezzi non esposti

name: Lucie DAVOST
review: Tout petit mais pour un pique nique c’est très bien: jambon, pain..

name: Armin Hüttenegger
review: Gutes Sortiment, nicht weit vom Yachthafen S. ELENA

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: Ori Katzin
review:
Great mini supermarket!!!
EVERYTHING YOU NEED, IS HERE!!!
We bought water, laundry detergent,  yogurt, milk, eggs, toiletry, personal hygiene items and more.
Don't waste your time, go there directly.
Rated by Ori, an American tourist.

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: Claudia Cadoni
review:
noi residenti dobbiamo tenerceli cari i negozi come questo!
E se ospitiamo amici o turisti dovremmo fare delle piccole guide con indirizzi come questo.
Gran buone cose e, come è stato scritto, prodotti che non si trovano in supermercati.

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: laura b
review: Un'attività famigliare gestita con passione.naturalmente i prezzi sono un po' più alti del supermercato, ma è da tenere presente che è un rarissimo negozio di quartiere che offre qualità e ,non da sottovalutare, la consegna a domicilio ( che a Venezia nessun supermercato offre) .Quindi quoto con piacere

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: Stefano Ballarin
review: Negozio di alimentari storico di Venezia con più di 100 anni di storia dispone di tutti i  prodotti tipici della tradizione difficili da reperire nei supermarket ( baccalà, acciughe, affettati di ogni tipo ) merita sicuramente una visita !!!

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: Jean-François O (JFO)
review: Accueil chaleureux, des produits de grande qualité et des sandwiches fais sur demande avec beaucoup de soin. Le tout pour un très bon prix. Grazie!

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: dino trabucco
review: Di salami ne ho mangiati tanti,ma come quello di ballarin non lo batte nessuno.

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: ottavia de pinto
review: Posti così non esistono più

place_title: Ballarin Paolo E C. S.n.c. Alimentari
name: Michela Contessa
review: Ottimi prodotti

name: M Drugay
review: Great selection of vegetarian, vegan and plain healthy items.

name: Federico Marchesin
review:
Grate selection of bio product typical from Venice. I found typical Christmas products such as musetto che peta and cappone.
Highly qualified and very friendly staff, always ready with a joke!

name: ΠΑΝΑΓΙΩΤΗΣ ΣΑΝΤΟΡΙΝΑΙΟΣ
review: So kind members of staff! Very helpful and very good products 🤗

name: Thomas Kunkel
review: Short detour from San Marco square. Great selection of snacks, fruit and drinks!

name: Paulina Sanders
review: Excellent products, great customer service,highly recomended!!

name: Ivan Sinicco
review: Nice to have such a place where is dificulta to find organic products

name: Sean Aherne
review: Typical chemist/ pharmacy. Friendly and knowledgeable

name: Shawn Reed
review: Big variety with some essential oils

name: pepakrusty nebbia
review: Vivrei a venezia anche solo per le incredibili verdure che si trovano.

name: Christina Walker
review:
Great little coop with everything you could need last minute.
Only a 4 minute walk from our hotel which was great too!

name: Jim B
review: Close to the Hotel and has cold beer

name: Oigbas
review:
Agosto 2024
Da sempre buone offerte senza andare a fare le spese a Mestre! Personale gentile e professionale!

name: Olena Shcherbakova
review: Красивый остров, отличные пляжи

name: Chiara Bognolo
review:
Personale gentile e disponibile!
Cosa rara di questi tempi.

name: emmegi consulenze
review: Piccolino e con prezzi non scontatissimi

name: Helen Mc1971
review: Great supermarket if like me you are staying self catering and want to save money it's easy to get to we used the tram going and the bus coming back.  If you are staying in Venice (the island) and have a vaporetto ticket you can use it on both the tram and bus in the Mestre district.  There is a validation machine on both which is the same as the vaporetto one.

name: Anne Nelie Bukman
review:
Good variety of products available ,even if not so cheap !
Bakers' corner where you weight the bread of your choice .Cold cuts ,fresh fruits and vegetables .Even a section of pet food . Neat presentation and easy straight forward self check out .

name: Jabir Mahmud
review: Very poor maintaining. After buying something they checked your body. I don’t why they keep the machine there.

name: Vuong Pham
review: This is a new supermarket that recently found this year 2020. It has almost things that you need for your home. Unfortunately, I could not find fresh seafood in here. That is why I rate 4 stars instead of 5 stars. Hopefully, these product will be available one day in the future!

name: Carly Victoria Greenwood
review: Found Dairyfree and Eggfree croissants!! Amazing 🙌🏻🥐🤩

name: chef chua
review: Small hypermart yet with things more than a supermarket. Cooked food, everything you need for a quick meal and drink and party, just across hotel centrale and infant of a bus stop.

name: Agassiz
review: Nice service

name: Nick Orieux
review: Nice little supermarket with everything you need for a meal!

name: Peter Newman
review: Nice Supermarket with a lot of stuff. Good place if you are in town and want to cook something at your Airbnb etc. Also offers self checkout. Prices like in Germany

name: Alex Park
review: Quite competitive grocery store. Well managed access and check out system may be restricter than others. Great price of wines are super compelling to revisit here.

name: Babu Nawshad
review: Alright this is my second review I believe after 4 years where you got a 5 star review from me before. today I had the bitter experience in the same old local. From the beginning of my living  in the city I have been a customer of this local. I never ever got any kind of bad behaviour from any staff or the securities since then. But today, after coming from my office ( tired) , I just checked in to this local to grab two bottles of water. grabbing the bottles of water and I saw the price was 17 cents (which was a price privilege for the customers who had the Palm panorama card). in a hurry I forgot to punch the card on the scanner before scanning my water bottles. And the security guard on duty ( 09/11/24 at 14:30 more or less) Came behind me and told me that, " if you don't know how to use the self payment machines , why didn't you go to the sales woman?? " I replied to him "  I know, it was a mistake that I didn't punch my card before, and because the price is showing 57 cents for a bottle that's why I'm going to another machine".. he kept on saying that " you first better learn to speak Italian!!!!"  But excuse me!!! is that the way that a service man should treat a customer??????? I really felt offended, rather insulted by the words of this man . I also frequent the Pam under the Ca'mestre . and their services are awesome!! especially the security guards, always smiling and eager to help you anytime. even out suggest this man should go and search for himself to see how the security guards behave with the customers in interspar, Coop or Simply... I've been living in the zone for 20 Long years. never had this bad experience before. I hope the direction gives some guidance to this gentleman and teaches him how to behave with customers. no matter which race and country  they come from. I am really feeling bad. my weekend was jeopardised by this gentleman's behaviour. sorry to say that. I hope your customer care gets better in this local especially. best of luck.

name: Subhendu Sekhar Sahoo
review: Very cheap price, almost all type of items including alcohol available here. Self and fast checkout. Wheel baskets available to carry the items.

name: Kristy Chi
review: Nice supermarket. Buy ur drink and food here before u go to Venice island. The price gets higher if u buy the same product in Venice center island.

name: Austin Miller
review: Decent selection is a great option in the neighborhood for whatever things you need. We were staying at the hotel in the building and it was very convenient to be able to walk downstairs and get what we need.

name: Ross Hamilton
review: We had visited PAM stores already in Pisa and Florence with no issues, but this store was different. We had used the self service check out and luckily I had kept the receipt. The exit was an automated security gate where you need to scan your receipt to allow exit. This was unlike the other stores we had been in which were manned by a mber of staff and I assumed the barriers would automatically open on my approach. When the exit barriers did not open a security gaurd challenged me in an aggressive manner. I produced the receipt. He then physically pushed me away from the barrier signalling me to scan the receipt whilst shouting at me in Italian. I remained calm, tried scanning the receipt and expected the barrier to open, which it didnt, I was again pushed away from the barrier in an aggressive manner, again shouting at me. The security gaurd then grabbed the receipt out of my hand and tried scanning the receipt himself, this took a few attempts and when it finally did open I was again aggressively pushed towards the exit whilst being shouted at in Italian. That's man handled three times without reason, and without even trying to speak to me in a polite or appropriate manner that a paying customer should be. All whilst my partner was looking on in horror. I will never visit this store again.

name: Jacob Lemon
review: It was more expensive everything and there is a other supermarket with better prices and this area did not have baguettes around 5:00PM

name: Andrea
review: Personale cortese. Piccolo supermercato sull Isola. Spesso mi fermo in barca a far la spesa. Peccato per la mancanza di ormeggi! Ogni volta bisogna far le corse sperando di non trovare danni.

name: Ruben Finotello
review:
Unico negozio dell'isola ma molto bello.
Nel suo piccolo riesce sempre ad avere tutto ciò di chi si ha bisogno anche se con una selezione un pochino ristretta

name: Jürgen Schückle
review: Kleiner Supermarkt mit allem was man braucht

name: Carlo Finotello
review: Indispensabili per l'isola

name: Shumei Chu
review: We were so happy and honored to have the opportunity to meet Maria, the owner and sommelier! She was so knowledgeable and a wonderful host! This was part of our food tour stops. She prepared such a delicious and fresh vegetables and fruits with delicious wines! We had a great time!

name: Wayne Booth
review: Great find for wine and beer, just a bit off the beaten path.  The owner was wonderful!

name: Malea Raffetseder
review: Wonderful local wine shop. Sommeliers was excellent. And she has great bottles as well as bulk local wine. She filled us a water bottle of the best local wine for 3 euros!!!

name: silvano wicki
review: Great variaty of Grappa and Wines, superfriendly and competent Lady, fair Prices! cozy little shop! We are really happy with our selection! thumbs up!

name: peter smythe
review:
Charming small shop with vino sfuso
Friendly, attentive staff who try their utmost to help

name: Joseph Valerio
review: Wonderful owner and a unique experience

name: Ash V
review: Adorable and friendly owner

name: Robert Fink
review: Ein Geheimtipp in Venedig um etwas abseits der Pfade ein Glas Wein zu genießen oder Qualitätswein zu kaufen. Kompetente Beratung und große Auswahl!

name: Calogero Lo Giudice
review: Vado raramente da questo fruttivendolo e non ho mai fatto grandi spese. Poche cose che mancano all'ultimo momento. Ho sempre avuto la sensazione della fregatura. L'altro giorno mi serviva della lattuga. Una lattuga romana a 4 euro? Ovviamente nessun prezzo al kilo esposto, su nessuna verdura o frutta all'interno. Fuori qualche prezzo qui e là. Però lattuga troppo leggera per costare 4 euro. Vado a casa, peso e ripeso: 340 grammi. Il bello è che, come altre volte, la merce viene pesata senza mettere il prezzo al kilo dell'articolo e viene detto il prezzo. Insomma lattuga romana pagata 12 euro al kilo. Credo no serva alcuna considerazione o commento. Scorretti!

name: Lorella
review: Attirata dalla bellissima frutta e verdura esposta, mi sono fermata per acquistare i "botoi" ad un prezzo eccezionale! Mi ha servita un ragazzo simpaticissimo che si è perfino offerto di mostrarmi come pulire i carciofi! Non sono di Venezia, ma vengo alla Giudecca ogni anno e qui ci tornerò sicuramente. Non sarà molto chic, ma certamente sarà un souvenir super goloso e tipicamente veneziano!

name: Nicola Nardo
review: Ottimo negozio di frutta e verdura, di fronte alla fermata del vaporetto della Palanca. Il personale è sempre disponibile e simpatico, l’ortofrutta migliore in zona, prezzi concorrenziali e prodotti di qualità altissima.

name: Giorg s
review: Frutta e verdura di ottima qualità, gestori gentilissimi

name: Michael Hadjian
review: Klein aber alles vorhanden.  Freundlich

name: Nik_ Name64
review: Ottimi prodotti, ma mortalmente caro!

name: María Ignacia Velasquez
review: The saleswoman's service was good, but the prices were too high $$$$$. At the Mercato del Rialto, the same products are available for less than half the price.

name: Mitra Cattry
review: Bought 1 fresh truffle from them last week. At the price of about 20 euros for 1 peace of about 20 gram. They instructed me to change the tissue inside and keep the truffles in fridge. The first time I changed the paper tissue found two small warms inside the package but ignored them. Today I used them and look inside! Apparently the truffles are eaten up from inside by the warms. Very disappointing memoir of Venice…

name: Aarani Sahaj
review: Grabbed some truffle sauce from here, to cook with while on vacation and it was fantastic! A little overpriced, but I guess that's because of the tourist effect.

name: Ezequiel Rivera
review: If you love truffles this is the place. This place has variety of products for truffle lovers at an amazing price. You won't find better prices for the quality. If you are bringing products to the USA you cannot bring natural truffle so don't buy it. All their products are very good quality, tasty and for a great price. I really liked this place.

name: Eyal Abadi
review: All you are looking for regarding Tartufo you can find here... excellent shop and great service. Highly recommended.

name: Vernal Longings
review: We were at the 4th outlet in Venice and was extremely well served by Ms Vivianna. She was friendly, sincere n v thoughtful. She even provided us with a  carton box so that we can pack our 12 bottles safely in our luggage.

name: Alberto Accolla
review: Disappointed with the shop clerk. I was in Cannareggio around  16:00 pm  on Sunday afternoon . I asked some information about storage and quantity to use to make a dish but the lady who was working in that shop was quite unpleasant . She laughed to my questions and made me feel a stupid . Not helpful at all .

name: Jeff Upson
review: Great Shop with great service. Warm and friendly staff with some nice taster pots to help us decide what ones we wanted

name: Beata Pleslic
review: Best fruits and vegetables in Venezia for sure!!! Avocado always the best, which is really important to me! ☺️🍏🍊🍍🥑🍆🌶🥦🥬

name: Ben Aulim
review: Small grocery. We paid 6€ for a sixpack of water (6x 0,5l) which on average shouldn't cost more than 2€ even in Venice. Takes advantage of not having to compete with anyone in Sant'Elena since the closest supermarkets are in Castello.  Won't see us again.

name: Matthew Jacobson
review: Very friendly and helpful, speaks Italian, English and Spanish. Helped with family fish monger. Thanks!

name: David Christopher
review: Superb local fruit and veg shop.  Great quality, good prices and lovely people too.

name: Tamás Kardos
review: The seller was rude with us, and also gave moldy tomatoes that we saw only at home. We will never go back.

name: Rompiscatole Tedesco
review: Die besten Pfirsiche, die ich seit langem gegessen habe. Obst und Gemüse von richtig guter Qualität. Ich wurde auch genau über Reife etc. informiert. Sie haben auch noch ein paar andere Sachen, die man unterwegs brauchen kann. Das Wasser war nicht so billig wie im Supermarkt aber billiger als in anderen kleinen Läden in Venedig.

name: Vassia A.Vanezi
review: Ότι πήρα το χρέωσε περισσότερο από όσο αναγραφόταν στις ετικέτες στο ψυγείο …..

name: Ricardo Sancho
review:
Nos cobro más cosas de las que nos llevamos y luego en casa nos dimos cuenta. Para no volver. Precios desorbitados para una tienda de barrio.
No volvemos

name: Weiying Gao
review: Very fresh and good variety fruits here. I was attracted as soon as we saw the fruit stands on our way to the ferry stop. This is the first time I had fresh fig outside US. It’s so delicious here, totally different from the dry, flavorless figs sold in US markets. The blueberry is very expensive compared to US, but good quality and flavor. The owner even helped wash my blueberries for me.

name: Gyukyeong Park
review:
드디어 납작 복숭아를 샀습니다!
피렌체 중앙시장에서도 봤지만 크기가 작고 상태가 좋지 않아서 사지 않았는데 여기는 사이즈 크고 신선한데 가격은 더 저렴해요! 구매한 당일 먹어보니 달고 맛있습니다ㅎㅎ
생각보다 코나드나 까르푸 같은 마트에는 잘 안보이더라구요 혹시 찾는 분들 있을까 싶어 리뷰 남깁니다
사장님 친절하시고 0.5kg 구매도 가능했어요!

name: Pablo Spano
review: Fruta fresca, trato amable y precios justos para la zona.

name: SAMUELE FOLGORI
review: personale molto gentile, ottima qualità e prezzo

name: francesco carponi
review: Numeri uno in misericordia, ciao sergio

name: Brendan Antonelli
review: This was hands down one of the best places in Venice. Excellent selections of meats, cheeses, breads, jams, and honey. Spent an hour with the extremely handsome Marco as he regaled me with tales of the farms in which the cheeses came from as he helped me with my purchases. He was so very warm and kind and helpful. I never thought a cheese shop would be such a wonderful highlight of my time in Venice but thanks to Marco I’ll never forget that perfect hard cheese.

name: lucy tuohy
review: I was walking to dinner and came past this shop and popped in just to have a look, I ended up spending 50 euro because everything was so good!! My boyfriend and I each had the fresh porchetta and gorgonzola sandwich and it was so delicious that after we left we walked ten minutes back to buy more to bring home, service and experience 10/10 peak of my trip to Venice, they also gave us free wine and prosecco !!

name: Keri Keane
review: This place is a total gem. We were hungry around 3:30 in Venice and that is a tough time to find food because restaurants are closed in preparation for dinner. We stopped by Nonna Bruna because it looked cute and non-touristy. We were greeted warmly and made the best prosciutto and cheese sandwiches ever. The prices were reasonable and the owner was lovely and very kind. A must stop if you’re hungry in Venice!!

name: Mr Brown
review: Stefano provided us with an amazing experience, he is very knowledgeable and has a great selection of meat and cheese's to choose from. I left Venice with some great tasting salami, ham and cheese and will definitely visit this shop on my next trip!

name: Ruben Olmeda
review: Fresh delicious cheese to die for. They made us a one off custom sandwich with delicious meats and fresh cheese called Morlacco ...oh my ...please visit and enjoy heaven.

name: Michelle Lin
review: Lovely selection of bread and cheese. I always get their sourdough it’s oven baked and whole wheat. Makes a perfect avocado toast. The man working at the store is really nice and generous when you ask to try the cheese. Would highly recommend!

name: nicoline flarup svenningsen
review: This is the best shop for specialities, cheese and wine. Having been in Venice for 4 months, no other place is quite as nice. You will experience the best service and care here. They have so much knowledge about the local traditions and the best combinations of crudo, cheese and wine. I cannot recommend this place enough.

name: Cortney C
review:
We randomly stopped at Nonna Bruna walking the streets of Venice and it was actually one of my most favorite experiences of our trip.
Marco, the impossibly handsome cheese guy 😏, was sooo wonderful. He was super knowledgeable and friendly.
We tried some cheeses and sampled their signature wine while he told us about their products and history of their shop. We HAD to buy the wine (Nico’s- Col Fondo) and two of the delicious cheeses we tried. 🤤
Oh! He also had us taste this incredible bleu cheese. I actually HATE bleu cheese, but this was sooooo good. It was a completely different flavor profile than the regular stuff we have in the states. I was SHOCKED. I would have bought some but we are flying back to the USA and sadly can’t bring that particular cheese with us. 😩 ANYWAYS.
I even recommended 2 other couples we met to go and check them out, I hope they went!

Such a lovely part of our vacation here in Venice.
100% will go back if we make it out here again. Definitely for the wine and the cheese, but also because of Marco and his charm. 😉
10/10 🌟

name: Sailor Pear
review: Marvellous homemade pastries - fresh and truly delicious. Owner was so lovely, helpful and nice to talk to. Prices were so reasonable too! I would come here every day if I lived here.

name: Annie
review: Excellent local bakery.  Small shop off the beaten path with excellent, hand made baked items.  Croissants, creme (actual custard) filled pastries, cookies, tarts, etc…  Looked to be a mother and daughter ownership. The daughter spoke excellent English and was very friendly and helpful.

name: Kira Weinand
review: So glad we waited to eat breakfast until we got here, specifically for this bakery. It loved up to the high reviews! Quaint, personal, authentic and delicious. 10/10 recommend! No coffee, we walked down to a little shop near bridge. Absolutely lovely, quiet end of the island.

name: Kaitlyn Cleveland
review: This is the absolute best bakery I've ever been to. A group of us got about 10 things altogether and loved everything we tried. Do not walk past it without going in for something.

name: Callum rj
review: Ordered a an apricot and chocolate croissant to takeaway. They were very fresh and delicious, seems like a good spot for the locals to go to. The lady was very welcoming and friendly. Very good value and a good selection of sweet and savoury bakery items. Perfect

name: Meredith Bauman
review: Highly recommend!! 10/10 Good variety of pastries, some sweet some savory. Small section of eggs, chips, milk drinks etc.

name: Jakub Kozioł
review: Panificio Pasticceria Marangon dal 1952 on the island of Murano is an absolute gem! Our family thoroughly enjoyed their delicious apple pastries and croissants, which were simply divine. The staff was incredibly friendly, making us feel right at home with their warm hospitality. The atmosphere in the bakery was cozy and inviting, enhancing our overall experience. Everything tasted amazing, and we can't wait to visit again. Highly recommend this wonderful family bakery!

name: EL GORDO
review: Awesome and amazing. Truly warm environment with Nonna. Big smile and super happy to have us in the store. I think we ate everything there. Top 5 Italian experiences. Going to miss the warmth.  Yummy Yummy Yummy.

name: Bruno Venga
review: What a wonderful surprise in Venice! A small emporium that sells wines from small local producers, straight from the barrel, as well as gluten-free cookies, bulk essential oils, and natural cosmetics. Excellent prices—1 liter of freshly bottled wine for €2.70.

name: David Pontbriand
review: Highly impressive store selling wine the traditional way, before individual pre-packed glass bottles became a thing in Venezia. The store also carries a bunch of natural and organic products like soaps, detergents, skincare and hygiene, plus pasta that you can all purchase in bulk at a great price. Special mention for the service we received from the sweet lady operating the store, who answered all our questions and informed us in perfect english and french!

name: Berlin Gal
review: Super cute shop focusing on sustainable, wholesome products by small-batch makers or local designers. Brilliant place for handmade soaps, whole-wheat pasta or else without packaging. Amazing gift ideas for friends who love Venice!

name: mike grant
review: Good wine, great price. What more can you say

name: laurentiu gavadia
review: I spent an hour in this tiny shop talking to the shopkeeper asking about stuff. I ended up buying some amazing prints and soaps. I highly recommend this sustainable store!

name: Victoria G
review: More than groceries - fantastic collection of handiwork by local artisans

name: Elizaveta K
review: A wonderful little shop with very kind staff

name: Samuel Fresard
review: The only durable shop of Venice. Go support them!

name: reuben mead
review: Cant pick your own fruit but the fruit they give you is the worst of the batch and there just down right rude

name: A P
review: They won’t let you choose your own fruit (ok all Italy is like that) but then they should have a responsibility to give you edible fruit. We picked up two apples and two peaches on our way to the beach and didn’t check them until we got there: one apple was rotten, the other had visible worms and the two peaches were so hard and green they were good enough only for pellets. Very disappointing. CHECK WHAT THEY GIVE YOU BEFORE YOU LEAVE THE SHOP!

name: Andreas Hecht
review: Complicated and somewhat unfriendly lady. You can't pay by card under 15€ and she looks into your wallet and knows better what cas you have.

name: Lorenzo Spinnato
review: Uno splendore di frutto prima di entrare i. Spiaggi si può fare la spesa qui. La sosta è a caro prezzo ! Ma ci sta vista la location !

name: Villa Elisabetta
review: Prodotti ottimi ed al prezzo giusto per la posizione. Il fruttivendolo gentile e cordiale.

name: Christian Omiccioli
review: Mi sono trovato bene perché ha buona frutta e verdura ad ottimi prezzi. Inoltre Mohamed è gentilissimo e disponibile.

name: Francesco Gibaldi
review: Mohamed è sempre gentilissimo e sorridente ed i prodotti sono buoni.

name: iulia galaju
review: Mi sa oferit fructe stricate aproape complet

name: Yana K
review:
Hidden gem. Loved everything (beside the big croissant, it was not very fresh and quite stale).
Especially great Impade and chocolate cone (corner).
Prices are very cheap.

name: Bonnie Gleicher
review:
The best bakery in Venice, right in the heart of the Jewish district. Everything was the best! Freshly, doughy, perfect. Tons of photos below because I feel like we bought everything. Recommending to everyone visiting Venice.

5 stars!!!!

name: Mirella Tabib
review: I can swear that this place has the best pastries and croissants in all of Venice!!! It is sooooo delicious that we tried almost everything they have 🤩🤩🤩

name: Gabriella Kormendi
review: I had the best croissants of my life here. I went to look for anything vegan quite late in the afternoon and I was lucky enough to still get the flakiest, fluffiest, finest croissants of my life. I bought so many that I still had one 2 days later and to my surprise it was still better than most others. If Panificio Giovanni Volpe can make why can't the others? Quality, professionalism and attention might be the clue.

name: Danielle
review: We got the Pistachio Croissants which had more the texture of a brioche, rather soft than flaky. Delicious! Sweet bakery for grabbing sth to go.

name: Shana Napoli
review: Love this place! Got a delicious vegan apple pastry. The woman working was so nice and helpful!

name: PN
review: So many delicious vegan goodies for breakfast or as a snack. The croissants were a bit too sweet for my taste but they would have gone great with a cup of coffee. (Just watch out if you’re eating these outside as the local seagulls are ready to grab it out of your hand)

name: Amy Gepfert
review: Lovely little Jewish bakery, one of the last kosher ones apparently. Also selling some groceries. We only tried cookies but everything was excellent - try the sweet fennel seed matzo crackers that look like snowflakes, so delicious and unusual. And the Venetian Pincia (cross between fruit cake and bread pudding) was excellent too. Because it's dairy free it lasts ages too, so great for gifts to take home :-)

name: pepakrusty nebbia
review: Vivrei a venezia anche solo per le incredibili verdure che si trovano.

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Alexandra Woolsey-Puffer
review: the best fruits and vegetables I’ve ever had! Perfect for taking home to snack with breads, cheeses and meets from the nearby shops

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Anastasia Sinitsyna
review: Best vegetables, fruits and berries you can get in Venice. Amazing and very kind people work here. Love 💙

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Luca Brustoloni
review: Se vuoi mangiare veramente verdura e frutta bio, un posto unico in zona. Sant'Erasmo è da sempre l'orto di Venezia e dei veneziani, e solo qui, puoi consumare le sue prelibatezze. Persona squisita, come i suoi prodotti, super consigliato.

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Dario Tosoni
review: Un negozio ricco di verdura e frutta di stagione coltivata con passione a pochi passi da Venezia, nell'isola di Sant'Erasmo. Accanto al prodotto fresco ci sono anche i vasetti di verdura sott'olio, in gradevoli confezioni, ideali per un regalo intelligente ai vostri cari. E' dunque un negozio da visitare anche perché vi servono con garbo e vi danno preziosi consigli di cucina.

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Paola Moscatelli
review: Buonissimi i prodotti frutta e verdura di stagione sugo di pom semplice e molto gustoso... Da quando ho cominciato  vado a comprare sempre da loro la zucca è favolosa!!!!!

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: kalindi kali
review: Sorrisi e qualità a km zero.. Da 5 anni il mio rivenditore di frutta e verdura di fiducia.

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Carlotta Sedona
review: Prodotti di eccellenza del territorio, prendo ogni settimana frutta e verdura ed è tutto davvero squisito! Felice di sostenere una realtà veneziana

place_title: i&s Farm ll Biologico di Sant'Erasmo
name: Nicolò Bodi
review: Un negozio di frutta e verdura di qualità (e soprattutto km0) ad un buon prezzo.

name: Diego Costa
review:
Proprietari gentilissimi e cordiali!
Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo. I prodotti sono eccezionali, mai mangiato dei meloni così buoni!
Consigliato! Ci ritornerò sicuramente.

name: Emanuela Gaggio
review: Proprietari gentilissimi e simpaticissimi... Prodotti fantastici!!! Consiglio al cento per cento... Super

name: Maurizio Dania
review: Ottimo negozio. Titolari gentilissimi. Simpatici. Disponibili. Prodotti di prima qualità. Negozio molto ben fornito.

name: Andrei Rusu
review: La piu fresca frutta del Lido di Venezia

name: Stefano francesco Loi
review: Tutto di ottima dualità

name: Nicolò Darai
review: Frutta buonissima

name: KARMA LIFE
review: A good store with a variety of quality goods. Do you need to buy some groceries? This is the place for you. They don't sell cigarettes at night; that's the law. 🫠

name: Sam
review: A good shop with many options. It is what is expected. The only downside is that there are barely any chilled drinks, but there is the choice of some hot food like chicken and potatoes.

name: Yves Rosenberg
review: Highly recommended. "You can get everything your heart desires here." Of course, I mean Italian food. Fresh fruit and vegetables, baked goods, ice cream, all kinds of chilled drinks, and much more. The staff is very friendly and accommodating. There are practically no language barriers. The staff also speaks English. Air-conditioned supermarket.

name: Mark McLaughlan
review: Good selection but wines are limited especially around the 10 euro mark. Bread sells out early. Chaotic queue - several people jumped in front of us.

name: AperolSpritz J
review: A 330ml can of coke costs €.69. It’s open on Sunday too!

name: Zelig Berto
review: Extremely rude staff. Checkout woman screamed at me for not having weighed my fruit, even though the scales were broken she would not help me. Why is someone like this allowed to serve customers? My advice to people who don't speak good Italian is to avoid this store. Tourists are not welcome.

name: Tessa van Westerop
review: Fine, but they sold no cold water :( and we weren't allowed to take pictures with the courgettes...

name: Shravya GK
review:
Coop is a great place on the island of Burano
It is an affordable place to get ice cream, bread and other items if as a tourist you are concerned about the budget then this is an alternative rather than eating at highly priced restaurants.

name: vu nguyen
review: Very large super market with 2 levels. It has everything you need and more. There is ample parking outside but you need to pay as there are people who ticket you if you don’t pay. Large selections of pastries, meats and seafood.

name: Mark Pabst
review: Nice big supermarket with everything you could imagine.  It took me a while to figure out there is a second floor and that is where the bakery and deli is at.  There is a self checkout and you can set the language to English if you like.  Plenty of free parking out front.

name: Gabi Gabi
review: Large supermarket. Bit inconvenient that they put the bread on the upper floor. That should be with the other food items on the ground floor. Put the toilet paper up, or something else that you only need every once in a while, but not the bread!!!

name: Andras Delczeg
review: Paid parking in front of it, we went in but prices seemed higher than general, selection of cheese was less than expected so we ended up not buying anything

name: Efi Lazakidou
review: Very big supermarket and has nice variety of everything!

name: Samia Elghadi
review: A large and luxurious market, everything you need is available in it. Its location is strategic and close to Mystery Station. It is wonderful for shopping and ready-made meals. The pictures explain everything.

name: Alice Burrows
review: Best croissants (pistachio and vanilla) I have EVER HAD. Although they never have any choccy ones, I guess that means they are OOTW (out of this world). However, good luck trying to find the microwaveable rice section and teriyaki sauce. And the photos on the produce weighing scales are chopped (goofy), but the actual produce is good (pink lady apples). I will visit again. #croissants

name: TravelTubeBlankets
review: I love this place! As a tourist, I appreciated the fruit section, the coffee kiosk and the ready to eat food. It’s a one stop shop and with McDonald’s next door to hang out while waiting for my friends, was very convenient.
